items.title: Flow Scheduling with Imprecise Knowledge.
items.abstract: Most existing data center network (DCN) flow scheduling solutions aim to minimize flow completion times (FCT). However, these solutions either require precise flow information (e.g., per-flow size), which is challenging to implement on commodity switches (e.g., pFabric), or no prior flow information at all, which is at the cost of performance (e.g., PIAS). In this work, we present QCLIMB, a new flow scheduling solution designed to minimize FCT by utilizing imprecise flow information. Our key observation is that although obtaining precise flow information can be challenging, it is possible to accurately estimate each flow's lower and upper bounds with machine learning techniques. QCLIMB has two key parts: i) a novel scheduling algorithm that leverages the lower bounds of different flows to prioritize small flow over large flows from the beginning of transmission, rather than at later stages; and ii) an efficient out-of-order handling mechanism that addresses practical reordering issues resulting from the algorithm. We show that QCLIMB significantly outperforms PIAS (88% lower average FCT of small flows) and is surprisingly close to pFabric (around 9% gap) while not requiring any switch modifications.
items.abstract_zh: 大多数现有的数据中心网络 (DCN) 流调度解决方案旨在最大限度地减少流完成时间 (FCT)。然而，这些解决方案要么需要精确的流信息（例如，每个流的大小），这在商用交换机（例如，pFabric）上实现具有挑战性，要么根本不需要先前的流信息，这以性能为代价（例如，PIAS）。在这项工作中，我们提出了 QCLIMB，这是一种新的流调度解决方案，旨在通过利用不精确的流信息来最小化 FCT。我们的主要观察结果是，尽管获得精确的流量信息可能具有挑战性，但可以通过机器学习技术准确估计每个流量的下限和上限。 QCLIMB 有两个关键部分：i) 一种新颖的调度算法，该算法利用不同流的下限，从传输开始时（而不是在后期阶段）将小流优先于大流； ii) 一种高效的乱序处理机制，可解决算法产生的实际重新排序问题。我们表明，QCLIMB 的性能显着优于 PIAS（小流量的平均 FCT 低 88%），并且令人惊讶地接近 pFabric（大约 9% 的差距），同时不需要任何开关修改。

items.title: LuoShen: A Hyper-Converged Programmable Gateway for Multi-Tenant Multi-Service Edge Clouds.
items.abstract: Edge clouds are expected to be a key revenue growth driver for cloud vendors in the next decade; however, simply replicating the network infrastructure for the public cloud to the edge experiences deployment issues. At the edge, the challenge for cloud network design is to deliver the required performance under the stringent restrictions of hardware budget and deployment footprints, while retaining functionality equivalence. To this end, we propose LuoShen , a hyper-converged gateway for multi-tenant multi-service edge clouds by consolidating the entire cloud network infrastructure into a 2U server switch with a P4-centric architecture. At the data plane, LuoShen conducts pipeline folding and fits the original overlay and underlay devices into the switch pipeline via meticulous on-chip resource budgeting. At the control plane, LuoShen relies on BGP peering to ensure inter-component reachability. LuoShen achieves 1.2Tbps throughput and reduces the upfront cost, deployment size and power usage by 75%, 87%, 60%, compared with the original cloud network architecture. It has been deployed in Alibaba Cloud at hundreds of edge sites.
items.abstract_zh: 边缘云预计将成为未来十年云厂商收入增长的关键驱动力；然而，简单地将公共云的网络基础设施复制到边缘会遇到部署问题。在边缘，云网络设计面临的挑战是在硬件预算和部署占用空间的严格限制下提供所需的性能，同时保持功能等效性。为此，我们提出了洛神，一种用于多租户多服务边缘云的超融合网关，通过将整个云网络基础设施整合到具有以P4为中心的架构的2U服务器交换机中。在数据层面，洛神进行了管线折叠，通过细致的片上资源预算，将原有的Overlay和Underlay设备纳入到交换管线中。在控制平面，LuoShen依靠BGP对等互连来确保组件间的可达性。洛神实现了1.2Tbps的吞吐量，与原有云网络架构相比，前期成本、部署规模和功耗分别降低了75%、87%、60%。目前已部署在阿里云数百个边缘站点。

items.title: OctoSketch: Enabling Real-Time, Continuous Network Monitoring over Multiple Cores.
items.abstract: Sketching algorithms (sketches) have emerged as a resource-efficient and accurate solution for software-based network monitoring. However, existing sketch-based monitoring makes sacrifices in online accuracy (query time accuracy) and performance (handling line rate traffic with low latency) when dealing with distributed traffic across multiple cores. In this work, we present OctoSketch, a software monitoring framework that can scale a wide spectrum of sketches to many cores with high online accuracy and performance. In contrast to previous systems that adopt straightforward sketch merges from individual cores to obtain the aggregated result, we devise a continuous, change-based mechanism that can generally be applied to sketches to perform the aggregation. This design ensures high online accuracy of the aggregated result at any query time and reduces computation costs to achieve high throughput. We apply OctoSketch to nine representative sketches on three software platforms (CPU, DPDK, and eBPF XDP). Our results demonstrate that OctoSketch achieves about 15.6× lower errors and up to 4.5× higher throughput than the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 草图算法（草图）已成为基于软件的网络监控的资源高效且准确的解决方案。然而，现有的基于草图的监控在处理跨多个核心的分布式流量时，会牺牲在线准确性（查询时间准确性）和性能（以低延迟处理线速流量）。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 OctoSketch，这是一种软件监控框架，可以将各种草图扩展到多个内核，并具有较高的在线准确性和性能。与以前采用从各个核心直接进行草图合并来获得聚合结果的系统相比，我们设计了一种连续的、基于更改的机制，通常可以应用于草图来执行聚合。这种设计保证了任何查询时刻聚合结果在线的高准确性，并降低计算成本以实现高吞吐量。我们将 OctoSketch 应用于三个软件平台（CPU、DPDK 和 eBPF XDP）上的九个代表性草图。我们的结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，OctoSketch 的错误率降低了约 15.6 倍，吞吐量提高了 4.5 倍。

items.title: MadEye: Boosting Live Video Analytics Accuracy with Adaptive Camera Configurations.
items.abstract: Camera orientations (i.e., rotation and zoom) govern the content that a camera captures in a given scene, which in turn heavily influences the accuracy of live video analytics pipelines. However, existing analytics approaches leave this crucial adaptation knob untouched, instead opting to only alter the way that captured images from fixed orientations are encoded, streamed, and analyzed. We present MadEye, a camera-server system that automatically and continually adapts orientations to maximize accuracy for the workload and resource constraints at hand. To realize this using commodity pan-tilt-zoom (PTZ) cameras, MadEye embeds (1) a search algorithm that rapidly explores the massive space of orientations to identify a fruitful subset at each time, and (2) a novel knowledge distillation strategy to efficiently (with only camera resources) select the ones that maximize workload accuracy. Experiments on diverse workloads show that MadEye boosts accuracy by 2.9-25.7% for the same resource usage, or achieves the same accuracy with 2-3.7× lower resource costs.
items.abstract_zh: 相机方向（即旋转和缩放）控制相机在给定场景中捕获的内容，这反过来又严重影响实时视频分析管道的准确性。然而，现有的分析方法并未触及这一关键的适应旋钮，而是选择仅改变从固定方向捕获的图像的编码、流式传输和分析方式。我们推出了 MadEye，这是一种相机服务器系统，可以自动、持续地调整方向，以最大程度地提高当前工作负载和资源限制的准确性。为了使用商用云台变焦 (PTZ) 摄像头实现这一目标，MadEye 嵌入了 (1) 一种搜索算法，可快速探索巨大的方向空间，以便每次识别出丰富的子集；(2) 一种新颖的知识提炼策略，可有效（仅使用摄像头资源）选择能够最大限度提高工作负载准确性的知识提炼策略。对不同工作负载的实验表明，在相同的资源使用情况下，MadEye 将准确率提高了 2.9-25.7%，或者在资源成本降低 2-3.7 倍的情况下实现了相同的准确率。

items.title: Approximate Caching for Efficiently Serving Text-to-Image Diffusion Models.
items.abstract: Text-to-image generation using diffusion models has seen explosive popularity owing to their ability in producing high quality images adhering to text prompts. However, diffusion-models go through a large number of iterative denoising steps, and are resource-intensive, requiring expensive GPUs and incurring considerable latency. In this paper, we introduce a novel approximate-caching technique that can reduce such iterative denoising steps by reusing intermediate noise states created during a prior image generation. Based on this idea, we present an end-to-end text-to-image generation system, NIRVANA, that uses approximate-caching with a novel cache management policy to provide 21% GPU compute savings, 19.8% end-to-end latency reduction, and 19% dollar savings on two real production workloads. We further present an extensive characterization of real production text-to-image prompts from the perspective of caching, popularity and reuse of intermediate states in a large production environment.
items.abstract_zh: 使用扩散模型生成文本到图像已经得到了爆炸式的流行，因为它们能够生成符合文本提示的高质量图像。然而，扩散模型需要经历大量的迭代去噪步骤，并且是资源密集型的，需要昂贵的 GPU 并产生相当大的延迟。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的近似缓存技术，该技术可以通过重用先前图像生成期间创建的中间噪声状态来减少这种迭代去噪步骤。基于这个想法，我们提出了一种端到端文本到图像生成系统 NIRVANA，它使用近似缓存和新颖的缓存管理策略，在两个实际生产工作负载上节省 21% 的 GPU 计算量、减少 19.8% 的端到端延迟以及节省 19% 的美元。我们从大型生产环境中中间状态的缓存、流行和重用的角度进一步展示了实际生产文本到图像提示的广泛特征。

items.title: DINT: Fast In-Kernel Distributed Transactions with eBPF.
items.abstract: Serializable distributed in-memory transactions are important building blocks for data center applications. To achieve high throughput and low latency, existing distributed transaction systems eschew the kernel networking stack and rely heavily on kernel-bypass networking techniques such as RDMA and DPDK. However, kernel-bypass networking techniques generally suffer from security, isolation, protection, maintainability, and debuggability issues, while the kernel networking stack supports these properties well, but performs poorly. We present DINT, a kernel networking stack-based distributed transaction system that achieves kernel-bypass-like throughput and latency. To gain the performance back under the kernel stack, DINT offloads frequent-path transaction operations directly into the kernel via eBPF techniques without kernel modifications or customized kernel modules, avoiding most of the kernel stack overheads. DINT does not lose the good properties of the kernel stack, as eBPF is a kernel-native technique on modern OSes. On typical transaction workloads, DINT even achieves up to 2.6× higher throughput than using a DPDK-based kernel-bypass stack, while only adding at most 10%/16% average/99th-tail unloaded latency.
items.abstract_zh: 可串行化的分布式内存事务是数据中心应用程序的重要构建块。为了实现高吞吐量和低延迟，现有的分布式事务系统避开内核网络堆栈，并严重依赖内核旁路网络技术，例如 RDMA 和 DPDK。然而，内核绕过网络技术通常存在安全性、隔离性、保护性、可维护性和可调试性问题，而内核网络堆栈很好地支持这些属性，但性能较差。我们提出了 DINT，一种基于内核网络堆栈的分布式事务系统，可实现类似内核旁路的吞吐量和延迟。为了在内核堆栈下恢复性能，DINT 通过 eBPF 技术将频繁路径事务操作直接卸载到内核中，无需修改内核或定制内核模块，从而避免了大部分内核堆栈开销。 DINT 不会失去内核堆栈的良好特性，因为 eBPF 是现代操作系统上的内核本机技术。在典型的事务工作负载上，DINT 甚至比使用基于 DPDK 的内核旁路堆栈实现了高达 2.6 倍的吞吐量，同时仅增加最多 10%/16% 平均/第 99 尾卸载延迟。

items.title: LiFteR: Unleash Learned Codecs in Video Streaming with Loose Frame Referencing.
items.abstract: Video codecs are essential for video streaming. While traditional codecs like AVC and HEVC are successful, learned codecs built on deep neural networks (DNNs) are gaining popularity due to their superior coding efficiency and quality of experience (QoE) in video streaming. However, using learned codecs built with sophisticated DNNs in video streaming leads to slow decoding and low frame rate, thereby degrading the QoE. The fundamental problem is the tight frame referencing design adopted by most codecs, which delays the processing of the current frame until its immediate predecessor frame is reconstructed. To overcome this limitation, we propose LiFteR, a novel video streaming system that operates a learned video codec with loose frame referencing (LFR). LFR is a unique frame referencing paradigm that redefines the reference relation between frames and allows parallelism in the learned video codec to boost the frame rate. LiFteR has three key designs: (i) the LFR video dispatcher that routes video data to the codec based on LFR, (ii) LFR learned codec that enhances coding efficiency in LFR with minimal impact on decoding speed, and (iii) streaming supports that enables adaptive bitrate streaming with learned codecs in existing infrastructures. In our evaluation, LiFteR consistently outperforms existing video streaming systems. Compared to the existing best-performing learned and traditional systems, LiFteR demonstrates up to 23.8% and 19.7% QoE gain, respectively. Furthermore, LiFteR achieves up to a 3.2× frame rate improvement through frame rate configuration.
items.abstract_zh: 视频编解码器对于视频流至关重要。虽然 AVC 和 HEVC 等传统编解码器很成功，但基于深度神经网络 (DNN) 的学习编解码器因其在视频流中卓越的编码效率和体验质量 (QoE) 而越来越受欢迎。然而，在视频流中使用通过复杂的 DNN 构建的学习编解码器会导致解码速度慢和帧速率低，从而降低 QoE。根本问题是大多数编解码器采用的严格帧参考设计，这会延迟当前帧的处理，直到重建其直接前驱帧。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了 LiFteR，这是一种新颖的视频流系统，它运行具有松散帧参考（LFR）的学习视频编解码器。 LFR 是一种独特的帧引用范例，它重新定义了帧之间的引用关系，并允许学习的视频编解码器中的并行性以提高帧速率。 LiFteR 具有三个关键设计：(i) LFR 视频调度程序，将视频数据路由到基于 LFR 的编解码器；(ii) LFR 学习编解码器，可提高 LFR 中的编码效率，同时对解码速度的影响最小；(iii) 流支持，可在现有基础设施中使用学习编解码器实现自适应比特率流。在我们的评估中，LiFteR 始终优于现有的视频流系统。与现有性能最佳的学习系统和传统系统相比，LiFteR 的 QoE 分别提高了 23.8% 和 19.7%。此外，LiFteR 通过帧率配置实现了高达 3.2 倍的帧率提升。

items.title: Towards Domain-Specific Network Transport for Distributed DNN Training.
items.abstract: The nature of machine learning (ML) applications exposes rich characteristics to underlying network transport, yet little work has been done so far to systematically exploit these properties in transport layer design. This paper takes the initiative to pursue a domain-specific network transport, called MLT, for distributed DNN training that fully embraces several unique characteristics of machine learning. At its heart, MLT employs three simple-yet-effective techniques to form a 3-step progressive scheme against long tail latency caused by transient packet drops and queueing. First, it leverages the independencies among gradient updates to enable per-packet load balancing to minimize network hotspots without worrying about packet re-ordering. Then, if hotspot arises, it performs priority queueing/dropping by differentiating gradients based on their layers and magnitudes to optimize model convergence and accuracy. Lastly, if drop occurs, it enables bounded-loss tolerance—a certain amount of gradient losses tolerated by the DNN training without affecting the final model performance. MLT is readily deployable with commodity switches and imposes minimal modifications on popular DNN training libraries (e.g., TensorFlow, MXNet and PyTorch) and communication routines (e.g., PS and Ring All-reduce). We show, via both testbed experiments and simulations, that MLT can effectively optimize network tail latency and achieve up to 62.2% better end-to-end training time over prior work.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 应用程序的本质向底层网络传输暴露了丰富的特性，但迄今为止，在传输层设计中系统地利用这些特性的工作还很少。本文主动寻求一种称为 MLT 的特定于领域的网络传输，用于完全包含机器学习的几个独特特征的分布式 DNN 训练。从本质上讲，MLT 采用三种简单但有效的技术来形成一个三步渐进方案，以应对由瞬时数据包丢失和排队引起的长尾延迟。首先，它利用梯度更新之间的独立性来实现每个数据包的负载平衡，以最大限度地减少网络热点，而无需担心数据包重新排序。然后，如果出现热点，它会根据梯度的层数和大小来区分梯度，从而执行优先级排队/丢弃，以优化模型收敛性和准确性。最后，如果发生下降，它会启用有界损失容限——DNN 训练可以容忍一定量的梯度损失，而不影响最终的模型性能。 MLT 可以通过商用交换机轻松部署，并对流行的 DNN 训练库（例如 TensorFlow、MXNet 和 PyTorch）和通信例程（例如 PS 和 Ring All-reduce）进行最小程度的修改。通过测试台实验和模拟，我们表明 MLT 可以有效优化网络尾部延迟，并将端到端训练时间比之前的工作缩短 62.2%。

items.title: Reverie: Low Pass Filter-Based Switch Buffer Sharing for Datacenters with RDMA and TCP Traffic.
items.abstract: The switch buffers in datacenters today are shared by traffic classes with different loss tolerance and reaction to congestion signals. In particular, while legacy applications use loss-tolerant transport, e.g., DCTCP, newer applications require lossless datacenter transport, e.g., RDMA over Converged Ethernet. The allocation of buffers for this diverse traffic mix is managed by a buffer-sharing scheme. Unfortunately, as we analytically show in this paper, the buffer-sharing practices of today's datacenters pose a fundamental limitation to effectively isolate RDMA and TCP while also maximizing burst absorption . We identify two root causes: (i) the buffer-sharing for RDMA and TCP relies on two independent and often conflicting views of the buffer, namely ingress and egress; and (ii) the buffer-sharing scheme micromanages the buffer and overreacts to the changes in its occupancy during transient congestion. In this paper, we present Reverie, a buffer-sharing scheme, which, unlike prior works, is suitable for both lossless and loss-tolerant traffic classes, providing isolation as well as superior burst absorption. At the core of Reverie lies a unified (consolidated ingress and egress) admission control that jointly optimizes the buffers for both traffic classes. Reverie, allocates buffer based on a low-pass filter that naturally absorbs bursty queue lengths during transient congestion within the buffer limits. Our evaluation shows that Reverie can improve the performance of RDMA as well as TCP in terms of flow completion times by up to 33%.
items.abstract_zh: The switch buffers in datacenters today are shared by traffic classes with different loss tolerance and reaction to congestion signals.特别是，虽然传统应用程序使用丢失容忍传输，例如 DCTCP，但较新的应用程序需要无损数据中心传输，例如融合以太网上的 RDMA。这种不同流量混合的缓冲区分配是通过缓冲区共享方案来管理的。不幸的是，正如我们在本文中分析表明的那样，当今数据中心的缓冲区共享实践对有效隔离 RDMA 和 TCP 同时最大化突发吸收造成了根本限制。我们确定了两个根本原因：(i) RDMA 和 TCP 的缓冲区共享依赖于两个独立且经常冲突的缓冲区视图，即入口和出口； (ii) 缓冲区共享方案对缓冲区进行微观管理，并对瞬时拥塞期间的占用变化反应过度。在本文中，我们提出了 Reverie，一种缓冲区共享方案，与之前的工作不同，它适用于无损和丢失容忍的流量类别，提供隔离以及出色的突发吸收。 Reverie 的核心在于统一（整合入口和出口）准入控制，可联合优化两种流量类别的缓冲区。 Reverie 基于低通滤波器分配缓冲区，该滤波器在缓冲区限制内的瞬时拥塞期间自然吸收突发队列长度。我们的评估表明，Reverie 可以将 RDMA 和 TCP 在流完成时间方面的性能提高高达 33%。

items.title: Credence: Augmenting Datacenter Switch Buffer Sharing with ML Predictions.
items.abstract: Packet buffers in datacenter switches are shared across all the switch ports in order to improve the overall throughput. The trend of shrinking buffer sizes in datacenter switches makes buffer sharing extremely challenging and a critical performance issue. Literature suggests that push-out buffer sharing algorithms have significantly better performance guarantees compared to drop-tail algorithms. Unfortunately, switches are unable to benefit from these algorithms due to lack of support for push-out operations in hardware. Our key observation is that drop-tail buffers can emulate push-out buffers if the future packet arrivals are known ahead of time. This suggests that augmenting drop-tail algorithms with predictions about the future arrivals has the potential to significantly improve performance. This paper is the first research attempt in this direction. We propose CREDENCE, a drop-tail buffer sharing algorithm augmented with machine-learned predictions. CREDENCE can unlock the performance only attainable by push-out algorithms so far. Its performance hinges on the accuracy of predictions. Specifically, CREDENCE achieves near-optimal performance of the best known push-out algorithm LQD (Longest Queue Drop) with perfect predictions, but gracefully degrades to the performance of the simplest drop-tail algorithm Complete Sharing when the prediction error gets arbitrarily worse. Our evaluations show that CREDENCE improves throughput by 1.5x compared to traditional approaches. In terms of flow completion times, we show that CREDENCE improves upon the state-of-the-art approaches by up to 95% using off-the-shelf machine learning techniques that are also practical in today’s hardware. We believe this work opens several interesting future work opportunities both in systems and theory that we discuss at the end of this paper.
items.abstract_zh: 数据中心交换机中的数据包缓冲区在所有交换机端口之间共享，以提高整体吞吐量。数据中心交换机中缓冲区大小不断缩小的趋势使得缓冲区共享极具挑战性，并且成为一个关键的性能问题。文献表明，与 drop-tail 算法相比，推出缓冲区共享算法具有明显更好的性能保证。不幸的是，由于硬件中缺乏对推出操作的支持，交换机无法从这些算法中受益。我们的主要观察结果是，如果提前知道未来数据包的到达，则丢弃尾部缓冲区可以模拟推出缓冲区。这表明通过对未来到达的预测来增强落尾算法有可能显着提高性能。本文是该方向的首次研究尝试。我们提出了 CREDENCE，一种通过机器学习预测增强的尾部缓冲区共享算法。 CREDENCE 可以释放迄今为止只能通过推出算法才能实现的性能。其性能取决于预测的准确性。具体来说，CREDENCE 通过完美的预测实现了最著名的推出算法 LQD（最长队列丢弃）的近乎最佳性能，但当预测误差变得任意更差时，它的性能会优雅地降级到最简单的尾部丢弃算法完全共享的性能。我们的评估表明，与传统方法相比，CREDENCE 将吞吐量提高了 1.5 倍。在流程完成时间方面，我们表明，CREDENCE 使用现成的机器学习技术比最先进的方法提高了 95%，这些技术在当今的硬件中也很实用。我们相信这项工作在系统和理论方面开辟了一些有趣的未来工作机会，我们将在本文末尾讨论这些机会。

items.title: Towards provably performant congestion control.
items.abstract: We seek to ease the design of congestion control algorithms (CCAs) that provably perform well under diverse network scenarios including, cellular links, policers, token bucket filters, operating system jitter, etc. Guaranteeing performance under such conditions is hard as it requires considering combinatorial possibilities of CCA and network interactions. We build a framework that allows us to reason about CCAs. It describes (1) the necessary actions that any performant CCA must take, and (2) a provably sufficient amount of information for CCAs to consider when deciding their sending rate. Combining this framework with techniques in formal methods, we synthesize CCAs that provably perform across a diverse set of network conditions. Our methodology also led us to discover and prove fundamental impossibility results.
items.abstract_zh: 我们寻求简化拥塞控制算法 (CCA) 的设计，使其在不同的网络场景下表现良好，包括蜂窝链路、监管器、令牌桶过滤器、操作系统抖动等。在这种条件下保证性能很困难，因为它需要考虑 CCA 和网络交互的组合可能性。我们建立了一个框架来推理 CCA。它描述了 (1) 任何高性能 CCA 必须采取的必要操作，以及 (2) CCA 在决定其发送速率时需要考虑的可证明足够的信息量。将该框架与形式化方法中的技术相结合，我们合成了可在多种网络条件下运行的 CCA。我们的方法还引导我们发现并证明根本不可能的结果。

items.title: Harmony: A Congestion-free Datacenter Architecture.
items.abstract: Datacenter networks today provide best-effort delivery—messages may observe unpredictable queueing, delays, and drops due to switch buffer overflows within the network. Such weak guarantees reduce the set of assumptions that system designers can rely upon from the network, thus introducing inefficiency and complexity in host hardware and software. We present Harmony, a datacenter network architecture that provides powerful "congestion-free" message delivery guarantees—each message, once transmitted by the sender, observes bounded queueing at each switch in the network. Thus, network delays are bounded in failure-free scenarios, and congestion-related drops are completely eliminated. We establish, both theoretically and empirically, that Harmony provides such powerful guarantees with near-zero overheads compared to best-effort delivery networks: it incurs a tiny additive latency overhead that diminishes with message sizes, while achieving near-optimal network utilization.
items.abstract_zh: 如今的数据中心网络提供尽力而为的传送，由于网络内交换机缓冲区溢出，消息可能会出现不可预测的排队、延迟和丢弃。这种弱保证减少了系统设计者可以依赖网络的假设集，从而导致主机硬件和软件的低效率和复杂性。我们推出了 Harmony，这是一种数据中心网络架构，它提供强大的“无拥塞”消息传递保证——每条消息一旦被发送者传输，就会在网络中的每个交换机上观察有界排队。因此，网络延迟在无故障情况下受到限制，并且完全消除了与拥塞相关的丢包。我们从理论上和经验上都证明，与尽力而为的交付网络相比，Harmony 提供了如此强大的保证，且开销接近于零：它会产生微小的附加延迟开销，该开销随着消息大小而减小，同时实现接近最佳的网络利用率。

items.title: LoLKV: The Logless, Linearizable, RDMA-based Key-Value Storage System.
items.abstract: We present LoLKV, a novel logless replicated key-value storage system. LoLKV follows a fundamentally different approach for designing a linearizable key-value storage system compared to state-of-the-art systems. LoLKV forgoes the classical log-based design and uses lock-free approach to allow multiple threads to concurrently update objects. It presents a novel leader election and consolidation approach to handle complex failure scenarios. LoLKV’s followers are passive, reducing their overall CPU usage. Our evaluation shows that LoLKV achieves 1.7–10× higher throughput and 20–92% lower tail latency than other state-of-the-art low-latency key-value stores.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 LoLKV，一种新颖的无日志复制键值存储系统。与最先进的系统相比，LoLKV 遵循一种根本不同的方法来设计线性化键值存储系统。 LoLKV放弃了经典的基于日志的设计，并使用无锁的方法来允许多个线程并发更新对象。它提出了一种新颖的领导者选举和整合方法来处理复杂的故障场景。 LoLKV 的追随者是被动的，减少了他们的整体 CPU 使用率。我们的评估表明，与其他最先进的低延迟键值存储相比，LoLKV 的吞吐量提高了 1.7–10 倍，尾部延迟降低了 20–92%。

items.title: The Bedrock of Byzantine Fault Tolerance: A Unified Platform for BFT Protocols Analysis, Implementation, and Experimentation.
items.abstract: Byzantine Fault-Tolerant (BFT) protocols cover a broad spectrum of design dimensions from infrastructure settings, such as the communication topology, to more technical features, such as commitment strategy and even fundamental social choice properties like order-fairness. The proliferation of different protocols has made it difficult to navigate the BFT landscape, let alone determine the protocol that best meets application needs. This paper presents Bedrock, a unified platform for BFT protocols analysis, implementation, and experimentation. Bedrock proposes a design space consisting of a set of dimensions and explores several design choices that capture the trade-offs between different design space dimensions. Within Bedrock, a wide range of BFT protocols can be implemented and uniformly evaluated under a unified deployment environment.
items.abstract_zh: 拜占庭容错（BFT）协议涵盖了广泛的设计维度，从基础设施设置（例如通信拓扑）到更多技术功能（例如承诺策略），甚至基本的社会选择属性（例如订单公平）。不同协议的激增使得浏览 BFT 领域变得困难，更不用说确定最能满足应用程序需求的协议了。本文介绍了 Bedrock，一个用于 BFT 协议分析、实现和实验的统一平台。 Bedrock 提出了一个由一组维度组成的设计空间，并探索了几种设计选择，以捕获不同设计空间维度之间的权衡。在Bedrock内，可以在统一的部署环境下实施和统一评估多种BFT协议。

items.title: Alea-BFT: Practical Asynchronous Byzantine Fault Tolerance.
items.abstract: Traditional Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT) state machine replication protocols assume a partial synchrony model, leading to a design where a leader replica drives the protocol and is replaced after a timeout. Recently, we witnessed a surge of asynchronous BFT protocols, which use randomization to remove the need for bounds on message delivery times, making them more resilient to adverse network conditions. However, existing research proposals still fall short of gaining practical adoption, plausibly because they are not able to combine good performance with a simple design that can be readily understood and adopted. In this paper, we present Alea-BFT, a simple and highly efficient asynchronous BFT protocol, which is gaining practical adoption, namely in Ethereum distributed validators. Alea-BFT brings the key design insight from classical protocols of concentrating part of the work on a single designated replica and incorporates this principle in a simple two-stage pipelined design, with an efficient broadcast led by the designated replica, followed by an inexpensive binary agreement. The evaluation of our research prototype implementation and two real-world integrations in cryptocurrency ecosystems shows excellent performance, improving on the fastest protocol (Dumbo-NG) in terms of latency and displaying good performance under faults.
items.abstract_zh: 传统的拜占庭容错 (BFT) 状态机复制协议采用部分同步模型，导致领导副本驱动协议并在超时后被替换的设计。最近，我们目睹了异步 BFT 协议的激增，这些协议使用随机化来消除对消息传递时间的限制，从而使它们对不利的网络条件更具弹性。然而，现有的研究提案仍然未能获得实际采用，这可能是因为它们无法将良好的性能与易于理解和采用的简单设计结合起来。在本文中，我们提出了 Alea-BFT，一种简单且高效的异步 BFT 协议，该协议正在获得实际应用，即在以太坊分布式验证器中。 Alea-BFT 带来了经典协议的关键设计见解，即将部分工作集中在单个指定副本上，并将这一原则融入到简单的两级流水线设计中，由指定副本主导高效广播，然后是廉价的二进制协议。对我们的研究原型实施和加密货币生态系统中的两个现实世界集成的评估显示出出色的性能，在延迟方面改进了最快的协议（Dumbo-NG），并在故障下显示出良好的性能。

items.title: BBQ: A Fast and Scalable Integer Priority Queue for Hardware Packet Scheduling.
items.abstract: The need for fairness, strong isolation, and fine-grained control over network traffic in multi-tenant cloud settings has engendered a rich literature on packet scheduling in switches and programmable hardware. Recent proposals for hardware scheduling primitives (e.g., PIFO, PIEO, BMW-Tree) have enabled run-time programmable packet schedulers, considerably expanding the suite of scheduling policies that can be applied to network traffic. However, no existing solution can be practically deployed on modern switches and NICs because they either do not scale to the number of elements required by these devices or fail to deliver good throughput, thus requiring an impractical number of replicas. In this work, we ask: is it possible to achieve priority packet scheduling at line-rate while supporting a large number of flows? Our key insight is to leverage a scheduling primitive used previously in software – called Hierarchical Find First Set – and port this to a highly pipeline-parallel hardware design. We present the architecture and implementation of the Bitmapped Bucket Queue (BBQ), a hardware-based integer priority queue that supports a wide range of scheduling policies (via a PIFO-like abstraction). BBQ, for the first time, supports hundreds of thousands of concurrent flows while guaranteeing 100 Gbps line rate (148.8 Mpps) on FPGAs and 1 Tbps (1,488 Mpps) line rate on ASICs. We demonstrate this by implementing BBQ on a commodity FPGA where it is capable of supporting over 100K flows and 32K priorities at 300 MHz, 3× the packet rate of similar hardware priority queue designs. On ASIC, we can synthesize 100K elements at 3.1 GHz using a 7nm process.
items.abstract_zh: 多租户云设置中对网络流量的公平性、强隔离性和细粒度控制的需求催生了有关交换机和可编程硬件中数据包调度的丰富文献。最近提出的硬件调度原语（例如 PIFO、PIEO、BMW-Tree）已经启用了运行时可编程数据包调度程序，大大扩展了可应用于网络流量的调度策略套件。然而，现有的解决方案实际上无法部署在现代交换机和 NIC 上，因为它们要么无法扩展到这些设备所需的元素数量，要么无法提供良好的吞吐量，从而需要不切实际的副本数量。在这项工作中，我们要问：是否有可能在支持大量流的同时实现线速优先分组调度？我们的主要见解是利用以前在软件中使用的调度原语（称为“分层查找第一集”）并将其移植到高度管道并行的硬件设计中。我们介绍了位映射桶队列 (BBQ) 的架构和实现，这是一种基于硬件的整数优先级队列，支持广泛的调度策略（通过类似 PIFO 的抽象）。 BBQ 首次支持数十万并发流，同时保证 FPGA 上的 100 Gbps 线速 (148.8 Mpps) 和 ASIC 上的 1 Tbps (1,488 Mpps) 线速。我们通过在商用 FPGA 上实现 BBQ 来证明这一点，它能够在 300 MHz 下支持超过 100K 流和 32K 优先级，是类似硬件优先级队列设计的数据包速率的 3 倍。在 ASIC 上，我们可以使用 7nm 工艺在 3.1 GHz 下合成 100K 个元件。

items.title: Application-Level Service Assurance with 5G RAN Slicing.
items.abstract: This paper presents Zipper, a novel Radio Access Network (RAN) slicing system that provides assurances of application-level throughput and latency. Existing RAN slicing systems optimize for slice-level assurance, but these methods fail to provide predictable network performance to individual mobile apps. Extending the slice-level formulation to app-level introduces an intractable optimization problem with exploding state and action spaces. To simplify the search space, Zipper casts the problem as a model predictive controller, and explicitly tracks the network dynamics of each user. It uses an efficient algorithm to compute slice bandwidth allocations that meet each app's requirements. To assist operators with interfacing admission control policies, Zipper exposes a primitive that estimates if there is bandwidth available to accommodate an incoming app's requirements. We implemented Zipper on a production-class 5G virtual RAN testbed integrated with hooks to control slice bandwidth, and we evaluated it on real workloads, including video conferencing and virtual reality apps. On a representative RAN workload, our real-time implementation supports up to 200 apps and over 70 slices on a 100 MHz channel. Relative to a slice-level service assurance system, Zipper reduces tail throughput and latency violations, measured as a ratio of violation of the app's request, by 9×.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Zipper，一种新颖的无线接入网络 (RAN) 切片系统，可确保应用程序级吞吐量和延迟。现有的 RAN 切片系统针对切片级保证进行了优化，但这些方法无法为单个移动应用程序提供可预测的网络性能。将切片级公式扩展到应用程序级会带来一个棘手的优化问题，其中状态和操作空间会爆炸。为了简化搜索空间，Zipper 将问题转化为模型预测控制器，并显式跟踪每个用户的网络动态。它使用高效的算法来计算满足每个应用程序要求的切片带宽分配。为了帮助操作员连接准入控制策略，Zipper 公开了一个原语，用于估计是否有可用带宽来满足传入应用程序的要求。我们在生产级 5G 虚拟 RAN 测试台上实施了 Zipper，该测试台集成了用于控制切片带宽的钩子，并在实际工作负载（包括视频会议和虚拟现实应用程序）上对其进行了评估。在典型的 RAN 工作负载上，我们的实时实施支持 100 MHz 通道上多达 200 个应用程序和超过 70 个切片。相对于切片级服务保证系统，Zipper 将尾部吞吐量和延迟违规（以应用程序请求的违规比率来衡量）减少了 9 倍。

items.title: TANGO: Secure Collaborative Route Control across the Public Internet.
items.abstract: As the demands of modern latency-critical applications grow, major service providers are seeking to meet those demands by expanding their infrastructure to the edge and offering global connectivity through private WANs or Network-as-a-Service solutions. Unfortunately, these approaches are costly for smaller edge networks and lead to Internet consolidation. Worse, since the public Internet suffers from limited visibility and control over interdomain routing, smaller edges today are left with poor alternatives outside of joining the hypergiants. As a new alternative, we introduce TANGO, which enables smaller edges to expose paths and exert route control over the public Internet without relying on third parties or cooperation from the Internet core , to dynamically meet the performance needs of their customers. We show that, using collaboration, TANGO edges can jointly (i) expose more BGP-compliant wide-area paths via coordinated BGP advertisements; (ii) collect fine-grained, trustworthy telemetry using cryptographically-protected custom headers; and (iii) dynamically reroute traffic in the data plane. TANGO innovates in both the control and data planes, and runs on a programmable switch or in eBPF. Our Internet-scale experiments uncover rich path diversity, exposing paths that outperform the default BGP path 75-100% of the time for 20 edge pairs across multiple continents, while reducing latency by up to 39% compared to the default.
items.abstract_zh: 随着现代延迟关键型应用程序的需求不断增长，主要服务提供商正在寻求通过将其基础设施扩展到边缘并通过专用 WAN 或网络即服务解决方案提供全球连接来满足这些需求。不幸的是，这些方法对于较小的边缘网络来说成本高昂，并会导致互联网整合。更糟糕的是，由于公共互联网的可见性和对域间路由的控制有限，如今较小的边缘除了加入超级巨头之外没有其他选择。作为一种新的替代方案，我们引入了 TANGO，它使较小的边缘能够在公共互联网上公开路径并实施路由控制，而无需依赖第三方或互联网核心的合作，从而动态满足客户的性能需求。我们表明，通过协作，TANGO 边缘可以共同 (i) 通过协调的 BGP 通告公开更多符合 BGP 的广域路径； (ii) 使用受加密保护的自定义标头收集细粒度、值得信赖的遥测数据； (iii) 动态地重新路由数据平面中的流量。 TANGO 在控制平面和数据平面上都进行了创新，并在可编程交换机或 eBPF 上运行。我们的互联网规模实验揭示了丰富的路径多样性，对于跨多个大陆的 20 个边缘对，暴露的路径在 75-100% 的情况下优于默认 BGP 路径，同时与默认值相比，延迟降低高达 39%。

items.title: A High-Performance Design, Implementation, Deployment, and Evaluation of The Slim Fly Network.
items.abstract: Novel low-diameter network topologies such as Slim Fly (SF) offer significant cost and power advantages over the established Fat Tree, Clos, or Dragonfly. To spearhead the adoption of low-diameter networks, we design, implement, deploy, and evaluate the first real-world SF installation. We focus on deployment, management, and operational aspects of our test cluster with 200 servers and carefully analyze performance. We demonstrate techniques for simple cabling and cabling validation as well as a novel high-performance routing architecture for InfiniBand-based low-diameter topologies. Our real-world benchmarks show SF's strong performance for many modern workloads such as deep neural network training, graph analytics, or linear algebra kernels. SF outperforms non-blocking Fat Trees in scalability while offering comparable or better performance and lower cost for large network sizes. Our work can facilitate deploying SF while the associated (open-source) routing architecture is fully portable and applicable to accelerate any low-diameter interconnect.
items.abstract_zh: 与现有的 Fat Tree、Clos 或 Dragonfly 相比，Slim Fly (SF) 等新型低直径网络拓扑具有显着的成本和功耗优势。为了率先采用低直径网络，我们设计、实施、部署和评估第一个真实的 SF 安装。我们专注于拥有 200 台服务器的测试集群的部署、管理和操作方面，并仔细分析性能。我们演示了简单布线和布线验证技术以及基于 InfiniBand 的低直径拓扑的新型高性能路由架构。我们的实际基准测试显示 SF 对于许多现代工作负载（例如深度神经网络训练、图形分析或线性代数内核）具有强大的性能。 SF 在可扩展性方面优于非阻塞胖树，同时为大型网络规模提供相当或更好的性能和更低的成本。我们的工作可以促进 SF 的部署，同时相关的（开源）路由架构是完全可移植的，并且适用于加速任何低直径互连。

items.title: Catch Me If You Can: Laser Tethering with Highly Mobile Targets.
items.abstract: Conventional wisdom holds that laser-based systems cannot handle high mobility due to the strong directionality of laser light. We challenge this belief by presenting Lasertag, a generic framework that tightly integrates laser steering with optical tracking to maintain laser connectivity with high-velocity targets. Lasertag creates a constantly connected, laser-based tether between the Lasertag core unit and a remote target, irrespective of the target's movement. Key elements of Lasertag include (1) a novel optical design that superimposes the optical paths of a steerable laser beam and image sensor, (2) a lightweight optical tracking mechanism for passive retroreflective markers, (3) an automated mapping method to translate scene points to laser steering commands, and (4) a predictive steering algorithm that overcomes limited image sensor frame rates and laser steering delays to quadruple the steering rate up to 151Hz. Experiments with the Lasertag prototype demonstrate that, on average, Lasertag transmits a median 0.97 of laser energy with a median alignment offset of only 1.03cm for mobile targets accelerating up to 49m/s^2, with speeds up to 6.5m/s, and distances up to 6m (≈ 47°/s). Additional experiments translate the above performance to a 10^-8 median bit error rate across trials when transmitting a 1Gbps, on-off keying signal. Lasertag paves the way for various laser applications (e.g., communication, sensing, power delivery) in mobile settings. A demonstration video of Lasertag is available at: mobilex.cs.columbia.edu/lasertag
items.abstract_zh: 传统观点认为，由于激光的强方向性，基于激光的系统无法处理高移动性。我们通过推出 Lasertag 来挑战这一信念，这是一个通用框架，它将激光转向与光学跟踪紧密集成，以保持激光与高速目标的连接。 Lasertag 在 Lasertag 核心单元和远程目标之间创建了一条持续连接的、基于激光的系绳，无论目标如何移动。 Lasertag 的关键要素包括 (1) 一种新颖的光学设计，叠加了可操纵激光束和图像传感器的光路，(2) 用于无源回射标记的轻型光学跟踪机制，(3) 一种将场景点转换为激光转向命令的自动映射方法，以及 (4) 一种预测转向算法，该算法克服了有限的图像传感器帧速率和激光转向延迟，将转向速率提高了四倍，高达 151Hz。 Lasertag 原型的实验表明，平均而言，Lasertag 传输的激光能量中位数为 0.97，对于加速高达 49m/s^2、速度高达 6.5m/s、距离高达 6m (≈ 47°/s) 的移动目标，中值对准偏移仅为 1.03cm。当传输 1Gbps 开关键控信号时，其他实验将上述性能转化为 10^-8 的中位误码率。 Lasertag 为移动环境中的各种激光应用（例如通信、传感、电力传输）铺平了道路。 Lasertag 的演示视频可在以下位置获取：mobilex.cs.columbia.edu/lasertag

items.title: mmComb: High-speed mmWave Commodity WiFi Backscatter.
items.abstract: High-speed connectivity is key to enabling a range of novel IoT applications. Millimeter-wave (mmWave) backscatter has emerged as a possible solution to create high-speed, low-power IoT networks. However, state-of-the-art mmWave backscatter systems are costly due to the need for dedicated mmWave reader devices. This paper presents mmComb, a mmWave backscatter system that is built to operate on commodity mmWave WiFi. mmComb is developed with the aim that mmWave backscatter tags can be directly integrated into 802.11ad/ay mmWave WiFi networks. mmComb makes two key contributions. First, We propose a technique to communicate with backscatter tags using existing beamforming protocol frames from mmWave WiFi devices, without any protocol modification. Second, we develop a self-interference suppression solution that intelligently uses receive beamforming to extract weak mmWave backscatter signal even in indoor multipath-rich channels. We implement our solution with a tag prototype and 60 GHz commodity WiFi devices. Our results show that mmComb can achieve a maximum data rate of 55 Mbps just by leveraging 802.11ad/ay control frames while consuming 87.3 μW with BER lower than 10^−3 up to 5.5 m range.
items.abstract_zh: 高速连接是实现一系列新颖的物联网应用的关键。毫米波 (mmWave) 反向散射已成为创建高速、低功耗物联网网络的可能解决方案。然而，由于需要专用的毫米波读取器设备，最先进的毫米波反向散射系统成本高昂。本文介绍了 mmComb，这是一种毫米波反向散射系统，专为在商用毫米波 WiFi 上运行而构建。 mmComb 的开发目标是将毫米波反向散射标签直接集成到 802.11ad/ay 毫米波 WiFi 网络中。 mmComb 做出了两个关键贡献。首先，我们提出了一种使用毫米波 WiFi 设备现有波束成形协议帧与反向散射标签进行通信的技术，无需任何协议修改。其次，我们开发了一种自干扰抑制解决方案，即使在室内多径丰富的信道中，也可以智能地使用接收波束成形来提取微弱的毫米波反向散射信号。我们使用标签原型和 60 GHz 商用 WiFi 设备来实施我们的解决方案。我们的结果表明，mmComb 只需利用 802.11ad/ay 控制帧即可实现 55 Mbps 的最大数据速率，同时消耗 87.3 μW，且在 5.5 m 范围内 BER 低于 10^−3。

items.title: Precise Data Center Traffic Engineering with Constrained Hardware Resources.
items.abstract: Data center traffic engineering (TE) routes flows over a set of available paths following custom weight distributions to achieve optimal load balancing or flow throughput. However, as a result of hardware constraints, it is challenging, and often impossible for larger data center networks, to precisely implement the TE weight distributions on the data plane switches. The resulting precision loss in the TE implementation causes load imbalances that can result in congestion and traffic loss. Instead of treating all flows equally, we adapt the hardware resource allocation to a flow’s traffic volume and its contribution to the overall precision loss. We intelligently prune select ports in weight distributions and merge identical distributions to free up hardware resources. Evaluation using realistic traffic loads shows that our techniques approximate ideal TE solutions under various scenarios within 7% error, compared to a 67% error for today’s state-of-the-art approach. In addition, our design avoids traffic loss triggered by switch rule overflow. Finally, the execution time is 10× faster than the current approach.
items.abstract_zh: 数据中心流量工程 (TE) 按照自定义权重分布在一组可用路径上路由流量，以实现最佳负载平衡或流量吞吐量。然而，由于硬件限制，对于大型数据中心网络来说，在数据平面交换机上精确实现 TE 权重分布具有挑战性，而且通常是不可能的。 TE 实施中由此产生的精度损失会导致负载不平衡，进而导致拥塞和流量丢失。我们没有平等地对待所有流，而是根据流的流量及其对整体精度损失的贡献来调整硬件资源分配。我们智能地修剪权重分布中的选定端口并合并相同的分布以释放硬件资源。使用实际流量负载进行的评估表明，我们的技术在各种场景下都接近理想的 TE 解决方案，误差在 7% 以内，而当今最先进的方法的误差为 67%。此外，我们的设计避免了交换机规则溢出引发的流量丢失。最后，执行时间比当前方法快 10 倍。

items.title: GRACE: Loss-Resilient Real-Time Video through Neural Codecs.
items.abstract: In real-time video communication, retransmitting lost packets over high-latency networks is not viable due to strict latency requirements. To counter packet losses without retransmission, two primary strategies are employed—encoder-based forward error correction (FEC) and decoder-based error concealment. The former encodes data with redundancy before transmission, yet determining the optimal redundancy level in advance proves challenging. The latter reconstructs video from partially received frames, but dividing a frame into independently coded partitions inherently compromises compression efficiency, and the lost information cannot be effectively recovered by the decoder without adapting the encoder. We present a loss-resilient real-time video system called GRACE, which preserves the user’s quality of experience (QoE) across a wide range of packet losses through a new neural video codec. Central to GRACE’s enhanced loss resilience is its joint training of the neural encoder and decoder under a spectrum of simulated packet losses . In lossless scenarios, GRACE achieves video quality on par with conventional codecs (e.g., H.265). As the loss rate escalates, GRACE exhibits a more graceful, less pronounced decline in quality, consistently outperforming other loss-resilient schemes. Through extensive evaluation on various videos and real network traces, we demonstrate that GRACE reduces undecodable frames by 95% and stall duration by 90% compared with FEC, while markedly boosting video quality over error concealment methods. In a user study with 240 crowdsourced participants and 960 subjective ratings, GRACE registers a 38% higher mean opinion score (MOS) than other baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 在实时视频通信中，由于严格的延迟要求，通过高延迟网络重传丢失的数据包是不可行的。为了在不重传的情况下防止数据包丢失，采用了两种主要策略：基于编码器的前向纠错 (FEC) 和基于解码器的错误隐藏。前者在传输前对数据进行冗余编码，但提前确定最佳冗余级别具有挑战性。后者从部分接收的帧中重建视频，但将帧划分为独立编码的分区本质上会损害压缩效率，并且在不调整编码器的情况下解码器无法有效恢复丢失的信息。我们提出了一种名为 GRACE 的抗丢失实时视频系统，它通过新的神经视频编解码器在各种数据包丢失情况下保持用户的体验质量 (QoE)。 GRACE 增强的丢包恢复能力的核心是在一系列模拟丢包情况下对神经编码器和解码器进行联合训练。在无损场景中，GRACE 可以实现与传统编解码器（例如 H.265）相当的视频质量。随着丢失率的上升，GRACE 表现出更优雅、更不明显的质量下降，始终优于其他抗丢失方案。通过对各种视频和真实网络跟踪的广泛评估，我们证明与 FEC 相比，GRACE 减少了 95% 的不可解码帧，并将停顿持续时间减少了 90%，同时与错误隐藏方法相比，显着提高了视频质量。在一项包含 240 名众包参与者和 960 项主观评分的用户研究中，GRACE 的平均意见得分 (MOS) 比其他基线高 38%。

items.title: LDB: An Efficient Latency Profiling Tool for Multithreaded Applications.
items.abstract: Maintaining low tail latency is critical for the efficiency and performance of large-scale datacenter systems. Software bugs that cause tail latency problems, however, are notoriously difficult to debug. We present LDB, a new latency profiling tool that aims to overcome this challenge by precisely identifying the specific functions that are responsible for tail latency anomalies. LDB observes the latency of all functions in a running program. It uses a novel, software-only technique called stack sampling, where a busy-spinning stack scanner thread polls lightweight metadata recorded in the call stack, shifting tracing costs away from program threads. In addition, LDB uses event tagging to record requests, inter-thread synchronization, and context switching. This can be used, for example, to generate per-request timelines and to find the root cause of complex tail latency problems such as lock contention in multi-threaded programs. We evaluate LDB with three datacenter applications, finding latency problems in each. Our results further show that LDB produces actionable insights, has low overhead, and can rapidly analyze recordings, making it feasible to use in production settings.
items.abstract_zh: 保持低尾部延迟对于大规模数据中心系统的效率和性能至关重要。然而，导致尾部延迟问题的软件错误非常难以调试。我们推出了 LDB，这是一种新的延迟分析工具，旨在通过精确识别导致尾部延迟异常的特定函数来克服这一挑战。 LDB 观察正在运行的程序中所有函数的延迟。它使用一种称为堆栈采样的新颖的纯软件技术，其中繁忙的堆栈扫描器线程轮询调用堆栈中记录的轻量级元数据，从而将跟踪成本从程序线程中转移出来。此外，LDB使用事件标记来记录请求、线程间同步和上下文切换。例如，这可以用于生成每个请求的时间线并查找复杂尾部延迟问题（例如多线程程序中的锁争用）的根本原因。我们使用三个数据中心应用程序评估 LDB，发现每个应用程序中的延迟问题。我们的结果进一步表明，LDB 可以产生可操作的见解，开销较低，并且可以快速分析记录，使其可以在生产环境中使用。

items.title: VILAM: Infrastructure-assisted 3D Visual Localization and Mapping for Autonomous Driving.
items.abstract: Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) presents a promising avenue for fulfilling the essential perception and localization tasks in autonomous driving systems using cost-effective visual sensors. Nevertheless, existing visual SLAM frameworks often suffer from substantial cumulative errors and performance degradation in complicated driving scenarios. In this paper, we propose VILAM, a novel framework that leverages intelligent roadside infrastructures to realize high-precision and globally consistent localization and mapping on autonomous vehicles. The key idea of VILAM is to utilize the precise scene measurement from the infrastructure as global references to correct errors in the local map constructed by the vehicle. To overcome the unique deformation in the 3D local map to align it with the infrastructure measurement, VILAM proposes a novel elastic point cloud registration method that enables independent optimization of different parts of the local map. Moreover, VILAM adopts a lightweight factor graph construction and optimization to first correct the vehicle trajectory, and thus reconstruct the consistent global map efficiently. We implement the VILAM end-to-end on a real-world smart lamppost testbed in multiple road scenarios. Extensive experiment results show that VILAM can achieve decimeter-level localization and mapping accuracy with consumer-level onboard cameras and is robust under diverse road scenarios. A video demo of VILAM on our real-world testbed is available at https://youtu.be/lTlqDNipDVE .
items.abstract_zh: 视觉同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 为使用经济高效的视觉传感器完成自动驾驶系统中的基本感知和定位任务提供了一种有前途的途径。然而，现有的视觉SLAM框架在复杂的驾驶场景中经常会出现大量的累积误差和性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了 VILAM，这是一种利用智能路边基础设施实现自动驾驶车辆高精度且全球一致的定位和地图绘制的新颖框架。 VILAM 的关键思想是利用基础设施的精确场景测量作为全局参考来纠正车辆构建的局部地图中的错误。为了克服 3D 局部地图中的独特变形，使其与基础设施测量对齐，VILAM 提出了一种新颖的弹性点云配准方法，可以对局部地图的不同部分进行独立优化。此外，VILAM采用轻量级因子图构建和优化，首先校正车辆轨迹，从而有效地重建一致的全局地图。我们在多个道路场景的真实智能灯柱测试台上实现了 VILAM 端到端。大量实验结果表明，VILAM可以通过消费级车载摄像头实现分米级的定位和建图精度，并且在多种道路场景下具有鲁棒性。我们的真实测试平台上的 VILAM 视频演示请访问 https://youtu.be/lTlqDNipDVE 。

items.title: RFID+: Spatially Controllable Identification of UHF RFIDs via Controlled Magnetic Fields.
items.abstract: In the fast-paced landscape of UHF RFID technology, achieving precise spatial-selective identification is of critical importance in the logistics and retail domain. This work introduces RFID+, a magnetically-driven UHF RFID system that leverages the matching loops of commercial-off-the-shelf UHF RFID tags for efficient energy harvesting from tailored magnetic fields. The RFID+ delivers a level of spatial precision comparable to that of HF NFC systems, effectively mitigating issues of miss-reading and cross-reading. Our primary contributions reside in the development of a specialized multi-turn, capacitor-segmented coil antenna and an innovative fast inventory algorithm. The RFID+ seamlessly integrates traditional radiative coupling with the innovative magnetic coupling in UHF RFID systems, bolstering their overall performance and efficiency. Real-world pilot studies in warehouses and logistics settings reveal that RFID+ significantly diminishes the miss-reading rate from 22.9% down to a remarkable 1.06%, while entirely eliminating cross-reading challenges. Moreover, our RFID+ variant demonstrates better resilience against materials traditionally challenging for UHF RFID, such as water bottles and containers. These advancements make RFID+ exceedingly relevant for practical applications in logistical networks.
items.abstract_zh: 在 UHF RFID 技术的快节奏环境中，实现精确的空间选择性识别对于物流和零售领域至关重要。这项工作介绍了 RFID+，这是一种磁力驱动的 UHF RFID 系统，它利用商用现成 UHF RFID 标签的匹配环路，从定制的磁场中高效收集能量。 RFID+ 提供与 HF NFC 系统相当的空间精度，有效减少误读和交叉读取问题。我们的主要贡献在于开发了专门的多匝、电容器分段线圈天线和创新的快速库存算法。 RFID+ 将传统的辐射耦合与 UHF RFID 系统中的创新磁耦合无缝集成，提高了其整体性能和效率。仓库和物流环境中的实际试点研究表明，RFID+ 将误读率从 22.9% 显着降低至 1.06%，同时完全消除了交叉阅读挑战。此外，我们的 RFID+ 变体对传统上对 UHF RFID 具有挑战性的材料（例如水瓶和容器）表现出更好的弹性。这些进步使得 RFID+ 与物流网络的实际应用极为相关。

items.title: A large-scale deployment of DCTCP.
items.abstract: This paper describes the process and operational experiences of deploying the Data Center TCP (DCTCP) protocol in a large-scale data center network. In contrast to legacy congestion control protocols that rely on loss as the primary signal of congestion, DCTCP signals in-network congestion (based on queue occupancy) to senders and adjusts the sending rate proportional to the level of congestion. At the time of our deployment, this protocol was well-studied and fairly established with proven efficiency gains in other networks. As expected, we also observed improved performance, and notably decreased packet losses, compared to legacy protocols in our data centers. Perhaps unexpectedly, however, we faced numerous hurdles in rolling out DCTCP; we chronicle these unexpected challenges, ranging from its unfairness (to other classes of traffic) to implementation bugs. We close by discussing some of the open research questions and challenges.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了在大规模数据中心网络中部署数据中心TCP（DCTCP）协议的流程和操作经验。与依赖丢失作为主要拥塞信号的传统拥塞控制协议相比，DCTCP 向发送方发出网络内拥塞信号（基于队列占用率），并根据拥塞程度按比例调整发送速率。在我们部署时，该协议经过了充分研究并相当成熟，并在其他网络中证明了效率提升。正如预期的那样，与我们数据中心的传统协议相比，我们还观察到性能有所提高，并且数据包丢失显着减少。然而，也许出乎意料的是，我们在推出 DCTCP 时遇到了许多障碍；我们记录了这些意想不到的挑战，从其不公平性（对其他类别的流量）到实施错误。我们最后讨论一些开放的研究问题和挑战。

items.title: Orthcatter: High-throughput In-band OFDM Backscatter with Over-the-Air Code Division.
items.abstract: The existing ambient backscatter systems suffer from either more spectrum utilization or low throughput. we propose Orthcatter, the first in-band OFDM backscatter system that provides a higher throughput while consuming fewer spectrum resources. Our key innovation is the designed over-the-air code division technique that enables the cancellation of the co-channel interferences, solving the core challenge of the in-band backscatter communication. Unlike the common code-division systems that generate orthogonal codewords locally, we construct the quasi-orthogonal backscatter codewords by swapping the subcarriers of each excitation OFDM symbol and concrete this design passively with a double side-band symbol construction method. Armed with these quasi-orthogonal codewords, we design a two-step interference cancellation scheme, significantly improving reliability. We prototype and test Orthcatter. The results show that Orthcatter can achieve throughput of 248kbps and a BER of 10^-4 under OFDM WiFi exciter, improving by over 4.6× and 300× compared with the state-of-the-art in-band backscatter system. Our throughput and BER can even be 11kbps higher and 59× better than the prior side-band backscatter systems, and the exciter-to-tag communication range is 3× of prior OFDM backscatter systems.
items.abstract_zh: 现有的环境反向散射系统要么频谱利用率高，要么吞吐量低。我们提出了 Orthcatter，这是第一个带内 OFDM 反向散射系统，可提供更高的吞吐量，同时消耗更少的频谱资源。我们的关键创新是设计的无线码分技术，能够消除同信道干扰，解决带内反向散射通信的核心挑战。与本地生成正交码字的常见码分系统不同，我们通过交换每个激励 OFDM 符号的子载波来构造准正交反向散射码字，并通过双边带符号构造方法被动地具体化该设计。借助这些准正交码字，我们设计了两步干扰消除方案，显着提高了可靠性。我们制作原型并测试 Orthcatter。结果表明，Orthcatter 在 OFDM WiFi 激励器下可实现 248kbps 的吞吐量和 10^-4 的 BER，与最先进的带内反向散射系统相比分别提高了 4.6 倍和 300 倍以上。我们的吞吐量和 BER 甚至可以比以前的边带反向散射系统高 11kbps 和 59 倍，并且激励器到标签的通信范围是以前 OFDM 反向散射系统的 3 倍。

items.title: Parcae: Proactive, Liveput-Optimized DNN Training on Preemptible Instances.
items.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are becoming progressively large and costly to train. This paper aims to reduce DNN training costs by leveraging preemptible instances on modern clouds, which can be allocated at a much lower price when idle but may be preempted by the cloud provider at any time. Prior work that supports DNN training on preemptive instances employs a reactive approach to handling instance preemptions and allocations after their occurrence, which only achieves limited performance and scalability. We present Parcae, a system that enables cheap, fast, and scalable DNN training on preemptible instances by proactively adjusting the parallelization strategy of a DNN training job to adapt to predicted resource changes before instance preemptions and allocations really happen, which significantly reduces the cost of handling these events. Parcae optimizes liveput , a novel metric that measures the expected training throughput of a DNN job under various possible preemption scenarios. Compared to existing reactive, throughput-optimized systems, Parcae's proactive, live-optimized solution considers both the throughput of a job and its robustness under preemptions. To optimize liveput, Parcae supports lightweight instance migration and uses an availability predictor to forecast future preemptions. It then uses a liveput optimizer to discover an optimal strategy to parallelize DNN training under predicted preemptions. We evaluate Parcae on a variety of DNNs and preemption traces and show that Parcae outperforms existing spot-instance DNN training systems by up to 10×. More importantly, Parcae achieves near-optimal performance for training large DNNs under frequent preemptions, in which case existing approaches cannot make any progress.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 变得越来越大，训练成本也越来越高。本文旨在通过利用现代云上的可抢占实例来降低 DNN 训练成本，这些实例在空闲时可以以低得多的价格分配，但可以随时被云提供商抢占。先前支持对抢占式实例进行 DNN 训练的工作采用反应式方法来处理实例抢占和分配，但这种方法只能实现有限的性能和可扩展性。我们推出了 Parcae，这是一个系统，通过主动调整 DNN 训练作业的并行化策略，在实例抢占和分配真正发生之前适应预测的资源变化，从而在可抢占实例上实现廉价、快速且可扩展的 DNN 训练，从而显着降低处理这些事件的成本。 Parcae 优化了 liveput ，这是一种新颖的指标，用于测量 DNN 作业在各种可能的抢占场景下的预期训练吞吐量。与现有的反应式吞吐量优化系统相比，Parcae 的主动式实时优化解决方案同时考虑了作业的吞吐量及其在抢占情况下的鲁棒性。为了优化 liveput，Parcae 支持轻量级实例迁移，并使用可用性预测器来预测未来的抢占。然后，它使用 liveput 优化器来发现在预测抢占情况下并行化 DNN 训练的最佳策略。我们在各种 DNN 和抢占轨迹上评估 Parcae，结果表明 Parcae 的性能比现有的现货 DNN 训练系统高出 10 倍。更重要的是，Parcae 在频繁抢占的情况下训练大型 DNN 实现了近乎最佳的性能，在这种情况下，现有方法无法取得任何进展。

items.title: Passengers' Safety Matters: Experiences of Deploying a Large-Scale Indoor Delivery Monitoring System.
items.abstract: Delivering goods to many indoor stores poses significant safety issues, as heavy, high-stacked packages carried on delivery trolleys may fall and hurt passersby. This paper reports our experiences of developing and operating DeMo, a practical system for real-time monitoring of indoor delivery. DeMo attaches sensors to trolleys and analyzes the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) and Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) readings to detect delivery violations such as speeding and using non-designated delivery paths. Differing from typical indoor localization applications, DeMo overcomes unique challenges such as unique sensor placement and complex electromagnetic characteristics underground. In particular, DeMo adapts the classical logarithmic radio signal model to support fingerprint-free localization, drastically lowering the deployment and maintenance cost. DeMo has been operating since May 2020, covering more than 200 shops with 42,248 deliveries (3521.4 km) across 12 subway stations in Hong Kong. DeMo's 3-year operation witnessed a significant violation rate drop, from 19% (May 2020) to 2.7% (Mar 2023).
items.abstract_zh: 向许多室内商店运送货物会带来严重的安全问题，因为运送手推车上装载的重型、高堆包裹可能会掉落并伤害路人。本文报告了我们开发和运营 DeMo 的经验，DeMo 是一个用于室内交付实时监控的实用系统。 Demo 将传感器安装到手推车上，并分析惯性测量单元 (IMU) 和蓝牙低功耗 (BLE) 读数，以检测超速和使用非指定配送路径等配送违规行为。与典型的室内定位应用不同，Demo克服了独特的挑战，例如独特的传感器放置和地下复杂的电磁特性。特别是，Demo采用经典的对数无线电信号模型，支持无指纹定位，大大降低了部署和维护成本。 DeMo自2020年5月开始运营，覆盖香港12个地铁站的200多家商店，交付42,248次（3521.4公里）。 Demo 的三年运营中，违规率大幅下降，从 19%（2020 年 5 月）降至 2.7%（2023 年 3 月）。

items.title: Empower Programmable Pipeline for Advanced Stateful Packet Processing.
items.abstract: Programmable pipeline offers flexible and high-throughput packet processing capability, but only to some extent. When more advanced dataplane functions beyond basic packet processing and forwarding are desired, the pipeline becomes handicapped. The fundamental reason is that most stateful operations require backward cross-stage data passing and pipeline stalling for state update and consistency, which are anomalous to a standard pipeline. To solve the problem, we augment the pipeline with a low-cost, yet fast side ring to facilitate the backward data passing. We further apply the speculative execution technique to avoid pipeline stalling. The resulting architecture, RAPID, supports native and generic stateful function programming using the enhanced P4 language. We build an FPGA-based prototype to evaluate the system, and a software emulator to assess the cost and performance of an ASIC implementation. We realize several stateful applications enabled by RAPID to show how it extends a programmable dataplane's potential to a new level.
items.abstract_zh: 可编程管道提供灵活和高吞吐量的数据包处理能力，但只是在一定程度上。当需要超出基本数据包处理和转发的更高级数据平面功能时，管道就会受到阻碍。根本原因是大多数有状态操作需要向后跨阶段数据传递和管道停顿以实现状态更新和一致性，这对于标准管道来说是异常的。为了解决这个问题，我们用低成本但快速的侧环来增强管道，以促进向后数据传递。我们进一步应用推测执行技术来避免管道停顿。由此产生的架构 RAPID 支持使用增强型 P4 语言的本机和通用有状态函数编程。我们构建了一个基于 FPGA 的原型来评估系统，并构建了一个软件仿真器来评估 ASIC 实施的成本和性能。我们实现了 RAPID 支持的多个有状态应用程序，以展示它如何将可编程数据平面的潜力扩展到新的水平。

items.title: LitePred: Transferable and Scalable Latency Prediction for Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search.
items.abstract: Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has demonstrated success in automating the design of affordable deep neural networks (DNNs) for edge platforms by incorporating inference latency in the search process. However, accurately and efficiently predicting DNN inference latency on diverse edge platforms remains a significant challenge. Current approaches require several days to construct new latency predictors for each one platform, which is prohibitively time-consuming and impractical. In this paper, we propose LitePred, a lightweight approach for accurately predicting DNN inference latency on new platforms with minimal adaptation data by transferring existing predictors. LitePred builds on two key techniques: (i) a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) data sampler to sample high-quality training and adaptation data that conforms to the model distributions in NAS search spaces, overcoming the out-of-distribution challenge; and (ii) a latency distribution-based similarity detection method to identify the most similar pre-existing latency predictors for the new target platform, reducing adaptation data required while achieving high prediction accuracy. Extensive experiments on 85 edge platforms and 6 NAS search spaces demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, achieving an average latency prediction accuracy of 99.3% with less than an hour of adaptation cost. Compared with SOTA platform-specific methods, LitePred achieves up to 5.3% higher accuracy with a significant 50.6× reduction in profiling cost. Code and predictors are available at https://github.com/microsoft/Moonlit/tree/main/LitePred .
items.abstract_zh: 硬件感知神经架构搜索 (NAS) 通过在搜索过程中纳入推理延迟，成功地为边缘平台实现了经济实惠的深度神经网络 (DNN) 的自动化设计。然而，准确有效地预测不同边缘平台上的 DNN 推理延迟仍然是一个重大挑战。当前的方法需要几天的时间来为每个平台构建新的延迟预测器，这是非常耗时且不切实际的。在本文中，我们提出了 LitePred，这是一种轻量级方法，通过转移现有预测器，以最少的适应数据准确预测新平台上的 DNN 推理延迟。 LitePred 基于两项关键技术：(i) 变分自动编码器 (VAE) 数据采样器，用于采样符合 NAS 搜索空间中模型分布的高质量训练和适应数据，克服分布外的挑战； (ii)基于延迟分布的相似性检测方法，用于识别新目标平台最相似的预先存在的延迟预测器，减少所需的适应数据，同时实现高预测精度。在 85 个边缘平台和 6 个 NAS 搜索空间上进行的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，以不到一小时的适应成本实现了 99.3% 的平均延迟预测精度。与 SOTA 平台特定方法相比，LitePred 的准确度提高了 5.3%，分析成本显着降低了 50.6 倍。代码和预测器可在 https://github.com/microsoft/Moonlit/tree/main/LitePred 获取。

items.title: Making Kernel Bypass Practical for the Cloud with Junction.
items.abstract: Kernel bypass systems have demonstrated order of magnitude improvements in throughput and tail latency for network-intensive applications relative to traditional operating systems (OSes). To achieve such excellent performance, however, they rely on dedicated resources ( e.g., spinning cores, pinned memory) and require application rewriting. This is unattractive to cloud operators because they aim to densely pack applications, and rewriting cloud software requires a massive investment of valuable developer time. For both reasons, kernel bypass, as it exists, is impractical for the cloud. In this paper, we show these compromises are not necessary to unlock the full benefits of kernel bypass. We present Junction, the first kernel bypass system that can pack thousands of instances on a machine while providing compatibility with unmodified Linux applications. Junction achieves high density through several advanced NIC features that reduce pinned memory and the overhead of monitoring large numbers of queues. It maintains compatibility with minimal overhead through optimizations that exploit a shared address space with the application. Junction scales to 19–62× more instances than existing kernel bypass systems and can achieve similar or better performance without code changes. Furthermore, Junction delivers significant performance benefits to applications previously unsupported by kernel bypass, including those that depend on runtime systems like Go, Java, Node, and Python. In a comparison to native Linux, Junction increases throughput by 1.6–7.0× while using 1.2–3.8× less cores across seven applications.
items.abstract_zh: 与传统操作系统 (OS) 相比，内核旁路系统已证明网络密集型应用程序的吞吐量和尾部延迟有数量级的改进。然而，为了实现如此出色的性能，它们依赖于专用资源（例如，旋转核心、固定内存）并且需要重写应用程序。这对于云运营商来说没有吸引力，因为他们的目标是密集打包应用程序，而重写云软件需要投入大量宝贵的开发时间。由于这两个原因，现有的内核旁路对于云来说是不切实际的。在本文中，我们展示了这些妥协对于释放内核绕过的全部优势来说并不是必要的。我们推出了 Junction，这是第一个内核旁路系统，可以在一台机器上打包数千个实例，同时提供与未修改的 Linux 应用程序的兼容性。 Junction 通过多种先进的 NIC 功能实现高密度，这些功能减少了固定内存和监视大量队列的开销。它通过利用与应用程序共享的地址空间的优化，以最小的开销保持兼容性。 Junction 的实例数量比现有内核旁路系统多 19-62 倍，并且无需更改代码即可实现类似或更好的性能。此外，Junction 为以前不受内核旁路支持的应用程序提供了显着的性能优势，包括那些依赖于 Go、Java、Node 和 Python 等运行时系统的应用程序。与原生 Linux 相比，Junction 将吞吐量提高了 1.6–7.0 倍，同时在 7 个应用程序中使用的内核数减少了 1.2–3.8 倍。

items.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Cyberattacks: Dangling Resources Abuse on Cloud Platforms.
items.abstract: Recent works showed that it is feasible to hijack resources on cloud platforms. In such hijacks, attackers can take over released resources that belong to legitimate organizations. It was proposed that adversaries could abuse these resources to carry out attacks against customers of the hijacked services, e.g., through malware distribution. However, to date, no research has confirmed the existence of these attacks. We identify, for the first time, real-life hijacks of cloud resources. This yields a number of surprising and important insights. First, contrary to previous assumption that attackers primarily target IP addresses, our findings reveal that the type of resource is not the main consideration in a hijack. Attackers focus on hijacking records that allow them to determine the resource by entering freetext. The costs and overhead of hijacking such records are much lower than those of hijacking IP addresses, which are randomly selected from a large pool. Second, identifying hijacks poses a substantial challenge. Monitoring resource changes, e.g., changes in content, is insufficient, since such changes could also be legitimate. Retrospective analysis of digital assets to identify hijacks is also arduous due to the immense volume of data involved and the absence of indicators to search for. To address this challenge, we develop a novel approach that involves analyzing data from diverse sources to effectively differentiate between malicious and legitimate modifications. Our analysis has revealed 20,904 instances of hijacked resources on popular cloud platforms. While some hijacks are short-lived (up to 15 days), 1/3 persist for more than 65 days. We study how attackers abuse the hijacked resources and find that, in contrast to the threats considered in previous work, the majority of the abuse (75%) is blackhat search engine optimization. We also find fraudulent certificates and stolen cookies. We cluster the abuse resources and abuse content to identify about 1,800 individual attacking infrastructures.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明劫持云平台上的资源是可行的。在此类劫持中，攻击者可以接管属于合法组织的已释放资源。有人提出，对手可以滥用这些资源，对被劫持服务的客户进行攻击，例如通过恶意软件分发。然而，迄今为止，还没有研究证实这些攻击的存在。我们首次发现现实生活中对云资源的劫持。这产生了许多令人惊讶且重要的见解。首先，与之前攻击者主要针对 IP 地址的假设相反，我们的研究结果表明，资源类型并不是劫持的主要考虑因素。攻击者专注于劫持记录，使他们能够通过输入自由文本来确定资源。劫持此类记录的成本和开销远低于劫持 IP 地址，因为 IP 地址是从大池中随机选择的。其次，识别劫持是一个巨大的挑战。监视资源变化（例如内容变化）是不够的，因为此类变化也可能是合法的。由于涉及大量数据且缺乏可供搜索的指标，对数字资产进行回顾性分析以识别劫持也很困难。为了应对这一挑战，我们开发了一种新颖的方法，该方法涉及分析来自不同来源的数据，以有效区分恶意修改和合法修改。我们的分析显示，流行云平台上有 20,904 个资源被劫持的实例。虽然有些劫持是短暂的（最多 15 天），但 1/3 的劫持持续时间超过 65 天。我们研究了攻击者如何滥用被劫持的资源，发现与之前的工作中考虑的威胁相比，大多数滥用（75％）是黑帽搜索引擎优化。我们还发现欺诈性证书和被盗的 cookie。我们对滥用资源和滥用内容进行聚类，以识别大约 1,800 个攻击基础设施的个人。

items.title: Crescent: Emulating Heterogeneous Production Network at Scale.
items.abstract: This paper presents the design, implementation, evaluation, and deployment of Crescent , ByteDance’s network emulation platform, for preventing change-induced network incidents. Inspired by prior art such as CrystalNet, Crescent achieves high fidelity by running switch vendor images inside containers. But, we explore a different route to scaling up the emulator with unique challenges. First, we analyze our past network incidents to reveal the difficulty in identifying a safe emulation boundary. Instead of emulating the entire network, we exploit the inherent symmetry and modularity of data center network architectures to strike a balance between coverage and resource cost. Second, we study the node-to-host assignment by formulating it as a graph partitioning problem. Evaluation results show that our partitioning algorithm reduces the testbed bootup time by up to 20× compared with random partitioning. Third, we developed an incremental approach to modify the emulated network on the fly. This approach can be 30× faster than creating a new testbed of the same scale. Crescent has been actively used for three and a half years, which led to a significant reduction in change-induced network incidents. We also share Crescent ’s success in many other use cases and the critical lessons learned from its deployment.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了字节跳动网络仿真平台 Crescent 的设计、实现、评估和部署，以防止变化引起的网络事件。受 CrystalNet 等现有技术的启发，Crescent 通过在容器内运行交换机供应商映像来实现高保真度。但是，我们探索了一条不同的途径来扩展模拟器，并面临独特的挑战。首先，我们分析过去的网络事件，以揭示识别安全模拟边界的困难。我们没有模拟整个网络，而是利用数据中心网络架构固有的对称性和模块化来在覆盖范围和资源成本之间取得平衡。其次，我们通过将节点到主机分配表示为图划分问题来研究节点到主机的分配。评估结果表明，与随机分区相比，我们的分区算法将测试床启动时间缩短了 20 倍。第三，我们开发了一种增量方法来动态修改模拟网络。这种方法比创建相同规模的新测试台快 30 倍。 Crescent 已被积极使用了三年半，导致变更引发的网络事件显着减少。我们还分享了 Crescent 在许多其他用例中的成功以及从其部署中汲取的重要经验教训。

items.title: Sirius: Composing Network Function Chains into P4-Capable Edge Gateways.
items.abstract: Alibaba Cloud designs and deploys P4-capable gateway to accelerate the processing of the diverse business traffics in the edge cloud. Since the programmable ASIC in the gateway only accepts a monolithic, pipelined P4 program, the dozens network function chains for different business traffics have to be composed into one. This is non-trivial due to the contention between the complexity of network function chains and the limited resource in the programmable ASIC. In this paper, we present Sirius, a system that automates network function chain composition process. Sirius synthesizes tables to identify which business traffic the input packet belongs to, pipelines loops in the merged network function graph via recirculations, and partitions the graph between programmable ASIC and CPU when the required memory consumption exceeds the ASIC’s capability. So far, Sirius has automated network function arrangement in hundreds of gateways, and has effectively decreased our programmers’ workload by three orders of magnitude, from weeks to minutes.
items.abstract_zh: 阿里云设计并部署了支持P4的网关，以加速边缘云多样化业务流量的处理。由于网关中的可编程ASIC只接受单片、流水线的P4程序，因此必须将针对不同业务流量的数十个网络功能链组合成一个。由于网络功能链的复杂性和可编程 ASIC 中的有限资源之间的争用，这一点并不简单。在本文中，我们提出了 Sirius，一个自动化网络功能链组成过程的系统。 Sirius 综合表格来识别输入数据包所属的业务流量，通过再循环在合并的网络功能图中进行管道循环，并在所需的内存消耗超出 ASIC 的能力时在可编程 ASIC 和 CPU 之间划分图形。到目前为止，Sirius已经在数百个网关中实现了网络功能的自动化部署，并有效地将我们程序员的工作量减少了三个数量级，从几周减少到几分钟。

items.title: Sifter: An Inversion-Free and Large-Capacity Programmable Packet Scheduler.
items.abstract: Packet schedulers play a crucial role in determining the order in which packets are served. They achieve this by assigning a rank to each packet and sorting them based on these ranks. However, when dealing with a large number of flows at high packet rates, sorting functions can become extremely complex and time-consuming. To address this issue, fast-approximating packet schedulers have been proposed, but they come with the risk of producing scheduling errors, or packet inversions, which can lead to undesirable consequences. We present Sifter, a programmable packet scheduler that offers high accuracy and large capacity while ensuring inversion-free operation. Sifter employs a unique sorting technique called “Sift Sorting” to coarsely sort packets with larger ranks into buckets, while accurately and finely sorting those with smaller ranks using a small Push-In-First-Out (PIFO) queue in parallel. The sorting process takes advantage of the “Speed-up Factor”, which is a function of the memory bandwidth to output link bandwidth ratio, to achieve Sift Sorting and ensure accurate scheduling with low resource consumption. Sifter combines the benefits of PIFO’s accuracy and FIFO-based schedulers’ large capacity, resulting in guaranteed delivery of packets in an accurate scheduling order. Our simulation results demonstrate Sifter’s efficiency in achieving inversion-free scheduling, while the FPGA-based hardware prototype validates that Sifter supports a throughput of 100Gbps without packet inversion errors.
items.abstract_zh: 数据包调度程序在确定数据包的服务顺序方面发挥着至关重要的作用。他们通过为每个数据包分配一个等级并根据这些等级对它们进行排序来实现这一点。然而，当以高数据包速率处理大量流时，排序功能可能变得极其复杂且耗时。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了快速逼近数据包调度器，但它们存在产生调度错误或数据包反转的风险，这可能会导致不良后果。我们推出了 Sifter，一种可编程数据包调度器，可提供高精度和大容量，同时确保无反转操作。 Sifter 采用一种称为“筛选排序”的独特排序技术，将排名较大的数据包粗略地分类到存储桶中，同时使用小型推入先出 (PIFO) 并行队列对排名较小的数据包进行精确、精细的排序。排序过程利用“加速因子”（内存带宽与输出链路带宽比的函数）来实现Sift排序，并确保在低资源消耗的情况下准确调度。 Sifter 结合了 PIFO 的准确性和基于 FIFO 的调度程序的大容量的优点，从而保证按照准确的调度顺序传送数据包。我们的仿真结果证明了 Sifter 在实现无反转调度方面的效率，而基于 FPGA 的硬件原型验证了 Sifter 支持 100Gbps 的吞吐量，且没有数据包反转错误。

items.title: Sprinter: Speeding Up High-Fidelity Crawling of the Modern Web.
items.abstract: Crawling the web at scale forms the basis of many important systems: web search engines, smart assistants, generative AI, web archives, and so on. Yet, the research community has paid little attention to this workload in the last decade. In this paper, we highlight the need to revisit the notion that web crawling is a solved problem. Specifically, to discover and fetch all page resources dependent on JavaScript and modern web APIs, crawlers today have to employ compute-intensive web browsers. This significantly inflates the scale of the infrastructure necessary to crawl pages at high throughput. To make web crawling more efficient without any loss of fidelity, we present Sprinter, which combines browser-based and browserless crawling to get the best of both. The key to Sprinter’s design is our observation that crawling workloads typically include many pages from every site that is crawled and, unlike in traditional user-facing page loads, there is significant potential to reuse client-side computations across pages. Taking advantage of this property, Sprinter crawls a small, carefully chosen, subset of pages on each site using a browser, and then efficiently identifies and exploits opportunities to reuse the browser’s computations on other pages. Sprinter was able to crawl a corpus of 50,000 pages 5x faster than browser-based crawling, while still closely matching a browser in the set of resources fetched.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模的网络爬行构成了许多重要系统的基础：网络搜索引擎、智能助手、生成式人工智能、网络档案等等。然而，在过去的十年里，研究界很少关注这一工作量。在本文中，我们强调需要重新审视网络爬行是一个已解决的问题这一概念。具体来说，为了发现和获取依赖于 JavaScript 和现代 Web API 的所有页面资源，当今的爬虫必须使用计算密集型 Web 浏览器。这大大增加了以高吞吐量抓取页面所需的基础设施的规模。为了使网络爬行更加高效而不损失任何保真度，我们推出了 Sprinter，它结合了基于浏览器的爬行和无浏览器爬行，以充分利用两者的优势。 Sprinter 设计的关键是我们的观察，即抓取工作负载通常包括来自每个被抓取站点的许多页面，并且与传统的面向用户的页面加载不同，跨页面重用客户端计算具有巨大的潜力。利用这一特性，Sprinter 使用浏览器在每个站点上抓取一小部分精心选择的页面子集，然后有效地识别和利用在其他页面上重用浏览器计算的机会。 Sprinter 能够以比基于浏览器的抓取速度快 5 倍的速度抓取 50,000 个页面的语料库，同时在获取的资源集中仍然与浏览器紧密匹配。

items.title: MobileConfig: Remote Configuration Management for Mobile Apps at Hyperscale.
items.abstract: While software configuration management is a ubiquitous practice in the industry and has been extensively studied, prior research has focused solely on desktop or server applications. This paper presents MobileConfig, perhaps the world's largest configuration management system for mobile apps. It has been in production since 2015 and manages apps running on billions of devices, including Facebook, Instagram, Messenger, and AR/VR/glasses apps. Every day, Meta's developers make a staggering number of live configuration changes, often in the thousands, to remotely control mobile apps, driving them to change runtime behaviors without requiring app code updates. These configuration changes serve diverse purposes such as A/B testing, feature rollout, and app personalization. We discuss how MobileConfig addresses several challenges unique to mobile environments, including (1) the lack of data consistency models that can simultaneously ensure both fast app startup and configuration data freshness; (2) the risk of misconfiguration impacting billions of app users; and (3) the proliferation of mobile client SDKs needed to support diverse mobile platforms, programming languages, and configuration use cases.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然软件配置管理是业界普遍存在的做法，并且已得到广泛研究，但先前的研究仅集中于桌面或服务器应用程序。本文介绍了 MobileConfig，它可能是世界上最大的移动应用配置管理系统。它自 2015 年开始投入生产，管理数十亿设备上运行的应用程序，包括 Facebook、Instagram、Messenger 和 AR/VR/眼镜应用程序。每天，Meta 的开发人员都会进行数量惊人的实时配置更改（通常为数千个），以远程控制移动应用程序，从而促使它们更改运行时行为，而无需更新应用程序代码。这些配置更改可用于多种目的，例如 A/B 测试、功能推出和应用程序个性化。我们讨论 MobileConfig 如何解决移动环境特有的几个挑战，包括（1）缺乏可以同时确保应用程序快速启动和配置数据新鲜度的数据一致性模型； (2) 错误配置的风险影响数十亿应用程序用户； (3) 支持不同移动平台、编程语言和配置用例所需的移动客户端 SDK 的激增。

items.title: A System to Detect Forged-Origin BGP Hijacks.
items.abstract: Despite global efforts to secure Internet routing, attackers still successfully exploit the lack of strong BGP security mechanisms. This paper focuses on an attack vector that is frequently used: Forged-origin hijacks, a type of BGP hijack where the attacker manipulates the AS path to make it immune to RPKI-ROV filters and appear as legitimate routing updates from a BGP monitoring standpoint. Our contribution is DFOH, a system that quickly and consistently detects forged-origin hijacks in the whole Internet. Detecting forged-origin hijacks boils down to inferring whether the AS path in a BGP route is legitimate or has been manipulated. We demonstrate that current state-of-art approaches to detect BGP anomalies are insufficient to deal with forged-origin hijacks. We identify the key properties that make the inference of forged AS paths challenging, and design DFOH to be robust against real-world factors. Our inference pipeline includes two key ingredients: (i) a set of strategically selected features, and (ii) a training scheme adapted to topological biases. DFOH detects 90.9% of the forged-origin hijacks within only ≈5min. In addition, it only reports ≈17.5 suspicious cases every day for the whole Internet, a small number that allows operators to investigate the reported cases and take countermeasures.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管全球都在努力保护互联网路由的安全，但攻击者仍然成功地利用了缺乏强大 BGP 安全机制的漏洞。本文重点介绍一种经常使用的攻击媒介：伪造源劫持，这是一种 BGP 劫持，其中攻击者操纵 AS 路径，使其不受 RPKI-ROV 过滤器的影响，并从 BGP 监控的角度来看，显示为合法的路由更新。我们的贡献是 DFOH，这是一个能够快速、一致地检测整个互联网中的伪造来源劫持的系统。检测伪造源劫持归结为推断 BGP 路由中的 AS 路径是否合法或已被操纵。我们证明，当前检测 BGP 异常的最先进方法不足以应对伪造源劫持。我们确定了使伪造 AS 路径的推断具有挑战性的关键属性，并将 DFOH 设计为对现实世界因素具有鲁棒性。我们的推理管道包括两个关键要素：（i）一组战略性选择的特征，以及（ii）适应拓扑偏差的训练方案。 DFOH 仅在约 5 分钟内即可检测到 90.9% 的伪造源劫持。此外，它每天仅向整个互联网报告约17.5个可疑案例，这个数字很小，可供运营商调查报告的案例并采取应对措施。

items.title: Understanding Routable PCIe Performance for Composable Infrastructures.
items.abstract: Routable PCIe has become the predominant cluster interconnect to build emerging composable infrastructures. Empowered by PCIe non-transparent bridge devices, PCIe transactions can traverse multiple switching domains, enabling a server to elastically integrate a number of remote PCIe devices as local ones. However, it is unclear how to move data or perform communication efficiently over the routable PCIe fabric without understanding its capabilities and limitations. This paper presents the design and implementation of rPCIeBench , a software-hardware co-designed benchmarking framework to systematically characterize the routable PCIe fabric. rPCIeBench provides flexible data communication primitives, exposes end-to-end PCIe transaction observability, and enables reconfigurable experiment deployment. Using rPCIeBench, we first analyze the communication characteristics of a routable PCIe path, quantify its performance tax, and compare it with the local PCIe link. We then use it to dissect in-fabric traffic orchestration behaviors and draw three interesting findings: approximate max-min bandwidth partition, fast end-to-end bandwidth synchronization, and interference-free among orthogonal data paths. Finally, we encode gathered characterization insights as traffic orchestration rules and develop an edge constraints relaxing algorithm to estimate PCIe flow transmission performance over a shared fabric. We validate its accuracy and demonstrate its potential to provide an optimization guide to design efficient flow schedulers.
items.abstract_zh: 可路由 PCIe 已成为构建新兴可组合基础设施的主要集群互连。在PCIe非透明桥接设备的支持下，PCIe事务可以穿越多个交换域，使得服务器能够将多个远程PCIe设备弹性地集成为本地设备。然而，在不了解其功能和限制的情况下，尚不清楚如何通过可路由 PCIe 结构有效地移动数据或执行通信。本文介绍了 rPCIeBench 的设计和实现，rPCIeBench 是一个软件-硬件共同设计的基准测试框架，用于系统地表征可路由 PCIe 结构。 rPCIeBench 提供灵活的数据通信原语，公开端到端 PCIe 事务可观察性，并支持可重新配置的实验部署。使用 rPCIeBench，我们首先分析可路由 PCIe 路径的通信特性，量化其性能负担，并将其与本地 PCIe 链路进行比较。然后，我们使用它来剖析结构内流量编排行为，并得出三个有趣的发现：近似最大-最小带宽划分、快速端到端带宽同步以及正交数据路径之间的无干扰。最后，我们将收集到的表征见解编码为流量编排规则，并开发边缘约束放松算法来估计共享结构上的 PCIe 流传输性能。我们验证其准确性并证明其为设计高效流调度程序提供优化指南的潜力。

items.title: NetVigil: Robust and Low-Cost Anomaly Detection for East-West Data Center Security.
items.abstract: The growing number of breaches in data centers underscores an urgent need for more effective security. Traditional perimeter defense measures and static zero-trust approaches are unable to address the unique challenges that arise from the scale, complexity, and evolving nature of today's data center networks. To tackle these issues, we introduce NetVigil, a robust and cost-efficient anomaly detection system specifically designed for east-west traffic within data center networks. NetVigil adeptly extracts security-focused, graph-based features from network flow logs and employs domain-specific graph neural networks (GNNs) and contrastive learning techniques to strengthen its resilience against normal traffic variations and adversarial evasion strategies. Our evaluation, over various attack scenarios and traces from real-world production clusters, shows that NetVigil delivers significant improvements in accuracy, cost, and detection latency compared to state-of-the-art anomaly detection systems, providing a practical, supplementary security mechanism to protect the east-west traffic within data center networks.
items.abstract_zh: 数据中心的违规事件数量不断增加，凸显了对更有效安全措施的迫切需要。传统的外围防御措施和静态零信任方法无法解决当今数据中心网络的规模、复杂性和不断发展的性质所带来的独特挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 NetVigil，这是一种强大且经济高效的异常检测系统，专为数据中心网络内的东西向流量而设计。 NetVigil 熟练地从网络流日志中提取以安全为中心的、基于图形的特征​​，并采用特定领域的图形神经网络 (GNN) 和对比学习技术来增强其针对正常流量变化和对抗性规避策略的弹性。我们对各种攻击场景和来自现实生产集群的跟踪进行的评估表明，与最先进的异常检测系统相比，NetVigil 在准确性、成本和检测延迟方面都有显着改进，提供了实用的补充安全机制来保护数据中心网络内的东西向流量。

items.title: Characterization of Large Language Model Development in the Datacenter.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have presented impressive performance across several transformative tasks. However, it is non-trivial to efficiently utilize large-scale cluster resources to develop LLMs, often riddled with numerous challenges such as frequent hardware failures, intricate parallelization strategies, and imbalanced resource utilization. In this paper, we present an in-depth characterization study of a six-month LLM development workload trace collected from our GPU datacenter Acme. Specifically, we investigate discrepancies between LLMs and prior task-specific Deep Learning (DL) workloads, explore resource utilization patterns, and identify the impact of various job failures. Our analysis summarizes hurdles we encountered and uncovers potential opportunities to optimize systems tailored for LLMs. Furthermore, we introduce our system efforts: (1) fault-tolerant pretraining , which enhances fault tolerance through LLM-involved failure diagnosis and automatic recovery. (2) decoupled scheduling for evaluation , which achieves timely performance feedback via trial decomposition and scheduling optimization.
