items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在多项变革性任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，高效利用大规模集群资源来开发LLM并非易事，常常面临硬件故​​障频繁、并行策略复杂、资源利用不平衡等诸多挑战。在本文中，我们对从 GPU 数据中心 Acme 收集的为期六个月的 LLM 开发工作负载跟踪进行了深入的特征研究。具体来说，我们调查法学硕士与先前特定任务的深度学习 (DL) 工作负载之间的差异，探索资源利用模式，并确定各种作业失败的影响。我们的分析总结了我们遇到的障碍，并发现了优化专为法学硕士量身定制的系统的潜在机会。此外，我们介绍了我们的系统工作：（1）容错预训练，通过LLM涉及的故障诊断和自动恢复来增强容错能力。 (2)解耦调度评估，通过试验分解和调度优化实现及时的性能反馈。

items.title: DISTMM: Accelerating Distributed Multimodal Model Training.
items.abstract: Multimodal model training takes multiple types of inputs to process with differently structured submodules, and aggregates outcomes from the submodules to learn the relationship among various types of inputs, e.g., correlating text to image for text-to-image generation. The differences of submodule architectures as well as their inputs lead to heterogeneity in terms of computation efficiency. Failing to account for such heterogeneity, existing distributed training systems treat all submodules as a monolithic entity and thus have sub-optimal performance. Moreover, the outcome aggregation phase introduces cross-sample dependencies with contrasting positive and negative sample pairs (i.e., contrastive loss). Such dependencies make the existing pipeline parallelism scheduling algorithms not applicable for multimodal training with contrastive loss. To address the limitations of existing solutions, we propose DISTIMM. For a given multimodal model, DISTIMM exploits the heterogeneity among submodules, applying different distributed parallelism strategies for each submodule, e.g., using Tensor Parallelism for a computation-intensive submodule, and Data Parallelism for a submodule with a small number of parameters. DISTIMM balances the computation of parallelized submodules to reduce the computing resource idle time of waiting for the slowest submodule. DISTIMM further optimizes the locality of submodules by leveraging the heterogeneous bandwidth of interconnections among accelerators. To address the limitation of existing pipeline execution schedules, we propose a new pipeline execution primitive, called batch-sync instruction, and a corresponding schedule, called DISTIMM-Pipe. We build a prototype of DISTIMM and evaluate it with existing solutions on models with various sizes ranging from 1.1 billion to 26 billion parameters and observe 1.32-3.27 × speedup over Megatron-LM.
items.abstract_zh: 多模态模型训练采用多种类型的输入来处理不同结构的子模块，并聚合子模块的结果以学习各种类型输入之间的关系，例如，将文本与图像关联起来以生成文本到图像。子模块架构及其输入的差异导致计算效率方面的异构性。由于未能考虑到这种异构性，现有的分布式训练系统将所有子模块视为一个整体实体，因此性能不佳。此外，结果聚合阶段引入了具有对比正负样本对的跨样本依赖性（即对比损失）。这种依赖性使得现有的管道并行调度算法不适用于具有对比损失的多模态训练。为了解决现有解决方案的局限性，我们提出了 DISTIMM。对于给定的多模态模型，DISTIMM利用子模块之间的异构性，为每个子模块应用不同的分布式并行策略，例如，对计算密集型子模块使用张量并行，对参数数量较少的子模块使用数据并行。 DISTIMM 平衡并行子模块的计算，以减少等待最慢子模块的计算资源空闲时间。 DISTIMM 通过利用加速器之间互连的异构带宽进一步优化子模块的局部性。为了解决现有管道执行调度的限制，我们提出了一种新的管道执行原语（称为批处理同步指令）和相应的调度（称为 DISTIMM-Pipe）。我们构建了 DISTIMM 原型，并使用现有解决方案在具有 11 亿到 260 亿个参数的各种规模的模型上对其进行评估，并观察到比 Megatron-LM 提高了 1.32-3.27 倍。

items.title: Leo: Online ML-based Traffic Classification at Multi-Terabit Line Rate.
items.abstract: Online traffic classification enables critical applications such as network intrusion detection and prevention, providing Quality-of-Service, and real-time IoT analytics. However, with increasing network speeds, it has become extremely challenging to analyze and classify traffic online. In this paper, we present Leo, a system for online traffic classification at multi-terabit line rates. At its core, Leo implements an online machine learning (ML) model for traffic classification, namely the decision tree, in the network switch's data plane. Leo's design is fast (can classify packets at switch's line rate), scalable (can automatically select a resource-efficient design for the class of decision tree models a user wants to support), and runtime programmable (the model can be updated on-the-fly without switch downtime), while achieving high model accuracy. We implement Leo on top of Intel Tofino switches. Our evaluations show that Leo is able to classify traffic at line rate with nominal latency overhead, can scale to model sizes more than twice as large as state-of-the-art data plane ML classification systems, while achieving classification accuracy on-par with an offline traffic classifier.
items.abstract_zh: 在线流量分类支持网络入侵检测和预防等关键应用，提供服务质量和实时物联网分析。然而，随着网络速度的提高，在线分析和分类流量变得极具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 Leo，一个用于多太比特线路速率的在线流量分类的系统。 Leo 的核心是在网络交换机的数据平面中实现用于流量分类的在线机器学习 (ML) 模型，即决策树。 Leo's design is fast (can classify packets at switch's line rate), scalable (can automatically select a resource-efficient design for the class of decision tree models a user wants to support), and runtime programmable (the model can be updated on-the-fly without switch downtime), while achieving high model accuracy.我们在 Intel Tofino 交换机之上实施 Leo。我们的评估表明，Leo 能够以标称延迟开销的线速对流量进行分类，可以扩展到比最先进的数据平面 ML 分类系统大两倍以上的模型大小，同时实现与离线流量分类器相当的分类精度。

items.title: MegaScale: Scaling Large Language Model Training to More Than 10, 000 GPUs.
items.abstract: We present the design, implementation and engineering experience in building and deploying MegaScale, a production system for training large language models (LLMs) at the scale of more than 10,000 GPUs. Training LLMs at this scale brings unprecedented challenges to training efficiency and stability. We take a full-stack approach that co-designs the algorithmic and system components across model block and optimizer design, computation and communication overlapping, operator optimization, data pipeline, and network performance tuning. Maintaining high efficiency throughout the training process (i.e., stability) is an important consideration in production given the long extent of LLM training jobs. Many hard stability issues only emerge at large scale, and in-depth observability is the key to address them. We develop a set of diagnosis tools to monitor system components and events deep in the stack, identify root causes, and derive effective techniques to achieve fault tolerance and mitigate stragglers. MegaScale achieves 55.2% Model FLOPs Utilization (MFU) when training a 175B LLM model on 12,288 GPUs, improving the MFU by 1.34x compared to Megatron-LM. We share our operational experience in identifying and fixing failures and stragglers. We hope by articulating the problems and sharing our experience from a systems perspective, this work can inspire future LLM systems research.
items.abstract_zh: 我们展示了构建和部署 MegaScale 的设计、实施和工程经验，MegaScale 是一个用于训练超过 10,000 个 GPU 规模的大型语言模型 (LLM) 的生产系统。如此规模的法学硕士培训给培训效率和稳定性带来了前所未有的挑战。我们采用全栈方法，跨模型块和优化器设计、计算和通信重叠、操作员优化、数据管道和网络性能调整来共同设计算法和系统组件。鉴于LLM培训工作的范围很长，在整个培训过程中保持高效率（即稳定性）是生产中的一个重要考虑因素。许多硬稳定性问题只会大规模出现，而深入的可观测性是解决这些问题的关键。我们开发了一套诊断工具来监控堆栈深处的系统组件和事件，识别根本原因，并得出有效的技术来实现容错并减少掉队的情况。在 12,288 个 GPU 上训练 175B LLM 模型时，MegaScale 实现了 55.2% 的模型 FLOP 利用率 (MFU)，与 Megatron-LM 相比，MFU 提高了 1.34 倍。我们分享在识别和修复故障和落后者方面的运营经验。我们希望通过从系统角度阐明问题并分享我们的经验，这项工作能够启发未来的法学硕士系统研究。

items.title: Towards Intelligent Automobile Cockpit via A New Container Architecture.
items.abstract: An intelligent cockpit is now crucial in automobiles, not just to provide digital instrumentation and in-vehicle controls but also to offer a wide range of entertainment functionalities. To cater to the demands of these intelligent vehicles, the automotive industry starts employing virtualization technology to offer a unified hardware and software architecture that can simplify system management and enhance resource utilization. Particularly in the domain of intelligent cockpits, virtualization can tightly integrate systems with different criticality levels (e.g., safety and real-time) on a single hardware platform, improving inter-system communication quality and the timely response to user-initiated requests. Currently, microhypervisor virtualization has been used in production to achieve intelligent automobile cockpit. However, in addition to the performance concern and high production costs, this solution is suffering from the global shortage of chips capable of running microhypervisor systems. Our key insight is that, most functions within intelligent cockpit systems are non-safety-critical and non-real-time multimedia tasks. Based on this characteristic, in this paper we present AutoVP , a new cockpit virtualization architecture. The hardware foundation of AutoVP consists of two low-cost chips: 1) a consumer-grade System-on-Chip (SoC) multi-core processor as the main chip; 2) a typical automotive-grade Microcontroller Unit (MCU) as the auxiliary chip. The MCU auxiliary chip is responsible for hosting real-time and safety-critical tasks, while the SoC main chip primarily handles multimedia tasks, such as entertainment systems and digital instrumentation. Further more, we construct an Android container virtual environment on the SoC main chip. This environment integrates multiple media functions onto a single chip, resulting in efficient utilization of chip computational resources and high system scalability. Our comparative performance evaluation demonstrates that AutoVP is a cost-effective and efficient solution to build intelligent cockpits.
items.abstract_zh: 智能驾驶舱现在在汽车中至关重要，不仅提供数字仪表和车内控制，还提供广泛的娱乐功能。为了满足这些智能汽车的需求，汽车行业开始采用虚拟化技术来提供统一的硬件和软件架构，以简化系统管理并提高资源利用率。特别是在智能座舱领域，虚拟化可以将不同关键级别（例如安全性和实时性）的系统紧密集成在单一硬件平台上，提高系统间通信质量和对用户发起请求的及时响应。目前，微管理程序虚拟化已经应用于生产，实现智能汽车座舱。然而，除了性能问题和高生产成本之外，该解决方案还面临全球范围内能够运行微管理程序系统的芯片短缺的问题。我们的主要见解是，智能座舱系统中的大多数功能都是非安全关键和非实时多媒体任务。基于这一特点，本文提出了一种新型座舱虚拟化架构AutoVP。 AutoVP的硬件基础由两块低成本芯片组成：1）消费级片上系统（SoC）多核处理器作为主芯片； 2）典型的汽车级微控制器单元（MCU）作为辅助芯片。 MCU辅助芯片负责托管实时和安全关键任务，而SoC主芯片主要处理多媒体任务，例如娱乐系统和数字仪器。进一步，我们在SoC主芯片上构建了Android容器虚拟环境。该环境将多种媒体功能集成到单个芯片上，从而有效利用芯片计算资源和高系统可扩展性。我们的比较性能评估表明，AutoVP 是构建智能座舱的经济高效的解决方案。

items.title: Sequence Abstractions for Flexible, Line-Rate Network Monitoring.
items.abstract: We develop FLM, a high-level language that enables network operators to write programs that recognize and react to specific packet sequences. To be able to examine every packet, our compilation procedure can transform FLM programs into P4 code that can run on programmable switch ASICs. It first splits FLM programs into a state management component and a classical regular expression, then generates an efficient implementation of the regular expression using SMT-based program synthesis. Our experiments find that FLM can express 15 sequence monitoring tasks drawn from prior literature. Our compiler can convert all of these programs to run on switch hardware in way that fit within available pipeline stages and consume less than 15% additional header fields and instruction words when run alongside switch programs.
items.abstract_zh: 我们开发了 FLM，这是一种高级语言，使网络运营商能够编写能够识别特定数据包序列并做出反应的程序。为了能够检查每个数据包，我们的编译程序可以将 FLM 程序转换为可以在可编程交换机 ASIC 上运行的 P4 代码。它首先将 FLM 程序拆分为状态管理组件和经典正则表达式，然后使用基于 SMT 的程序合成生成正则表达式的高效实现。我们的实验发现 FLM 可以表达从先前文献中提取的 15 种序列监控任务。我们的编译器可以将所有这些程序转换为在交换机硬件上运行，以适合可用的流水线阶段，并且在与交换机程序一起运行时消耗不到 15% 的额外标头字段和指令字。

items.title: Multitenant In-Network Acceleration with SwitchVM.
items.abstract: We propose a practical approach to implementing multitenancy on programmable network switches to make in-network acceleration accessible to cloud users. We introduce a Switch Virtual Machine (SwitchVM), that is deployed on the switches and offers an expressive instruction set and program state abstractions. Tenant programs, called Data-Plane filters (DPFs), are executed on top of SwitchVM in a sandbox with memory, network and state isolation policies controlled by network operators. The packets that trigger DPF execution include the code to execute or a reference to the DPFs deployed in the switch. DPFs are Turing-complete, may maintain state in the packet and in switch virtual memory, may form a dynamic chain, and may steer packets to desired destinations, all while enforcing the operator’s policies. We demonstrate that this idea is practical by prototyping SwitchVM in P4 on Intel Tofino switches. We describe a variety of use cases that SwitchVM supports, and implement three complex applications from prior works – key-value store cache, Load-aware load balancer and Paxos accelerator. We also show that SwitchVM provides strong performance isolation, zero-overhead runtime programmability, may hold two orders of magnitude more in-switch programs than existing techniques, and may support up to thirty thousand concurrent tenants each with its private state.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在可编程网络交换机上实现多租户的实用方法，以使云用户可以访问网络内加速。我们引入了交换机虚拟机（SwitchVM），它部署在交换机上并提供富有表现力的指令集和程序状态抽象。租户程序称为数据平面过滤器 (DPF)，在 SwitchVM 之上的沙箱中执行，内存、网络和状态隔离策略由网络运营商控制。触发 DPF 执行的数据包包括要执行的代码或对交换机中部署的 DPF 的引用。 DPF 是图灵完备的，可以维护数据包和交换机虚拟内存中的状态，可以形成动态链，并且可以将数据包引导到所需的目的地，同时执行运营商的策略。我们通过在 Intel Tofino 交换机上的 P4 中对 SwitchVM 进行原型设计，证明了这一想法的实用性。我们描述了 SwitchVM 支持的各种用例，并实现了之前工作中的三个复杂应用程序——键值存储缓存、负载感知负载均衡器和 Paxos 加速器。我们还表明，SwitchVM 提供了强大的性能隔离、零开销运行时可编程性，可以​​比现有技术容纳多两个数量级的交换机内程序，并且可以支持多达三万个并发租户，每个租户都有其私有状态。

items.title: NR-Surface: NextG-ready µW-reconfigurable mmWave Metasurface.
items.abstract: Metasurface has recently emerged as an economic solution to expand mmWave coverage. However, their pervasive deployment remains a challenge, mainly due to the difficulty in reaching the tight 260ns NR synchronization requirement and real-time wireless reconfiguration while maintaining multi-year battery life. This paper presents NR-Surface, the first real-time reconfigurable metasurface fully compliant with the NR standard, operating at 242.7 µW for a 2.1-year lifetime on an AA battery. NR-Surface incorporates (i) a new extremely low-power (14KHz sampling) reconfiguration interface, NarrowBand Packet Unit (NBPU), for synchronization and real-time reconfiguration, and (ii) a highly responsive and low-leakage metasurface designed for low-duty cycled operation, by carefully leveraging the structure and the periodicity of the NR beam management procedure in the NR standard. NR-Surface is prototyped and evaluated end-to-end with NR BS built on srsRAN to demonstrate diverse usage scenarios including multiple NR-Surface per BS, multiple UE per NR-Surface, and 3D beamforming. Around-the-corner UE evaluations showcase NR-Surface efficacy under different user mobility patterns (20.3dB gain) and dynamic blockage (22.2dB gain).
items.abstract_zh: 超表面最近成为扩大毫米波覆盖范围的经济解决方案。然而，它们的普遍部署仍然是一个挑战，主要是因为难以达到严格的 260ns NR 同步要求和实时无线重新配置，同时保持多年的电池寿命。本文介绍了 NR-Surface，这是第一个完全符合 NR 标准的实时可重构超表面，运行功耗为 242.7 µW，使用 AA 电池可实现 2.1 年的使用寿命。 NR-Surface 通过仔细利用 NR 标准中 NR 波束管理程序的结构和周期性，采用了 (i) 新型极低功耗（14KHz 采样）重配置接口、窄带数据包单元 (NBPU)，用于同步和实时重配置，以及 (ii) 专为低占空比运行而设计的高响应性和低泄漏超表面。 NR-Surface 使用基于 srsRAN 构建的 NR BS 进行了原型设计和端到端评估，以演示不同的使用场景，包括每个 BS 多个 NR-Surface、每个 NR-Surface 多个 UE 以及 3D 波束成形。拐角处的 UE 评估展示了不同用户移动模式（20.3dB 增益）和动态阻塞（22.2dB 增益）下的 NR-Surface 功效。

items.title: EdgeRIC: Empowering Real-time Intelligent Optimization and Control in NextG Cellular Networks.
items.abstract: Radio Access Networks (RAN) are increasingly softwarized and accessible via data-collection and control interfaces. RAN intelligent control (RIC) is an approach to manage these interfaces at different timescales. In this paper, we introduce EdgeRIC, a real-time RIC co-located with the Distributed Unit (DU). It is decoupled from the RAN stack, and operates at the RAN timescale. EdgeRIC serves as the seat of real-time AI-in-the-loop for decision and control. It can access RAN and application-level information to execute AI-optimized and other policies in real-time (sub-millisecond). We demonstrate that EdgeRIC operates as if embedded within the RAN stack. We showcase RT applications called μ Apps over EdgeRIC that significantly outperforms a cloud-based near real-time RIC (> 15 ms latency) in terms of attained system throughput. Further, our over-the-air experiments with AI-based policies showcase their resilience to channel dynamics. Remarkably, these AI policies outperform model-based strategies by 5% to 25% in both system throughput and end user application-level benchmarks across diverse mobile scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 无线接入网络 (RAN) 日益软件化，并且可以通过数据收集和控制接口进行访问。 RAN 智能控制 (RIC) 是一种在不同时间尺度管理这些接口的方法。在本文中，我们介绍了 EdgeRIC，这是一种与分布式单元 (DU) 共置的实时 RIC。它与 RAN 堆栈解耦，并在 RAN 时间尺度上运行。 EdgeRIC 充当实时人工智能在环决策和控制的基础。它可以访问 RAN 和应用程序级信息，以实时（亚毫秒）执行 AI 优化和其他策略。我们演示了 EdgeRIC 的运行方式就像嵌入在 RAN 堆栈中一样。我们展示了名为 μ Apps over EdgeRIC 的 RT 应用程序，其在获得的系统吞吐量方面显着优于基于云的近实时 RIC（> 15 毫秒延迟）。此外，我们对基于人工智能的政策进行的无线实验展示了它们对渠道动态的适应能力。值得注意的是，这些人工智能策略在不同移动场景的系统吞吐量和最终用户应用程序级基准方面均优于基于模型的策略 5% 至 25%。

items.title: CHISEL: An optical slice of the wide-area network.
items.abstract: Network slicing reserves a portion of the physical resources of radio access networks and makes them available to consumers. Slices guarantee traffic isolation, strict bandwidth and quality of service. However, the abstraction of slicing has been limited to access networks. We develop CHISEL, a system that dynamically carves slices of the wide-area network (WAN), enabling an end-to-end network slicing abstraction. CHISEL creates optical slices between WAN endpoints to avoid queueing and congestion delays inherent in packet switched paths in WANs. CHISEL incrementally allocates optical spectrum on long-haul fiber to provision slices. This task is made challenging by the co-existence of data-carrying channels on the fiber and numerous physical constraints associated with provisioning optical paths e.g., spectrum contiguity, continuity and optical reach constraints. CHISEL leverages the empirical finding that cloud WANs have abundant optical spectrum to spare — 75% of optical spectrum on 75% of fiber spans is unused. CHISEL can optimally allocate terabits of slice requests while consuming minimal optical spectrum within seconds without increasing spectral fragmentation on fiber. CHISEL trades-off optimality of slice bandwidth allocation for faster run-time, provisioning slices within 2% of optimal in less than 30 seconds in a commercial cloud WAN. Finally, CHISEL reduces the latency of provisioning optical slices on hardware by 10X. Compared to IP tunnels of equivalent capacity, CHISEL consumes 3.3X fewer router ports.
items.abstract_zh: 网络切片保留了无线接入网络的一部分物理资源，并将其提供给消费者。切片保证流量隔离、严格的带宽和服务质量。然而，切片的抽象仅限于接入网络。我们开发了 CHISEL，这是一个动态划分广域网 (WAN) 切片的系统，从而实现端到端网络切片抽象。 CHISEL 在 WAN 端点之间创建光学切片，以避免 WAN 中数据包交换路径固有的排队和拥塞延迟。 CHISEL 在长距离光纤上增量分配光谱以配置切片。由于光纤上数据承载通道的共存以及与配置光路相关的众多物理限制（例如频谱连续性、连续性和光学范围限制），使这项任务变得具有挑战性。 CHISEL 利用了云 WAN 有丰富的备用光谱的经验发现 — 75% 的光纤跨度上有 75% 的光谱未使用。 CHISEL 可以优化分配太比特的切片请求，同时在几秒钟内消耗最少的光谱，而不会增加光纤上的光谱碎片。 CHISEL 会权衡切片带宽分配的最优性以换取更快的运行时间，在商业云 WAN 中不到 30 秒的时间内将切片配置在最优值的 2% 范围内。最后，CHISEL 将硬件上配置光学切片的延迟减少了 10 倍。与同等容量的 IP 隧道相比，CHISEL 消耗的路由器端口数减少了 3.3 倍。

items.title: Accelerating Skewed Workloads With Performance Multipliers in the TurboDB Distributed Database.
items.abstract: Distributed databases suffer from performance degradation under skewed workloads. Such workloads cause high contention, which is exacerbated by cross-node network latencies. In contrast, single-machine databases better handle skewed workloads because their centralized nature enables performance optimizations that execute contended requests more efficiently. Based on this insight, we propose a novel hybrid architecture that employs a single-machine database inside a distributed database and present TurboDB, the first distributed database that leverages this hybrid architecture to achieve up to an order of magnitude better performance than representative solutions under skewed workloads. TurboDB introduces two designs to tackle the core challenges unique to its hybrid architecture. First, Hybrid Concurrency Control is a specialized technique that coordinates the single-machine and distributed databases to collectively ensure process-ordered serializability. Second, Phalanx Replication provides fault tolerance for the single-machine database without significantly sacrificing its performance benefits. We implement TurboDB using CockroachDB and Cicada as the distributed and single-machine databases, respectively. Our evaluation shows that TurboDB significantly improves the performance of CockroachDB under skewed workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式数据库在不平衡的工作负载下会遭受性能下降的困扰。此类工作负载会导致高争用，而跨节点网络延迟会加剧这种争用。相比之下，单机数据库可以更好地处理倾斜的工作负载，因为它们的集中式特性可以实现性能优化，从而更有效地执行竞争请求。基于这一见解，我们提出了一种新颖的混合架构，该架构在分布式数据库中采用单机数据库，并提出了 TurboDB，这是第一个利用这种混合架构的分布式数据库，在倾斜工作负载下比代表性解决方案实现了一个数量级的性能提升。 TurboDB 引入了两种设计来解决其混合架构特有的核心挑战。首先，混合并发控制是一种协调单机和分布式数据库以共同确保流程有序可串行化的专业技术。其次，Phalanx Replication 为单机数据库提供容错能力，而不会显着牺牲其性能优势。我们分别使用 CockroachDB 和 Cicada 作为分布式数据库和单机数据库来实现 TurboDB。我们的评估表明，TurboDB 显着提高了 CockroachDB 在倾斜工作负载下的性能。

items.title: Seer: Enabling Future-Aware Online Caching in Networked Systems.
items.abstract: State-intensive network and distributed applications rely heavily on online caching heuristics for high performance. However, there remains a fundamental performance gap between online caching heuristics and the optimal offline caching algorithm due to the lack of visibility into future state access requests in an online setting. Driven by the observation that state access requests in network and distributed applications are often carried in incoming network packets, we present Seer, an online caching solution for networked systems, that exploits the delays experienced by a packet inside a network—most prominently, transmission and queuing delays—to notify in advance of future packet arrivals to the target network nodes (switches/routers/middleboxes/end-hosts) implementing caching. Using this as a building block, Seer presents the design of an online cache manager that leverages visibility into (partial) set of future state access requests to make smarter prefetching and cache eviction decisions. Our evaluations show that Seer achieves up to 65% lower cache miss ratio and up to 78% lower flow completion time compared to LRU for key network applications over realistic workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 状态密集型网络和分布式应用程序严重依赖在线缓存启发式方法来获得高性能。然而，由于缺乏对在线设置中未来状态访问请求的可见性，在线缓存启发法和最佳离线缓存算法之间仍然存在根本的性能差距。由于网络和分布式应用程序中的状态访问请求通常在传入网络数据包中携带，我们提出了 Seer，这是一种用于网络系统的在线缓存解决方案，它利用网络内数据包所经历的延迟（最突出的是传输和排队延迟）来提前通知未来数据包到达实现缓存的目标网络节点（交换机/路由器/中间盒/终端主机）。 Seer 以此为构建块，提出了在线缓存管理器的设计，该管理器利用对（部分）未来状态访问请求集的可见性来做出更智能的预取和缓存驱逐决策。我们的评估表明，对于实际工作负载下的关键网络应用程序，与 LRU 相比，Seer 的缓存未命中率降低了 65%，流程完成时间缩短了 78%。

items.title: ExChain: Exception Dependency Analysis for Root Cause Diagnosis.
items.abstract: Many failures in large-scale online services stem from incorrect handling of exceptions. We focus on exception-handling failures characterized by three features that make them difficult to diagnose using classical techniques: (1) implicit dependencies across multiple exceptions due to state changes; (2) silent code handling without logging; and (3) separation (in code and in time) between the root cause exception and the failure manifestation. In this paper, we present the design and implementation of ExChain, a framework that helps developers diagnose such exception-dependent failures in test/canary deployment environments. ExChain constructs causal links between exceptions even in the presence of the aforementioned factors. Our key observation is that mishandled exceptions invariably modify critical system states, which impact downstream functions. A key challenge in tracking these states is balancing the tradeoff between performance overhead and accuracy. To this end, ExChain uses state-impact analysis to establish potential causal links between exceptions and uses a novel hybrid taint tracking approach for tracking state propagation. Using ExChain, we were able to successfully identify the root cause for 8 out of 11 reported subtle exception-dependent failures in 10 popular applications. ExChain significantly outperforms state-of-art approaches, while producing several orders of magnitude fewer false positives. ExChain also offers significantly better accuracy-performance tradeoffs relative to baseline static/dynamic analysis alternatives.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模在线服务的许多故障都源于对异常的错误处理。我们重点关注异常处理故障，其特征在于三个特征，这些特征使得使用经典技术难以诊断它们：（1）由于状态变化而导致多个异常之间的隐式依赖关系； (2) 不记录代码的静默代码处理； (3)根本原因异常和故障表现之间的分离（在代码和时间上）。在本文中，我们介绍了 ExChain 的设计和实现，该框架可帮助开发人员在测试/金丝雀部署环境中诊断此类与异常相关的故障。即使存在上述因素，ExChain 也会在异常之间构建因果关系。我们的主要观察结果是，错误处理的异常总是会修改关键系统状态，从而影响下游功能。跟踪这些状态的一个关键挑战是平衡性能开销和准确性之间的权衡。为此，ExChain 使用状态影响分析来建立异常之间的潜在因果关系，并使用一种新颖的混合污点跟踪方法来跟踪状态传播。使用 ExChain，我们能够成功识别 10 个流行应用程序中 11 个报告的微妙异常相关故障中的 8 个的根本原因。 ExChain 的性能显着优于最先进的方法，同时误报率降低了几个数量级。相对于基线静态/动态分析替代方案，ExChain 还提供了明显更好的准确性与性能权衡。

items.title: THC: Accelerating Distributed Deep Learning Using Tensor Homomorphic Compression.
items.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are the de facto standard for essential use cases, such as image classification, computer vision, and natural language processing. As DNNs and datasets get larger, they require distributed training on increasingly larger clusters. A main bottleneck is the resulting communication overhead where workers exchange model updates (i.e., gradients) on a per-round basis. To address this bottleneck and accelerate training, a widely-deployed approach is compression. However, previous deployments often apply bi-directional compression schemes by simply using a uni-directional gradient compression scheme in each direction. This results in significant computational overheads at the parameter server and increased compression error, leading to longer training and lower accuracy. We introduce Tensor Homomorphic Compression (THC), a novel bi-directional compression framework that enables the direct aggregation of compressed values and thus eliminating the aforementioned computational overheads. Moreover, THC is compatible with in-network aggregation (INA), which allows for further acceleration. Our evaluation shows that training representative vision and language models with THC reaches target accuracy by 1.40× to 1.47× faster using INA and 1.28× to 1.33× faster using a software PS compared with state-of-the-art systems.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 是图像分类、计算机视觉和自然语言处理等基本用例的事实上的标准。随着 DNN 和数据集变得越来越大，它们需要在越来越大的集群上进行分布式训练。主要瓶颈是由此产生的通信开销，其中工作人员每轮交换模型更新（即梯度）。为了解决这个瓶颈并加速训练，一种广泛部署的方法是压缩。然而，以前的部署通常通过在每个方向简单地使用单向梯度压缩方案来应用双向压缩方案。这会导致参数服务器产生大量计算开销并增加压缩误差，从而导致训练时间更长和准确性降低。我们引入张量同态压缩（THC），这是一种新颖的双向压缩框架，可以直接聚合压缩值，从而消除上述计算开销。此外，THC 与网内聚合 (INA) 兼容，可以进一步加速。我们的评估表明，与最先进的系统相比，使用 THC 训练代表性视觉和语言模型，使用 INA 训练的目标准确度要快 1.40 倍到 1.47 倍，使用软件 PS 的目标准确度要快 1.28 倍到 1.33 倍。

items.title: Cyclops: A Nanomaterial-based, Battery-Free Intraocular Pressure (IOP) Monitoring System inside Contact Lens.
items.abstract: Intraocular pressure (IOP), commonly known as eye pressure, is a critical physiological parameter related to health. Contact lens-based IOP sensing has garnered significant attention in research. Existing research has been focusing on developing the sensor itself, so the techniques used to read sensing data only support a reading range of several centimeters, becoming the main obstacle for real-world deployment. This paper presents Cyclops, the first battery-free IOP sensing system integrated into a contact lens, which overcomes the proximity constraints of traditional reading methods. Cyclops features a three-layer antenna comprising two metallic layers and a nanomaterial-based sensing layer in between. This innovative antenna serves a dual purpose, functioning as both a pressure sensor and a communication antenna simultaneously. The antenna is connected to an RFID chip, which utilizes a low-power self-tuning circuit to achieve high-precision pressure sensing, akin to a 9-bit ADC. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that Cyclops supports communication at meter-level distances, and its IOP measurement accuracy surpasses that of commercial portable IOP measurement devices.
items.abstract_zh: 眼压（IOP），俗称眼压，是与健康相关的重要生理参数。基于隐形眼镜的眼压传感在研究中引起了广泛关注。现有的研究一直集中在传感器本身的开发上，因此用于读取传感数据的技术仅支持几厘米的读取范围，成为实际部署的主要障碍。本文介绍了 Cyclops，这是第一个集成到隐形眼镜中的无电池 IOP 传感系统，它克服了传统阅读方法的近距离限制。 Cyclops 具有三层天线，包括两个金属层和中间的基于纳米材料的传感层。这种创新的天线具有双重用途，可同时用作压力传感器和通信天线。天线连接到RFID芯片，该芯片利用低功耗自调谐电路来实现高精度压力传感，类似于9位ADC。大量实验结果表明，Cyclops支持米级距离通信，其眼压测量精度超越商用便携式眼压测量设备。

items.title: iStack: A General and Stateful Name-based Protocol Stack for Named Data Networking.
items.abstract: Named Data Networking (NDN) shifts the network from host-centric to data-centric with a clean-slate design, in which packet forwarding is based on names, and the data plane maintains per-packet state. Different forwarders have been implemented to provide NDN capabilities for various scenarios, however, there is a lack of a network stack that is integrated with operating systems (OS) for general purpose. Designing a stateful and entirely name-based protocol stack in OS kernel remains a challenge due to three factors: (i) an in-kernel name resolution architecture for packet demultiplexing is necessary, (ii) an entirely name-based stack requires to be compatible with the current address (MAC/IP/port)-based architecture in OS kernel, and (iii) maintaining per-packet state introduces a trade-off between performance and resource consumption. In this paper, for the first time, we take NDN into OS kernel by proposing iStack, an Information-Centric Networking (ICN) protocol stack. The main innovations of iStack are threefold. First, we propose a name resolution architecture to support both network-layer forwarding and local packet demultiplexing. Second, a two-layer face system is proposed to provide abstraction of address-based network interfaces. Third, we design socket-compatible interfaces to keep the uniformity of current network stack in OS. Besides, we design compact forwarding data structures for fast packet processing with low memory footprint. We have implemented prototypes on multiple platforms. The evaluation results show that iStack achieves 6.50 Gbps throughput, outperforming the NDN-testbed forwarder by a factor of 16.25x, and reduces 46.08% forwarding latency for cached packets with its inkernel packet caching. iStack is not just another forwarder for NDN, but a step forward for practical development of ICN.
items.abstract_zh: 命名数据网络 (NDN) 通过全新的设计将网络从以主机为中心转变为以数据为中心，其中数据包转发基于名称，数据平面维护每个数据包的状态。已经实现了不同的转发器来为各种场景提供NDN功能，但是，缺乏与通用操作系统（OS）集成的网络堆栈。由于以下三个因素，在操作系统内核中设计一个有状态且完全基于名称的协议栈仍然是一个挑战：(i) 用于数据包解复用的内核内名称解析架构是必要的，(ii) 完全基于名称的协议栈需要与操作系统内核中当前基于地址（MAC/IP/端口）的架构兼容，以及 (iii) 维护每个数据包状态需要在性能和资源消耗之间进行权衡。在本文中，我们首次通过提出 iStack（一种以信息为中心的网络（ICN）协议栈）将 NDN 纳入操作系统内核。 iStack的主要创新有三个方面。首先，我们提出了一个名称解析架构来支持网络层转发和本地数据包解复用。其次，提出了一个两层人脸系统来提供基于地址的网络接口的抽象。第三，我们设计了套接字兼容的接口，以保持操作系统中当前网络堆栈的一致性。此外，我们设计了紧凑的转发数据结构，以低内存占用实现快速数据包处理。我们已经在多个平台上实现了原型。评估结果显示，iStack 实现了 6.50 Gbps 的吞吐量，是 NDN 测试床转发器的 16.25 倍，并通过其内核数据包缓存将缓存数据包的转发延迟降低了 46.08%。 iStack不仅仅是NDN的又一个转发器，更是ICN实际发展的一个进步。

items.title: Reasoning about Network Traffic Load Property at Production Scale.
items.abstract: This paper presents Jingubang, the first reported system for checking network traffic load properties (e.g., if any link’s utilization would exceed 80% during a network change) in a production Wide Area Network (WAN). Motivated by our network operators, Jingubang should meet three important requirements: ( R1 ) comprehensive support for complex traffic behavior under BGP, IS-IS, policy-based routes (PBR), and segment routes (SR), ( R2 ) reasoning on traffic load of billions of flows across a period of time, ( R3 ) real-time failure-tolerance analysis. These requirements pose challenges in modeling the complex traffic behavior and maintaining the checking efficiency. Jingubang has successfully addressed these challenges. First, we propose the traffic distribution graph (or TDG), capable of modeling equal-cost multi-path (ECMP), packet rewriting, and tunneling, introduced by BGP/IS-IS, PBR, and SR, respectively. Second, we design an algorithm based on TDG to simulate traffic distribution for billions of flows across a time period both efficiently and accurately. Third, Jingubang proposes an incremental traffic simulation approach that first computes an incremental TDG and then simulates only the differential traffic distribution, avoiding the need to simulate the entire network traffic distribution from scratch. Jingubang has been used in the daily checking of our WAN for more than one year and prevented service downtime resulting from traffic load violations.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Jinubang，这是第一个报告的用于检查生产广域网 (WAN) 中网络流量负载属性（例如，在网络更改期间任何链路的利用率是否超过 80%）的系统。在我们网络运营商的推动下，金谷邦应该满足三个重要需求：（R1）全面支持BGP、IS-IS、策略路由（PBR）、分段路由（SR）下的复杂流量行为；（R2）一段时间内亿级流的流量负载推理；（R3）实时容错分析。这些要求对复杂流量行为建模和保持检查效率提出了挑战。金固邦成功应对了这些挑战。首先，我们提出了流量分布图（TDG），能够对等价多路径（ECMP）、数据包重写和隧道进行建模，分别由 BGP/IS-IS、PBR 和 SR 引入。其次，我们设计了一种基于TDG的算法，可以高效、准确地模拟一段时间内数十亿流的流量分布。第三，金谷邦提出了一种增量流量模拟方法，首先计算增量TDG，然后仅模拟差分流量分布，避免了从头开始模拟整个网络流量分布的需要。金固邦已用于我们广域网的日常检查一年多，避免了因流量负载违规而导致的服务停机。

items.title: Democratizing Direct-to-Cell Low Earth Orbit Satellite Networks.
items.abstract: Multi-tenant Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellites emerge as a cost-effective win-win solution for direct 4G/5G access to our regular phones/IoTs anywhere on Earth. However, the current hop-by-hop stateful cellular session impedes this effort due to its need for tight functional coupling and stable service relationships among satellite operators, mobile operators, and users. Our empirical study with real satellite data shows that, it restricts LEO satellites' serviceable areas, limits the use of available (possibly competitive) satellites, and suffers from signaling storms and dynamic many-to-many relationships in extreme LEO mobility. We thus devise MOSAIC to strive for self-serve multi-tenant LEO satellites. MOSAIC defines policy-embedded one-time tokens for pay-as-you-go local satellite access. These tokens allow satellites to self-serve users anywhere without relying on remote mobile operators, alleviate inter-satellite coordinations to enjoy competitive satellites, and simplify many-to-many service relationships for on-demand multi-tenancy. MOSAIC is attack-resilient and incrementally deployable using our SIM-based solution. Our evaluations with the real satellite data and commodity 3GPP NTN protocol stack validate MOSAIC's viability.
items.abstract_zh: 多租户低地球轨道 (LEO) 卫星成为一种经济高效的双赢解决方案，可直接 4G/5G 访问地球上任何地方的常规电话/物联网。然而，当前的逐跳状态蜂窝会话阻碍了这一努力，因为它需要卫星运营商、移动运营商和用户之间紧密的功能耦合和稳定的服务关系。我们对真实卫星数据的实证研究表明，它限制了低地球轨道卫星的服务范围，限制了可用（可能是竞争性）卫星的使用，并在极端低地球轨道移动性下遭受信号风暴和动态多对多关系的影响。因此，我们设计了 MOSAIC 来争取自助式多租户 LEO 卫星。 MOSAIC 定义了政策嵌入的一次性令牌，用于即用即付的本地卫星访问。这些令牌允许卫星在任何地方为用户提供自助服务，而无需依赖远程移动运营商，减轻卫星间协调以享受有竞争力的卫星，并简化按需多租户的多对多服务关系。 MOSAIC 具有抗攻击能力，并且可以使用我们基于 SIM 的解决方案进行增量部署。我们使用真实卫星数据和商用 3GPP NTN 协议栈进行的评估验证了 MOSAIC 的可行性。

items.title: CAPA: An Architecture For Operating Cluster Networks With High Availability.
items.abstract: Management operations are a major source of outages for networks. A number of best practices designed to reduce and mitigate such outages are well known, but their enforcement has been challenging, leaving the network vulnerable to inadvertent mistakes and gaps which repeatedly result in outages. We present our experiences with CAPA, Google’s “containment and prevention architecture” for regulating management operations on our cluster networking fleet. Our goal with CAPA is to limit the systems where strict adherence to best practices is required, so that availability of the network is not dependent on the good intentions of every engineer and operator. We enumerate the features of CAPA which we have found to be necessary to effectively enforce best practices within a thin “regulation“ layer. We evaluate CAPA based on case studies of outages prevented, counter-factual analysis of past incidents, and known limitations. Management-plane-related outages have substantially reduced both in frequency and severity, with a 82% reduction in cumulative duration of incidents normalized to fleet size over five years.
items.abstract_zh: 管理操作是网络中断的主要根源。旨在减少和缓解此类中断的许多最佳实践众所周知，但其执行一直具有挑战性，使网络容易受到无意错误和漏洞的影响，从而反复导致中断。我们展示了我们在 CAPA 方面的经验，CAPA 是 Google 的“遏制和预防架构”，用于规范我们集群网络舰队的管理操作。我们 CAPA 的目标是限制需要严格遵守最佳实践的系统，以便网络的可用性不依赖于每个工程师和操作员的良好意图。我们列举了 CAPA 的特征，我们发现这些特征对于在薄弱的“监管”层内有效实施最佳实践是必要的。我们根据预防中断的案例研究、对过去事件的反事实分析以及已知的局限性来评估 CAPA。与管理飞机相关的停机频率和严重程度均大幅降低，五年内按机队规模归一化的事故累积持续时间减少了 82%。

items.title: Harmonic: Hardware-assisted RDMA Performance Isolation for Public Clouds.
items.abstract: Performance isolation is essential for sharing resources in multi-tenant public clouds. Compared with traditional kernel-based networking, RDMA presents unique challenges especially because RDMA NIC's complex microarchitecture resources are often hidden from users. Current RDMA isolation methods overlook these microarchitecture resources, leading to insufficient performance isolation. Consequently, a faulty/malicious tenant can exploit these microarchitecture resources to compromise well-behaved tenants' network performance. In this paper, we introduce the first microarchitecture-resource-aware RDMA performance isolation solution for public clouds, Harmonic. It consists of two key components designed to be conscious of the RDMA NIC's microarchitectural resources: (1) a programmable intelligent PCIe switch (prototyped with FPGA) and (2) an RDMA-friendly rate limiter. At runtime, these two components allow us to accurately monitor and modulate the RDMA NIC resource usage per tenant. We evaluate Harmonic with a state-of-the-art RDMA performance isolation test suite (Husky) and a popular in-memory database application (Redis). We demonstrate that Harmonic can not only successfully pass Husky but also provide Redis with 1.4× higher throughput than the best alternative isolation solution.
items.abstract_zh: 性能隔离对于在多租户公共云中共享资源至关重要。与传统的基于内核的网络相比，RDMA 提出了独特的挑战，特别是因为 RDMA NIC 复杂的微架构资源通常对用户隐藏。目前的RDMA隔离方法忽略了这些微架构资源，导致性能隔离不足。因此，有缺陷/恶意的租户可以利用这些微架构资源来损害表现良好的租户的网络性能。在本文中，我们介绍了第一个适用于公共云的微架构资源感知 RDMA 性能隔离解决方案 Harmonic。它由两个关键组件组成，旨在了解 RDMA NIC 的微架构资源：(1) 可编程智能 PCIe 交换机（采用 FPGA 原型）和 (2) RDMA 友好的速率限制器。在运行时，这两个组件使我们能够准确监控和调整每个租户的 RDMA NIC 资源使用情况。我们使用最先进的 RDMA 性能隔离测试套件 (Husky) 和流行的内存数据库应用程序 (Redis) 来评估 Harmonic。我们证明 Harmonic 不仅可以成功通过 Husky，还可以为 Redis 提供比最佳替代隔离解决方案高 1.4 倍的吞吐量。

items.title: POSEIDON: A Consolidated Virtual Network Controller that Manages Millions of Tenants via Config Tree.
items.abstract: As the cloud rapidly expands in scale, the virtual network controller must manage an increasing number of devices with higher update frequencies. Furthermore, the emergence of cloud-native services has substantially intensified program-triggered updates, leading to more frequent API invocations. To enhance performance and extensibility, we propose Poseidon, a novel virtual network control framework. Specifically, to reduce operational expenses (OpEx), we have consolidated the common functions of multiple service controllers into a single controller. To manage heterogeneous devices and eliminate the multi-table lookup complexity due to config dependencies, we introduce Trident, a tree-based service- and device-independent abstraction, so that config dependency calculation can be replaced by more efficient tree traversal. After deploying Poseidon on Alibaba Cloud, we observed a 21x increase in the throughput of virtual network configuration tasks, along with a 4.4x decrease in the P99 API processing latency. Poseidon completes the task of enabling hundreds of Elastic IP addresses (EIPs) 1.8 to 55 times faster than Vendors A and B, both of which are among the top 5 providers, for identical network configuration jobs.
items.abstract_zh: 随着云规模的迅速扩大，虚拟网络控制器必须管理越来越多且更新频率越来越高的设备。此外，云原生服务的出现大大加剧了程序触发的更新，导致API调用更加频繁。为了增强性能和可扩展性，我们提出了 Poseidon，一种新颖的虚拟网络控制框架。具体来说，为了降低运营费用（OpEx），我们将多个服务控制器的通用功能整合到一个控制器中。为了管理异构设备并消除由于配置依赖关系而导致的多表查找复杂性，我们引入了Trident，一种基于树的独立于服务和设备的抽象，以便配置依赖关系计算可以被更高效的树遍历代替。在阿里云上部署 Poseidon 后，我们观察到虚拟网络配置任务的吞吐量提高了 21 倍，同时 P99 API 处理延迟降低了 4.4 倍。对于相同的网络配置作业，Poseidon 完成了启用数百个弹性 IP 地址 (EIP) 的任务，速度比供应商 A 和 B 快 1.8 到 55 倍，这两个供应商都属于排名前 5 的供应商。

items.title: Klonet: an Easy-to-Use and Scalable Platform for Computer Networks Education.
items.abstract: Currently, one of the simplest and most effective ways for people to gain an in-depth understanding of computer networks is through hands-on practice and experimentation on software platforms. While education is important for the field of computer networks, existing platforms are inadequate in usability and scalability, failing to fully meet all the teaching needs of computer networking education. This paper describes our experiences in designing and using Klonet, an emulation platform for computer networking education. Klonet is easy-to-use for both students and tutors, which has been carefully designed to lower the barrier to use, thus making the practice more efficient. Klonet also demonstrates good scalability . It adopts a container-based distributed architecture and a virtual network embedding algorithm customized for this platform. Evaluation experiments show that Klonet exhibits better scalability, such as supporting more students with fewer hardware resources ( i.e. , servers) and deploying virtual network topologies more quickly. Furthermore, to ensure stability during teaching, Klonet enhances the robustness of its upper orchestrator and underlying virtual networks. So far, Klonet has been adopted in 3 universities and 4 courses, serving more than 800 students. We showcase Klonet's usefulness in networking education with real use cases, including a scenario with ~10,000 emulated routers. We also share our lessons learned from the 4 years of Klonet development and 2 years of operations.
items.abstract_zh: 目前，人们深入了解计算机网络最简单、最有效的方法之一就是通过软件平台的动手实践和实验。教育对于计算机网络领域十分重要，但现有平台在可用性和可扩展性方面存在不足，未能完全满足计算机网络教育的全部教学需求。本文介绍了我们设计和使用 Klonet（计算机网络教育仿真平台）的经验。 Klonet对于学生和导师来说都易于使用，经过精心设计，降低了使用门槛，从而使练习更加高效。 Klonet还表现出了良好的可扩展性。它采用基于容器的分布式架构以及为本平台定制的虚拟网络嵌入算法。评估实验表明，Klonet表现出更好的可扩展性，例如用更少的硬件资源（即服务器）支持更多的学生以及更快地部署虚拟网络拓扑。此外，为了保证教学过程中的稳定性，Klonet增强了上层编排器和底层虚拟网络的鲁棒性。截至目前，Klonet已在3所大学、4个课程中采用，服务超过800名学生。我们通过实际用例展示了 Klonet 在网络教育中的实用性，其中包括约 10,000 个模拟路由器的场景。我们还分享了 Klonet 4 年开发和 2 年运营的经验教训。

items.title: QuickUpdate: a Real-Time Personalization System for Large-Scale Recommendation Models.
items.abstract: Deep learning recommendation models play an important role in online companies and consume a major part of the AI infrastructure dedicated to training and inference. The accuracy of these models highly depends on how quickly they are published on the serving side. One of the main challenges in improving the model update latency and frequency is the model size, which has reached the order of Terabytes and is expected to further increase in the future. The large model size causes large latency (and write bandwidth) to update the model in geo-distributed servers. We present QuickUpdate, a system for real-time personalization of large-scale recommendation models, that publishes the model in high frequency as part of online training, providing serving accuracy that is comparable to that of a fully fresh model. The system employs novel techniques to minimize the required write bandwidth, including prioritized parameter updates, intermittent full model updates, model transformations, and relaxed consistency. We evaluate QuickUpdate using real-world data, on one of the largest production models in Meta. The results show that QuickUpdate provides serving accuracy that is comparable to a fully fresh model, while reducing the average published update size and the required bandwidth by over 13x. It provides a scalable solution for serving production models in real-time fashion, which is otherwise not feasible at scale due to the limited network and storage bandwidth.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习推荐模型在在线公司中发挥着重要作用，并消耗了专门用于训练和推理的人工智能基础设施的主要部分。这些模型的准确性很大程度上取决于它们在服务端发布的速度。改善模型更新延迟和频率的主要挑战之一是模型大小，其已达到 TB 量级，并且预计未来将进一步增加。较大的模型大小会导致在地理分布式服务器中更新模型时出现较大的延迟（和写入带宽）。我们推出了 QuickUpdate，这是一个用于大规模推荐模型实时个性化的系统，它作为在线训练的一部分高频次发布模型，提供与全新模型相当的服务准确性。该系统采用新颖的技术来最大限度地减少所需的写入带宽，包括优先参数更新、间歇性完整模型更新、模型转换和宽松一致性。我们使用 Meta 中最大的生产模型之一的真实数据来评估 QuickUpdate。结果表明，QuickUpdate 提供的服务准确性可与全新模型相媲美，同时将平均已发布更新大小和所需带宽减少 13 倍以上。它提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，用于以实时方式为生产模型提供服务，而由于网络和存储带宽有限，这种解决方案无法大规模实现。

items.title: Hairpin: Rethinking Packet Loss Recovery in Edge-based Interactive Video Streaming.
items.abstract: Interactive streaming requires minimizing stuttering events (or deadline misses for video frames) to ensure seamless interaction between users and applications. However, existing packet loss recovery mechanisms uniformly optimize redundancy for initial transmission and retransmission, which still could not satisfy the delay requirements of interactive streaming, but also introduces considerable bandwidth costs. Our insight is that in edge-based interactive streaming, differentiating retransmissions on redundancy settings can often achieve a low bandwidth cost and a low deadline miss rate simultaneously. In this paper, we propose Hairpin, a new packet loss recovery mechanism for edge-based interactive streaming. Hairpin finds the optimal combination of data packets, retransmissions, and redundant packets over multiple rounds of transmissions, which significantly reduces the bandwidth cost while ensuring the end-to-end latency requirement. Experiments with production deployments demonstrate that Hairpin can simultaneously reduce the bandwidth cost by 40% and the deadline miss rate by 32% on average in the wild against state-of-the-art solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 交互式流媒体需要最大限度地减少卡顿事件（或视频帧的截止日期错过），以确保用户和应用程序之间的无缝交互。然而，现有的丢包恢复机制对初传和重传统一优化冗余，仍然无法满足交互流的时延要求，而且还引入了相当大的带宽成本。我们的见解是，在基于边缘的交互式流媒体中，区分冗余设置的重传通常可以同时实现低带宽成本和低截止期限错过率。在本文中，我们提出了 Hairpin，一种用于基于边缘的交互式流媒体的新的丢包恢复机制。 Hairpin在多轮传输中找到数据包、重传和冗余包的最佳组合，在保证端到端延迟要求的同时，显着降低带宽成本。生产部署实验表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，Hairpin 可以同时将带宽成本平均降低 40%，并将截止日期错过率平均降低 32%。

items.title: Finding Adversarial Inputs for Heuristics using Multi-level Optimization.
items.abstract: Production systems use heuristics because they are faster or scale better than their optimal counterparts. Yet, practitioners are often unaware of the performance gap between a heuristic and the optimum or between two heuristics in realistic scenarios. MetaOpt is a system that helps analyze these heuristics. Users specify the heuristic and the optimal (or another heuristic) as input, and MetaOpt encodes these efficiently for a solver to find performance gaps and their corresponding adversarial inputs. Its suite of built-in optimizations helps it scale to practical problem sizes. We used MetaOpt to analyze heuristics from three domains (traffic engineering, vector bin packing, and packet scheduling). We found a production traffic engineering heuristic can require 30\% more capacity than the optimal in realistic cases. We modified the heuristic based on the patterns in the adversarial inputs MetaOpt discovered and reduced the performance gap by 12.5×. We examined adversarial inputs to a vector bin packing heuristic and proved a new lower bound on its performance.
items.abstract_zh: 生产系统使用启发式方法，因为它们比最佳对应系统更快或可扩展性更好。然而，从业者常常没有意识到启发式方法与最优方法之间或现实场景中两种启发式方法之间的性能差距。 MetaOpt 是一个帮助分析这些启发式方法的系统。用户指定启发式和最优（或其他启发式）作为输入，MetaOpt 对这些进行有效编码，以便求解器找到性能差距及其相应的对抗性输入。其内置优化套件有助于扩展到实际问题的规模。我们使用 MetaOpt 来分析三个领域的启发式方法（流量工程、向量装箱和数据包调度）。我们发现生产流量工程启发式需要的容量比实际情况下的最佳容量多 30%。我们根据 MetaOpt 发现的对抗性输入模式修改了启发式，并将性能差距缩小了 12.5 倍。我们检查了向量箱打包启发式的对抗性输入，并证明了其性能的新下限。

items.title: Solving Max-Min Fair Resource Allocations Quickly on Large Graphs.
items.abstract: We consider the max-min fair resource allocation problem. The best-known solutions use either a sequence of optimizations or waterfilling, which only applies to a narrow set of cases. These solutions have become a practical bottleneck in WAN traffic engineering and cluster scheduling, especially at larger problem sizes. We improve both approaches: (1) we show how to convert the optimization sequence into a single fast optimization, and (2) we generalize waterfilling to the multi-path case. We empirically show our new algorithms Pareto-dominate prior techniques: they produce faster, fairer, and more efficient allocations. Some of our allocators also have theoretical guarantees: they trade off a bounded amount of unfairness for faster allocation. We have deployed our allocators in Azure's WAN traffic engineering pipeline, where we preserve solution quality and achieve a roughly 3× speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 我们考虑最大-最小公平资源分配问题。最著名的解决方案使用一系列优化或注水，这仅适用于少数情况。这些解决方案已成为 WAN 流量工程和集群调度的实际瓶颈，尤其是在问题规模较大时。我们改进了这两种方法：（1）我们展示了如何将优化序列转换为单个快速优化，（2）我们将注水推广到多路径情况。我们凭经验证明我们的新算法帕累托主导现有技术：它们产生更快、更公平、更有效的分配。我们的一些分配者也有理论上的保证：他们会牺牲有限的不公平性来换取更快的分配。我们已在 Azure 的 WAN 流量工程管道中部署了分配器，在其中我们保持了解决方案质量并实现了大约 3 倍的加速。

items.title: UFO: The Ultimate QoS-Aware Core Management for Virtualized and Oversubscribed Public Clouds.
items.abstract: Public clouds typically adopt (1) multi-tenancy to increase server utilization; (2) virtualization to provide isolation between different tenants; (3) oversubscription of resources to further increase resource efficiency. However, prior work all focuses on optimizing one or two elements, and fails to considerately bring QoS-aware multi-tenancy, virtualization and resource oversubscription together. We find three challenges when the three elements coexist. First, the double scheduling symptoms are 10x worse with latency-critical (LC) workloads which are comprised of numerous sub-millisecond tasks and are significantly different from conventional batch applications. Second, inner-VM resource contention also exists between threads of the same VM when running LC applications, calling for inner-VM core isolation. Third, no application-level performance metrics can be obtained by the host to guide resource management in realistic public clouds. To address these challenges, we propose a QoS-aware core manager dubbed UFO to specifically support co-location of multiple LC workloads in virtualized and oversubscribed public cloud environments. UFO solves the three above-mentioned challenges, by (1) coordinating the guest and host CPU cores (vCPU-pCPU coordination), and (2) doing fine-grained inner-VM resource isolation, to push core management in realistic public clouds to the extreme. Compared with the state-of-the-art core manager, it saves up to 50% (average of 22%) of physical cores under the same co-location scenario.
items.abstract_zh: 公有云通常采用（1）多租户来提高服务器利用率； (2)虚拟化以提供不同租户之间的隔离； (3)超额认购资源，进一步提高资源效率。然而，现有的工作都集中在优化一两个元素上，而未能充分考虑将QoS感知的多租户、虚拟化和资源超额订阅结合在一起。当这三个要素共存时，我们发现了三个挑战。首先，对于延迟关键 (LC) 工作负载，双重调度症状会严重 10 倍，这些工作负载由大量亚毫秒级任务组成，与传统批处理应用程序显着不同。其次，运行LC应用时，同一VM的线程之间也存在VM内部资源争用，需要VM内部核心隔离。第三，主机无法获得应用程序级性能指标来指导现实公共云中的资源管理。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种名为 UFO 的 QoS 感知核心管理器，专门支持虚拟化和超额订阅的公共云环境中多个 LC 工作负载的共置。 UFO通过（1）协调Guest和Host CPU核心（vCPU-pCPU协调）和（2）进行细粒度的VM内部资源隔离来解决上述三个挑战，将现实公共云中的核心管理推向极致。与最先进的核心管理器相比，在相同的共置场景下最多可节省 50%（平均为 22%）的物理核心。

items.title: Automatic Parallelization of Software Network Functions.
items.abstract: Software network functions (NFs) trade-off flexibility and ease of deployment for an increased challenge of performance. The traditional way to increase NF performance is by distributing traffic to multiple CPU cores, but this poses a significant challenge: how to parallelize an NF without breaking its semantics? We propose Maestro, a tool that analyzes a sequential implementation of an NF and automatically generates an enhanced parallel version that carefully configures the NIC's Receive Side Scaling mechanism to distribute traffic across cores, while preserving semantics. When possible, Maestro orchestrates a shared-nothing architecture, with each core operating independently without shared memory coordination, maximizing performance. Otherwise, Maestro choreographs a fine-grained read-write locking mechanism that optimizes operation for typical Internet traffic. We parallelized 8 software NFs and show that they generally scale-up linearly until bottlenecked by PCIe when using small packets or by 100~Gbps line-rate with typical Internet traffic. Maestro further outperforms modern hardware-based transactional memory mechanisms, even for challenging parallel-unfriendly workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 软件网络功能 (NF) 需要权衡灵活性和易于部署性，以应对更大的性能挑战。提高 NF 性能的传统方法是将流量分配给多个 CPU 核心，但这提出了一个重大挑战：如何在不破坏其语义的情况下并行化 NF？我们提出了 Maestro，这是一种工具，可以分析 NF 的顺序实现并自动生成增强的并行版本，该版本仔细配置 NIC 的接收端扩展机制以跨内核分配流量，同时保留语义。在可能的情况下，Maestro 会编排无共享架构，每个核心独立运行，无需共享内存协调，从而最大限度地提高性能。除此之外，Maestro 精心设计了一种细粒度的读写锁定机制，可优化典型互联网流量的操作。我们并行化了 8 个软件 NF，并表明它们通常会线性扩展，直到使用小数据包时出现 PCIe 瓶颈，或者典型互联网流量出现 100~Gbps 线速时出现瓶颈。 Maestro 的性能进一步优于基于硬件的现代事务内存机制，即使对于具有挑战性的并行不友好的工作负载也是如此。

items.title: Harvesting Idle Memory for Application-managed Soft State with Midas.
items.abstract: Many applications can benefit from data that increases performance but is not required for correctness (commonly referred to as soft state ). Examples include cached data from backend web servers and memoized computations in data analytics systems. Today's systems generally statically limit the amount of memory they use for storing soft state in order to prevent unbounded growth that could exhaust the server's memory. Static provisioning, however, makes it difficult to respond to shifts in application demand for soft state and can leave significant amounts of memory idle. Existing OS kernels can only spend idle memory on caching disk blocks—which may not have the most utility—because they do not provide the right abstractions to safely allow applications to store their own soft state. To effectively manage and dynamically scale soft state, we propose soft memory , an elastic virtual memory abstraction with unmap-and-reconstruct semantics that makes it possible for applications to use idle memory to store whatever soft state they choose while guaranteeing both safety and efficiency. We present Midas, a soft memory management system that contains (1) a runtime that is linked to each application to manage soft memory objects and (2) OS kernel support that coordinates soft memory allocation between applications to maximize their performance. Our experiments with four real-world applications show that Midas can efficiently and safely harvest idle memory to store applications' soft state, delivering near-optimal application performance and responding to extreme memory pressure without running out of memory.
items.abstract_zh: 许多应用程序可以从提高性能但不需要正确性的数据中受益（通常称为软状态）。示例包括来自后端 Web 服务器的缓存数据和数据分析系统中的记忆计算。当今的系统通常静态地限制用于存储软状态的内存量，以防止无限制的增长，从而耗尽服务器的内存。然而，静态配置使得响应应用程序对软状态的需求变化变得困难，并且可能导致大量内存空闲。现有的操作系​​统内核只能将空闲内存用于缓存磁盘块，这可能没有最大的实用性，因为它们没有提供正确的抽象来安全地允许应用程序存储自己的软状态。为了有效管理和动态扩展软状态，我们提出了软内存，这是一种具有取消映射和重构语义的弹性虚拟内存抽象，使应用程序可以使用空闲内存来存储它们选择的任何软状态，同时保证安全性和效率。我们提出了 Midas，一种软内存管理系统，它包含 (1) 链接到每个应用程序以管理软内存对象的运行时，以及 (2) 操作系统内核支持，用于协调应用程序之间的软内存分配以最大限度地提高其性能。我们对四个实际应用程序的实验表明，Midas 可以高效、安全地收集空闲内存来存储应用程序的软状态，提供接近最佳的应用程序性能并响应极端的内存压力，而不会耗尽内存。

items.title: CASSINI: Network-Aware Job Scheduling in Machine Learning Clusters.
items.abstract: We present CASSINI, a network-aware job scheduler for machine learning (ML) clusters. CASSINI introduces a novel geometric abstraction to consider the communication pattern of different jobs while placing them on network links. To do so, CASSINI uses an Affinity graph that finds a series of time-shift values to adjust the communication phases of a subset of jobs, such that the communication patterns of jobs sharing the same network link are interleaved with each other. Experiments with 13 common ML models on a 24-server testbed demonstrate that compared to the state-of-the-art ML schedulers, CASSINI improves the average and tail completion time of jobs by up to 1.6x and 2.5x, respectively. Moreover, we show that CASSINI reduces the number of ECN marked packets in the cluster by up to 33x.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 CASSINI，一种用于机器学习 (ML) 集群的网络感知作业调度程序。 CASSINI 引入了一种新颖的几何抽象来考虑不同作业的通信模式，同时将它们放置在网络链路上。为此，CASSINI 使用亲和图查找一系列时移值来调整作业子集的通信阶段，以便共享同一网络链路的作业的通信模式彼此交错。在 24 台服务器测试台上对 13 个常见 ML 模型进行的实验表明，与最先进的 ML 调度程序相比，CASSINI 将作业的平均完成时间和尾部完成时间分别提高了 1.6 倍和 2.5 倍。此外，我们还发现 CASSINI 将集群中 ECN 标记数据包的数量减少了 33 倍。

items.title: SwiftPaxos: Fast Geo-Replicated State Machines.
items.abstract: Cloud services improve their availability by replicating data across sites in different geographical regions. A variety of state-machine replication protocols have been proposed for this setting that reduce the latency under workloads with low contention. However, when contention increases, these protocols may deliver lower performance than Paxos. This paper introduces SwiftPaxos—a protocol that lowers the best-case latency in comparison to Paxos without hurting the worst-case one. SwiftPaxos executes a command in 2 message delays if there is no contention, and in 3 message delays otherwise. To achieve this, the protocol allows replicas to vote on the order in which they receive state-machine commands. Differently from previous protocols, SwiftPaxos permits a replica to vote twice: first for its own ordering proposal, and then to follow the leader. This mechanism avoids restarting the voting process when a disagreement occurs among replicas, saving computation time and message delays. Our evaluation shows that the throughput of SwiftPaxos is up to 2.9x better than state-of-the-art alternatives.
items.abstract_zh: 云服务通过在不同地理区域的站点之间复制数据来提高其可用性。为此设置提出了各种状态机复制协议，以减少低争用工作负载下的延迟。然而，当争用增加时，这些协议的性能可能会低于 Paxos。本文介绍了 SwiftPaxos——一种与 Paxos 相比可以降低最佳情况延迟而不影响最坏情况延迟的协议。如果没有争用，SwiftPaxos 将在 2 个消息延迟内执行命令，否则在 3 个消息延迟内执行命令。为了实现这一点，该协议允许副本对它们接收状态机命令的顺序进行投票。与以前的协议不同，SwiftPaxos 允许副本投票两次：首先是为自己的排序提案投票，然后是跟随领导者。这种机制避免了当副本之间出现分歧时重新启动投票过程，从而节省了计算时间和消息延迟。我们的评估表明，SwiftPaxos 的吞吐量比最先进的替代方案高出 2.9 倍。

items.title: Swing: Short-cutting Rings for Higher Bandwidth Allreduce.
items.abstract: The allreduce collective operation accounts for a significant fraction of the runtime of workloads running on distributed systems. One factor determining its performance is the number of hops between communicating nodes, especially on networks like torus, where a higher number of hops implies multiple messages being forwarded on the same link, thus reducing the allreduce bandwidth. Torus networks are widely used on systems optimized for machine learning workloads (e.g., Google TPUs and Amazon Trainium devices), as well as on some of the Top500 supercomputers. To improve allreduce performance on torus networks we introduce Swing, a new algorithm that reduces the number of hops between communicating nodes by swinging between torus directions. Our analysis and experimental evaluation show that Swing outperforms by up to 3x existing allreduce algorithms for vectors ranging from 32B to 128MiB, on different types of torus and torus-like topologies, regardless of their shape and size.
items.abstract_zh: allreduce 集体操作占分布式系统上运行的工作负载运行时间的很大一部分。决定其性能的因素之一是通信节点之间的跳数，尤其是在像环面这样的网络上，跳数越高意味着在同一链路上转发多个消息，从而减少所有带宽。环面网络广泛应用于针对机器学习工作负载优化的系统（例如 Google TPU 和 Amazon Trainium 设备）以及一些 Top500 超级计算机上。为了提高环面网络上的 allreduce 性能，我们引入了 Swing，这是一种新算法，通过在环面方向之间摆动来减少通信节点之间的跳数。我们的分析和实验评估表明，对于 32B 到 128MiB 的矢量，在不同类型的环面和类环面拓扑上，Swing 的性能比现有的 allreduce 算法高出多达 3 倍，无论其形状和大小如何。

items.title: Cloud-LoRa: Enabling Cloud Radio Access LoRa Networks Using Reinforcement Learning Based Bandwidth-Adaptive Compression.
items.abstract: The Cloud Radio Access Network (CRAN) architecture has been proposed as a way of addressing the network throughput and scalability challenges of large-scale LoRa networks. CRANs can improve network throughput by coherently combining signals, and scale to multiple channels by implementing the receivers in the cloud. However, in remote LoRa deployments, a CRAN's demand for high-backhaul bandwidths can be challenging to meet. Therefore, bandwidth-aware compression of LoRa samples is needed to reap the benefits of CRANs. We introduce Cloud-LoRa, the first practical CRAN for LoRa, that can detect sub-noise LoRa signals and perform bandwidth-adaptive compression. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of CRAN for LoRa operating in real-time. We deploy Cloud-LoRa in an agricultural field over multiple days with USRP as the gateway. A cellular backhaul hotspot is then used to stream the compressed samples to a Microsoft Azure server. We demonstrate SNR gains of over 6 dB using joint multi-gateway decoding and over 2x throughput improvement using state-of-the-art receivers, enabled by CRAN in real-world deployments.
items.abstract_zh: 云无线接入网络 (CRAN) 架构已被提出作为解决大规模 LoRa 网络的网络吞吐量和可扩展性挑战的一种方法。 CRAN 可以通过连贯地组合信号来提高网络吞吐量，并通过在云中实施接收器来扩展到多个通道。然而，在远程 LoRa 部署中，CRAN 对高回程带宽的需求可能难以满足。因此，需要对 LoRa 样本进行带宽感知压缩才能获得 CRAN 的优势。我们推出了 Cloud-LoRa，这是第一个适用于 LoRa 的实用 CRAN，它可以检测亚噪声 LoRa 信号并执行带宽自适应压缩。据我们所知，这是 LoRa 实时运行的 CRAN 的首次演示。我们以 USRP 作为网关，在农业领域部署了几天的 Cloud-LoRa。然后使用蜂窝回程热点将压缩样本流式传输到 Microsoft Azure 服务器。我们展示了使用联合多网关解码可实现超过 6 dB 的 SNR 增益，以及使用最先进的接收器可将吞吐量提高 2 倍以上，这一切均由 CRAN 在实际部署中实现。

items.title: Netcastle: Network Infrastructure Testing At Scale.
items.abstract: Network operators have long struggled to achieve reliability. Increased complexity risks surprising interactions, increased downtime, and lost person-hours trying to debug correctness and performance problems in large systems. For these reasons, network operators have also long pushed back on deploying promising network research, fearing the unexpected consequences of increased network complexity. Despite the changes’ potential benefits, the corresponding increase in complexity may result in a net loss. The method to build reliability despite complexity in Software Engineering is testing. In this paper, we use statistics from a large-scale network to identify unique challenges in network testing. To tackle the challenges, we develop Netcastle: a system that provides continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) network testing as a service for 11 different networking teams, across 68 different use-cases, and O(1k) of test devices. Netcastle supports comprehensive network testing, including device-level firmware, datacenter distributed control planes, and backbone centralized controllers, and runs 500K+ network tests per day, a scale and depth of test coverage previously unpublished. We share five years of experiences in building and running Netcastle at Meta.
items.abstract_zh: 网络运营商长期以来一直在努力实现可靠性。复杂性的增加可能会带来令人惊讶的交互、增加停机时间以及尝试调试大型系统中的正确性和性能问题的工时损失。由于这些原因，网络运营商也长期以来一直推迟部署有前景的网络研究，担心网络复杂性增加会带来意想不到的后果。尽管这些变化有潜在的好处，但复杂性的相应增加可能会导致净损失。尽管软件工程很复杂，但构建可靠性的方法是测试。在本文中，我们使用大型网络的统计数据来识别网络测试中的独特挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们开发了 Netcastle：一个为 11 个不同的网络团队提供持续集成/持续部署 (CI/CD) 网络测试即服务、跨 68 个不同用例和 O(1k) 测试设备的系统。 Netcastle 支持全面的网络测试，包括设备级固件、数据中心分布式控制平面和骨干集中式控制器，每天运行 500K+ 网络测试，测试覆盖的规模和深度此前从未发布过。我们分享在 Meta 上构建和运行 Netcastle 五年的经验。

items.title: Spectrumize: Spectrum-efficient Satellite Networks for the Internet of Things.
items.abstract: Low Earth Orbit satellite constellations are gaining traction for providing connectivity to low-power outdoor Internet of Things (IoT) devices. This is made possible by the development of low-cost, low-complexity pico-satellites that can be easily launched, offering global connectivity without the need for Earth-based gateways. In this paper, we report the space-to-Earth communication bottlenecks derived from our experience of deploying an IoT satellite. Specifically, we characterize the challenges posed by the low link budgets, satellite motion, and packet collisions. To address these challenges, we design a new class of technique that use the Doppler shift caused by the satellite's motion as a unique signature for packet detection and decoding, even at low signal-to-noise ratios and in the presence of collisions. We integrate these techniques into our system, called Spectrumize, and evaluate its performance through both simulations and real-world deployments. Our evaluation shows that Spectrumize performs 3x better compared to classic approach in detecting packet with over 80% average accuracy in decoding.
items.abstract_zh: 近地轨道卫星星座因提供低功耗户外物联网 (IoT) 设备连接而受到越来越多的关注。这是通过开发低成本、低复杂性的微微卫星而实现的，这些卫星可以轻松发射，无需地面网关即可提供全球连接。在本文中，我们报告了根据我们部署物联网卫星的经验得出的空对地通信瓶颈。具体来说，我们描述了低链路预算、卫星运动和数据包冲突带来的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们设计了一种新型技术，即使在低信噪比和存在冲突的情况下，也可以使用卫星运动引起的多普勒频移作为数据包检测和解码的独特签名。我们将这些技术集成到我们的系统中，称为 Spectrumize，并通过模拟和实际部署来评估其性能。我们的评估表明，与传统方法相比，Spectrumize 在检测数据包方面的性能提高了 3 倍，解码的平均准确率超过 80%。

items.title: Where The Wild Things Are: Brute-Force SSH Attacks In The Wild And How To Stop Them.
items.abstract: SSH (Secure Shell) is widely used for remote access to systems and cloud services. This access comes with the persistent threat of SSH password-guessing brute-force attacks (BFAs) directed at sshd-enabled devices connected to the Internet. In this work, we present a comprehensive study of such attacks on a production facility (CloudLab), offering previously unreported insight. Our study provides a detailed analysis of SSH BFAs occurring on the Internet today through an in-depth analysis of sshd logs collected over a period of four years from over 500 servers. We report several patterns in attacker behavior, present insight on the targets of the attacks, and devise a method for tracking individual attacks over time across sources. Leveraging our insight, we develop a defense mechanism against SSH BFAs that blocks 99.5% of such attacks, significantly outperforming the 66.1% coverage of current state-of-the-art rate-based blocking while also cutting false positives by 83%. We have deployed our defense in production on CloudLab, where it catches four-fifths of SSH BFAs missed by other defense strategies.
items.abstract_zh: SSH（Secure Shell）广泛用于远程访问系统和云服务。这种访问伴随着针对连接到互联网的启用 sshd 的设备的 SSH 密码猜测暴力攻击 (BFA) 的持续威胁。在这项工作中，我们对生产设施 (CloudLab) 的此类攻击进行了全面研究，提供了以前未报告的见解。我们的研究通过对四年来从 500 多台服务器收集的 sshd 日志进行深入分析，对当今互联网上发生的 SSH BFA 进行了详细分析。我们报告了攻击者行为的几种模式，提供了对攻击目标的洞察，并设计了一种跨来源跟踪单个攻击的方法。利用我们的洞察力，我们开发了一种针对 SSH BFA 的防御机制，可以阻止 99.5% 的此类攻击，显着优于当前最先进的基于速率的阻止的 66.1% 覆盖率，同时还将误报率降低了 83%。我们已在 CloudLab 上的生产中部署了防御，它捕获了其他防御策略错过的五分之四的 SSH BFA。

items.title: MESSI: Behavioral Testing of BGP Implementations.
items.abstract: Complex network protocols like the Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) are prone to implementation errors that cause unintended behaviors with potentially global consequences. We introduce an approach and tool called MESSI (Modular Exploration of State and Structure Inclusively) to automatically generate tests for black-box BGP implementations. Our approach is model-based, leveraging an executable model of BGP to generate behavioral tests. However, doing so effectively requires addressing new challenges such as the stateful nature of BGP and the need to generate complex structures like regular expressions in route maps. We used MESSI to generate roughly 150K tests that capture different aspects of BGP, such as route-map filtering, the decision process, route aggregation, and dynamics. These tests identified 22 correctness bugs across several widely used open-source BGP implementations (FRR, Quagga, GoBGP, BIRD, Batfish) and one closed-source implementation. Eight of these errors have already been fixed. While our models are BGP-specific our approach is not: thus we expect it can be adapted to test other stateful protocols with complex structures.
items.abstract_zh: 边界网关协议 (BGP) 等复杂的网络协议很容易出现实施错误，从而导致意外行为，并可能造成全球后果。我们引入了一种称为 MESSI（包含状态和结构的模块化探索）的方法和工具，用于自动生成黑盒 BGP 实现的测试。我们的方法是基于模型的，利用 BGP 的可执行模型来生成行为测试。然而，有效地做到这一点需要解决新的挑战，例如 BGP 的状态性质以及生成复杂结构（如路由映射中的正则表达式）的需要。我们使用 MESSI 生成了大约 15 万个测试，捕获 BGP 的不同方面，例如路由映射过滤、决策过程、路由聚合和动态。这些测试发现了几种广泛使用的开源 BGP 实现（FRR、Quagga、GoBGP、BIRD、Batfish）和一种闭源实现中的 22 个正确性错误。其中八个错误已得到修复。虽然我们的模型是特定于 BGP 的，但我们的方法不是：因此我们希望它可以适用于测试具有复杂结构的其他有状态协议。

items.title: Gemino: Practical and Robust Neural Compression for Video Conferencing.
items.abstract: Video conferencing systems suffer from poor user experience when network conditions deteriorate because current video codecs simply cannot operate at extremely low bitrates. Recently, several neural alternatives have been proposed that reconstruct talking head videos at very low bitrates using sparse representations of each frame such as facial landmark information. However, these approaches produce poor reconstructions in scenarios with major movement or occlusions over the course of a call, and do not scale to higher resolutions. We design Gemino, a new neural compression system for video conferencing based on a novel high-frequency-conditional super-resolution pipeline. Gemino upsamples a very low-resolution version of each target frame while enhancing high-frequency details (e.g., skin texture, hair, etc.) based on information extracted from a single high-resolution reference image. We use a multi-scale architecture that runs different components of the model at different resolutions, allowing it to scale to resolutions comparable to 720p, and we personalize the model to learn specific details of each person, achieving much better fidelity at low bitrates. We implement Gemino atop aiortc, an open-source Python implementation of WebRTC, and show that it operates on 1024x1024 videos in real-time on a Titan X GPU, and achieves 2.2–5x lower bitrate than traditional video codecs for the same perceptual quality.
items.abstract_zh: 当网络条件恶化时，视频会议系统的用户体验会很差，因为当前的视频编解码器根本无法在极低的比特率下运行。最近，已经提出了几种神经替代方案，使用每帧的稀疏表示（例如面部标志信息）以非常低的比特率重建头部说话视频。然而，这些方法在通话过程中发生重大移动或遮挡的场景中会产生较差的重建效果，并且无法扩展到更高分辨率。我们设计了 Gemino，这是一种基于新颖的高频条件超分辨率管道的新型视频会议神经压缩系统。 Gemino 对每个目标帧的极低分辨率版本进行上采样，同时根据从单个高分辨率参考图像中提取的信息增强高频细节（例如皮肤纹理、头发等）。我们使用多尺度架构，以不同的分辨率运行模型的不同组件，使其能够扩展到与 720p 相当的分辨率，并且我们对模型进行个性化以了解每个人的具体细节，从而在低比特率下实现更好的保真度。我们在 aiortc（WebRTC 的开源 Python 实现）之上实现了 Gemino，并表明它可以在 Titan X GPU 上实时处理 1024x1024 视频，并且在相同的感知质量下实现比传统视频编解码器低 2.2-5 倍的比特率。

items.title: OPPerTune: Post-Deployment Configuration Tuning of Services Made Easy.
items.abstract: Real-world application deployments have hundreds of inter-dependent configuration parameters, many of which significantly influence performance and efficiency. With today's complex and dynamic services, operators need to continuously monitor and set the right configuration values (configuration tuning) well after a service is widely deployed. This is challenging since experimenting with different configurations post-deployment may reduce application performance or cause disruptions. While state-of-the-art ML approaches do help to automate configuration tuning, they do not fully address the multiple challenges in end-to-end configuration tuning of deployed applications. This paper presents OpperTune, a service that enables configuration tuning of applications in deployment at Microsoft. OpperTune reduces application interruptions while maximizing the performance of deployed applications as and when the workload or the underlying infrastructure changes. It automates three essential processes that facilitate post-deployment configuration tuning: (a) determining which configurations to tune, (b) automatically managing the scope at which to tune the configurations, and (c) using a novel reinforcement learning algorithm to simultaneously and quickly tune numerical and categorical configurations, thereby keeping the overhead of configuration tuning low. We deploy OpperTune on two enterprise applications in Microsoft Azure's clusters. Our experiments show that OpperTune reduces the end-to-end P95 latency of microservice applications by more than 50% over expert configuration choices made ahead of deployment. The code and datasets used are made available at https://aka.ms/OPPerTune .
items.abstract_zh: 现实世界的应用程序部署有数百个相互依赖的配置参数，其中许多参数显着影响性能和效率。面对当今复杂且动态的服务，运营商需要在服务广泛部署后持续监控并设置正确的配置值（配置调整）。这是具有挑战性的，因为在部署后尝试不同的配置可能会降低应用程序性能或导致中断。虽然最先进的机器学习方法确实有助于自动化配置调整，但它们并不能完全解决已部署应用程序的端到端配置调整中的多重挑战。本文介绍了 OpperTune，这是一项能够在 Microsoft 部署中对应用程序进行配置调整的服务。当工作负载或底层基础设施发生变化时，OpperTune 可以减少应用程序中断，同时最大限度地提高已部署应用程序的性能。它自动化了促进部署后配置调整的三个基本过程：(a) 确定要调整的配置，(b) 自动管理调整配置的范围，以及 (c) 使用新颖的强化学习算法来同时快速调整数字和分类配置，从而保持较低的配置调整开销。我们在 Microsoft Azure 集群中的两个企业应用程序上部署 OpperTune。我们的实验表明，与部署前的专家配置选择相比，OpperTune 将微服务应用程序的端到端 P95 延迟降低了 50% 以上。使用的代码和数据集可从 https://aka.ms/OPPerTune 获取。

items.title: AutoSketch: Automatic Sketch-Oriented Compiler for Query-driven Network Telemetry.
items.abstract: Recent network telemetry witnesses tremendous progress in two directions: query-driven telemetry that targets expressiveness as the primary goal, and sketch-based algorithms that address resource-accuracy trade-offs. In this paper, we propose AutoSketch that aims to integrate the advantages of both classes. In a nutshell, AutoSketch automatically compiles high-level operators into sketch instances that can be readily deployed with low resource usage and incur limited accuracy drop. However, there remains a gap between the expressiveness of high-level operators and the underlying realization of sketch algorithms. AutoSketch bridges this gap in three aspects. First, AutoSketch extends its interface derived from existing query-driven telemetry such that users can specify the desired telemetry accuracy. The specified accuracy intent will be utilized to guide the compiling procedure. Second, AutoSketch leverages various techniques, such as syntax analysis and performance estimation, to construct efficient sketch instances. Finally, AutoSketch automatically searches for the most suitable parameter configurations that fulfill the accuracy intent with minimum resource usage. Our experiments demonstrate that AutoSketch can achieve high expressiveness, high accuracy, and low resource usage compared to state-of-the-art telemetry solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的网络遥测在两个方向取得了巨大进展：以表达能力为主要目标的查询驱动遥测，以及解决资源准确性权衡的基于草图的算法。在本文中，我们提出了 AutoSketch，旨在整合这两个类别的优点。简而言之，AutoSketch 自动将高级运算符编译为草图实例，这些实例可以轻松部署，资源占用率低，并且精度下降有限。然而，高级算子的表达能力与草图算法的底层实现之间仍然存在差距。 AutoSketch 在三个方面弥补了这一差距。首先，AutoSketch 扩展了其源自现有查询驱动遥测的接口，以便用户可以指定所需的遥测精度。指定的准确性意图将用于指导编译过程。其次，AutoSketch 利用语法分析和性能估计等各种技术来构建高效的草图实例。最后，AutoSketch 会自动搜索最合适的参数配置，以最少的资源使用满足精度意图。我们的实验表明，与最先进的遥测解决方案相比，AutoSketch 可以实现高表现力、高精度和低资源占用。

items.title: Known Knowns and Unknowns: Near-realtime Earth Observation Via Query Bifurcation in Serval.
items.abstract: Earth observation satellites, in low Earth orbits, are increasingly approaching near-continuous imaging of the Earth. Today, these satellites capture an image of every part of Earth every few hours. However, the networking capabilities haven’t caught up, and can introduce delays of few hours to days in getting these images to Earth. While this delay is acceptable for delay-tolerant applications like land cover maps, crop type identification, etc., it is unacceptable for latency-sensitive applications like forest fire detection or disaster monitoring. We design Serval to enable near-realtime insights from Earth imagery for latency-sensitive applications despite the networking bottlenecks by leveraging the emerging computational capabilities on the satellites and ground stations. The key challenge for our work stems from the limited computational capabilities and power resources available on a satellite. We solve this challenge by leveraging predictability in satellite orbits to bifurcate computation across satellites and ground stations. We evaluate Serval using trace-driven simulations and hardware emulations on a dataset comprising ten million images captured using the Planet Dove constellation comprising nearly 200 satellites. Serval reduces end-to-end latency for high priority queries from 71.71 hours (incurred by state of the art) to 2 minutes, and 90-th percentile from 149 hours to 47 minutes.
items.abstract_zh: 近地轨道上的地球观测卫星越来越接近对地球进行近乎连续的成像。如今，这些卫星每隔几个小时就会捕获地球各个部分的图像。然而，网络能力还没有跟上，并且可能会导致这些图像到达地球时延迟几小时到几天。虽然这种延迟对于土地覆盖图、作物类型识别等延迟容忍的应用程序是可以接受的，但对于森林火灾检测或灾害监测等延迟敏感的应用程序来说，这是不可接受的。我们设计 Serval 的目的是通过利用卫星和地面站上新兴的计算能力，尽管存在网络瓶颈，但仍可以从地球图像中获得近乎实时的洞察，从而满足对延迟敏感的应用程序的需求。我们工作的主要挑战源于卫星上可用的计算能力和电力资源有限。我们通过利用卫星轨道的可预测性来跨卫星和地面站进行分叉计算来解决这一挑战。我们使用跟踪驱动的模拟和硬件模拟对包含近 200 颗卫星的 Planet Dove 星座捕获的一千万张图像的数据集进行评估。 Serval 将高优先级查询的端到端延迟从 71.71 小时（由最先进的技术产生）减少到 2 分钟，将第 90 个百分点的延迟从 149 小时减少到 47 分钟。

items.title: ARTEMIS: Adaptive Bitrate Ladder Optimization for Live Video Streaming.
items.abstract: Live streaming of segmented videos over the Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP) is increasingly popular and serves heterogeneous clients by offering each segment in multiple representations. A bitrate ladder expresses this choice as an ordered list of bitrate-resolution pairs. Whereas existing solutions for HTTP-based live streaming use a static bitrate ladder, the fixed ladders struggle to appropriately accommodate the dynamics in the video content and network-conditioned client capabilities. This paper proposes ARTEMIS as a practical scalable alternative that dynamically configures the bitrate ladder depending on the content complexity, network conditions, and clients' statistics. ARTEMIS seamlessly integrates with the end-to-end streaming pipeline and operates transparently to video encoders and clients. We develop a cloud-based implementation of ARTEMIS and conduct extensive real-world and trace-driven experiments. The experimental comparison vs. existing prominent bitrate ladders demonstrates that live streaming with ARTEMIS outperforms all baselines, reduces encoding computation by 25%, end-to-end latency by 18%, and increases quality of experience by 11%.
items.abstract_zh: 通过超文本传输​​协议 (HTTP) 进行分段视频直播越来越受欢迎，并通过以多种表示形式提供每个片段来服务于异构客户端。比特率阶梯将这种选择表示​​为比特率-分辨率对的有序列表。虽然现有的基于 HTTP 的实时流媒体解决方案使用静态比特率阶梯，但固定阶梯很难适当适应视频内容的动态和网络条件客户端功能。本文提出 ARTEMIS 作为一种实用的可扩展替代方案，可根据内容复杂性、网络条件和客户端统计数据动态配置比特率阶梯。 ARTEMIS 与端到端流媒体管道无缝集成，并对视频编码器和客户端透明地运行。我们开发基于云的 ARTEMIS 实施，并进行广泛的现实世界和跟踪驱动的实验。与现有著名比特率阶梯的实验比较表明，使用 ARTEMIS 进行直播的性能优于所有基线，将编码计算量减少了 25%，端到端延迟减少了 18%，并将体验质量提高了 11%。

items.title: NetAssistant: Dialogue Based Network Diagnosis in Data Center Networks.
items.abstract: In large-scale data center networks, answering network diagnosis queries from users still heavily rely on manual oncall services. A widespread scenario is when network users query whether any network issue is causing problems with their services/applications. However, this approach requires extensive experience and considerable efforts from network engineers who must repeatedly go through lots of monitoring dashboards and logs. It is notoriously slow, error-prone, and costly. We ask: is this the right solution, given the state of the art in network intelligence? To answer, we first extensively study thousands of real network diagnosis cases and provide insights into how to address these issues more efficiently. Then we propose an AI enabled diagnosis framework and instantiate it in a task-oriented dialogue based diagnosis system, or colloquially, a chatbot, called NetAssistant. It accepts questions in natural language and performs proper diagnosis workflows in a timely manner. NetAssistant has been deployed and running in the data centers of our company for more than three years with hundreds of usages every day. We show it significantly decreases the number and duration of human involved oncalls. We share our experience on how to make it reliable and trustworthy and showcase how it helps solve real production issues efficiently.
items.abstract_zh: 在大规模数据中心网络中，回答用户的网络诊断查询仍然严重依赖人工oncall服务。一种普遍的情况是网络用户询问是否有任何网络问题导致其服务/应用程序出现问题。然而，这种方法需要网络工程师丰富的经验和大量的努力，他们必须反复检查大量的监控仪表板和日志。众所周知，它速度慢、容易出错且成本高昂。我们问：考虑到网络智能的最新水平，这是正确的解决方案吗？为了回答这个问题，我们首先广泛研究了数千个真实的网络诊断案例，并提供了如何更有效地解决这些问题的见解。然后，我们提出了一个人工智能支持的诊断框架，并将其实例化在一个基于任务的对话诊断系统中，或者通俗地说，一个聊天机器人，称为 NetAssistant。它接受自然语言的问题并及时执行正确的诊断工作流程。 NetAssistant已经在我们公司的数据中心部署和运行了三年多，每天有数百次使用。我们发现它显着减少了待命人员的数量和持续时间。我们分享如何使其可靠且值得信赖的经验，并展示它如何帮助有效解决实际生产问题。

items.title: NN-Defined Modulator: Reconfigurable and Portable Software Modulator on IoT Gateways.
items.abstract: A physical-layer modulator is a vital component for an IoT gateway to map the symbols to signals. However, due to the soldered hardware chipsets on the gateway's motherboards or the diverse toolkits on different platforms for the software radio, the existing solutions either have limited extensibility or are platform specific. Such limitation is hard to ignore when modulation schemes and hardware platforms have become extremely diverse. This paper presents a new paradigm of using neural networks as an abstraction layer for physical layer modulators in IoT gateway devices, referred to as NN-defined modulators. Our approach addresses the challenges of extensibility and portability for multiple technologies on various hardware platforms. The proposed NN-defined modulator uses a model-driven methodology rooted in solid mathematical foundations while having native support for hardware acceleration and portability to heterogeneous platforms.
