We conduct the evaluation of NN-defined modulators on different platforms, including Nvidia Jetson Nano, Raspberry Pi. Evaluations demonstrate that our NN-defined modulator effectively operates as conventional modulators and provides significant efficiency gains (up to 4.7× on Nvidia Jetson Nano and 1.1× on Raspberry Pi), indicating high portability. Furthermore, we show the real-world applications using our NN-defined modulators to generate ZigBee and WiFi packets, which are compliant with commodity TI CC2650 (ZigBee) and Intel AX201 (WiFi NIC) respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 物理层调制器是物联网网关将符号映射到信号的重要组件。然而，由于网关主板上焊接的硬件芯片组或不同平台上用于软件无线电的不同工具包，现有的解决方案要么具有有限的可扩展性，要么是特定于平台的。当调制方案和硬件平台变得极其多样化时，这种限制很难被忽视。本文提出了一种使用神经网络作为物联网网关设备中物理层调制器的抽象层的新范例，称为神经网络定义的调制器。我们的方法解决了各种硬件平台上多种技术的可扩展性和可移植性的挑战。所提出的神经网络定义的调制器使用植根于坚实数学基础的模型驱动方法，同时具有对硬件加速和异构平台可移植性的本机支持。我们在不同平台上对神经网络定义的调制器进行了评估，包括 Nvidia Jetson Nano、Raspberry Pi。评估表明，我们的神经网络定义的调制器可以像传统调制器一样有效地运行，并提供显着的效率增益（在 Nvidia Jetson Nano 上最高可达 4.7 倍，在 Raspberry Pi 上最高可达 1.1 倍），这表明了高可移植性。此外，我们还展示了使用 NN 定义的调制器生成 ZigBee 和 WiFi 数据包的实际应用，这些数据包分别符合商品 TI CC2650 (ZigBee) 和 Intel AX201 (WiFi NIC) 的要求。

items.title: Autothrottle: A Practical Bi-Level Approach to Resource Management for SLO-Targeted Microservices.
items.abstract: Achieving resource efficiency while preserving end-user experience is non-trivial for cloud application operators. As cloud applications progressively adopt microservices, resource managers are faced with two distinct levels of system behavior: end-to-end application latency and per-service resource usage. Translating between the two levels, however, is challenging because user requests traverse heterogeneous services that collectively (but unevenly) contribute to the end-to-end latency. We present Autothrottle , a bi-level resource management framework for microservices with latency SLOs (service-level objectives). It architecturally decouples application SLO feedback from service resource control, and bridges them through the notion of performance targets. Specifically, an application-wide learning-based controller is employed to periodically set performance targets—expressed as CPU throttle ratios—for per-service heuristic controllers to attain. We evaluate Autothrottle on three microservice applications, with workload traces from production scenarios. Results show superior CPU savings, up to 26.21% over the best-performing baseline and up to 93.84% over all baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 对于云应用运营商来说，在保持最终用户体验的同时实现资源效率并非易事。随着云应用程序逐渐采用微服务，资源管理器面临着两个不同级别的系统行为：端到端应用程序延迟和每个服务的资源使用情况。然而，在两个级别之间进行转换具有挑战性，因为用户请求遍历异构服务，这些服务共同（但不均匀）导致端到端延迟。我们推出了 Autothrottle，这是一种针对具有延迟 SLO（服务级别目标）的微服务的双层资源管理框架。它在架构上将应用程序 SLO 反馈与服务资源控制解耦，并通过性能目标的概念将它们联系起来。具体来说，采用基于应用程序学习的控制器来定期设置性能目标（以 CPU 节流比率表示），以实现每个服务启发式控制器的目标。我们在三个微服务应用程序上评估 Autothrottle，并使用来自生产场景的工作负载跟踪。结果显示，CPU 节省率出色，比最佳性能基准节省高达 26.21%，比所有基准节省高达 93.84%。

items.title: SMUFF: Towards Line Rate Wi-Fi Direct Transport with Orchestrated On-device Buffer Management.
items.abstract: Wi-Fi direct transport provides versatile connectivity that enables convenient data sharing and improves the productivity of mobile end users. However, as today's smartphones are capable of near-Gbps wireless data rates, current solutions do not efficiently utilize the available bandwidth in this single-hop environment. We show that existing transport schemes suffer from resource-intensive reliable delivery mechanisms, inadequate congestion control, and inefficient flow control for achieving line-rate transmission in peer-to-peer Wi-Fi direct links. In this paper, we present SMUFF, a reliable file transfer service that achieves nearly the practical line rate of the underlying wireless bandwidth. We note a unique feature of direct transport—the sender can monitor each buffer along the data path and determine an optimal sending rate accordingly. Therefore, SMUFF can maximize throughput by strategically backlogging the appropriate amount of data in the bottleneck buffer. We have deployed SMUFF on four different phone models, and our evaluations with other transport schemes show that SMUFF achieves up to 94.7% of the practical line rate and 22.6% throughput improvement with a 37% reduction in CPU usage and a 15% reduction in power consumption, compared to state-of-the-art solutions.
items.abstract_zh: Wi-Fi 直连传输提供多功能连接，可实现便捷的数据共享并提高移动终端用户的工作效率。然而，由于当今的智能手机能够实现接近 Gbps 的无线数据速率，因此当前的解决方案无法有效利用这种单跳环境中的可用带宽。我们表明，现有的传输方案存在资源密集型的可靠传输机制、拥塞控制不足以及在点对点 Wi-Fi 直接链路中实现线速传输的低效流量控制等问题。在本文中，我们提出了 SMUFF，这是一种可靠的文件传输服务，可实现接近底层无线带宽的实际线路速率。我们注意到直接传输的一个独特功能 - 发送方可以监视数据路径上的每个缓冲区并相应地确定最佳发送速率。因此，SMUFF 可以通过策略性地在瓶颈缓冲区中积压适当数量的数据来最大化吞吐量。我们在四种不同的手机型号上部署了 SMUFF，我们对其他传输方案的评估表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，SMUFF 实现了高达 94.7% 的实际线路速率和 22.6% 的吞吐量提升，同时 CPU 使用率降低了 37%，功耗降低了 15%。

items.title: Pudica: Toward Near-Zero Queuing Delay in Congestion Control for Cloud Gaming.
items.abstract: Congestion control (CC) plays a pivotal role in cloud gaming services. However, existing CC methods often cause self-induced bottleneck queuing. As a result, they may largely delay game frame transmission and undermine the player's gaming experience. We present a new end-to-end CC algorithm named Pudica that strives to achieve near-zero queuing delay and high link utilization while respecting cross-flow fairness. Pudica introduces several judicious approaches to utilize the paced frame to probe the bandwidth utilization ratio (BUR) instead of bandwidth itself. By leveraging BUR estimations, Pudica designs a holistic bitrate adjustment policy to balance low queuing, efficiency, and fairness. We conducted thorough and comprehensive evaluations in real networks. In comparison to baseline methods, Pudica reduces the average and tailed frame delay by 3.1× and 4.9× respectively, and cuts down the stall rate by 10.3×. Meanwhile, it increases the frame bitrate by 12.1\%. Pudica has been deployed in a large-scale cloud gaming platform, serving millions of players.
items.abstract_zh: 拥塞控制（CC）在云游戏服务中发挥着关键作用。然而，现有的CC方法经常会导致自引发的瓶颈排队。因此，它们可能会很大程度上延迟游戏帧传输并破坏玩家的游戏体验。我们提出了一种名为 Pudica 的新端到端 CC 算法，该算法力求在尊重交叉流公平性的同时实现接近零的排队延迟和高链路利用率。 Pudica 引入了几种明智的方法来利用定步帧来探测带宽利用率 (BUR)，而不是带宽本身。通过利用 BUR 估算，Pudica 设计了整体码率调整策略，以平衡低排队、效率和公平性。我们在真实网络中进行了彻底、全面的评估。与基线方法相比，Pudica 的平均帧延迟和尾帧延迟分别降低了 3.1 倍和 4.9 倍，停顿率降低了 10.3 倍。同时，帧比特率提高了12.1%。 Pudica已部署在大型云游戏平台，服务数百万玩家。

items.title: The Eternal Tussle: Exploring the Role of Centralization in IPFS.
items.abstract: Web centralization and consolidation has created potential single points of failure, e.g., in areas such as content hosting, name resolution, and certification. The "Decentralized Web", led by open-source software implementations, attempts to build decentralized alternatives. The InterPlanetary File System (IPFS) is part of this effort and attempts to provide a decentralized layer for object storage and retrieval. This comes with challenges, though: Decentralization can increase complexity, overhead, as well as compromise performance and scalability. As the core maintainers of IPFS, we have therefore begun to explore more hybrid approaches. This paper reports on our experiences building three centralized components within IPFS: (i) InterPlanetary Network Indexers, which provides an alternative centralized method for content indexing; (ii) Hydra Boosters, which are strategic DHT nodes that assist IPFS in content routing; and (iii) HTTP Gateways, which are a public access point for users to retrieve IPFShosted content. Through this approach, we trade-off the level of decentralization within IPFS in an attempt to gain certain benefits of centralization. We evaluate the performance of these components and demonstrate their ability to successfully address the challenges that IPFS faces.
items.abstract_zh: Web 集中化和整合造成了潜在的单点故障，例如在内容托管、名称解析和认证等领域。以开源软件实现为主导的“去中心化网络”试图构建去中心化的替代方案。星际文件系统（IPFS）是这项工作的一部分，试图为对象存储和检索提供一个分散的层。但这也带来了挑战：去中心化会增加复杂性和开销，并会影响性能和可扩展性。作为IPFS的核心维护者，我们因此开始探索更多混合方法。本文报告了我们在 IPFS 中构建三个集中式组件的经验：（i）星际网络索引器，它为内容索引提供了另一种集中式方法； (ii) Hydra Booster，这是协助 IPFS 进行内容路由的战略 DHT 节点； (iii) HTTP 网关，这是用户检索 IPFS 托管内容的公共访问点。通过这种方法，我们权衡 IPFS 内的去中心化程度，试图获得中心化的某些好处。我们评估这些组件的性能，并证明它们成功解决 IPFS 面临的挑战的能力。

items.title: Cloudcast: High-Throughput, Cost-Aware Overlay Multicast in the Cloud.
items.abstract: Bulk data replication across multiple cloud regions and providers is essential for large organizations to support data analytics, disaster recovery, and geo-distributed model serving. However, data multicast in the cloud can be expensive due to network egress costs and slow due to cloud network constraints. In this paper, we study the design of high-throughput, cost-optimized overlay multicast for bulk cloud data replication that exploits trends in modern provider pricing models along with techniques like ephemeral waypoints to minimize cloud networking costs. To that end, we design an optimization algorithm that uses information about cloud network throughput and pricing to identify cost-minimizing multicast replication trees under user-given runtime budgets. Our open-source implementation, Cloudcast, is used for cloud overlay multicast that supports pluggable algorithms for determining the multicast tree structure. Our evaluations show that Cloudcast achieves 61.5% cost reduction and 2.3× replication speedup compared to both academic and commercial baselines (e.g., AWS multi-region bucket) for multi-region replication.
items.abstract_zh: 跨多个云区域和提供商的批量数据复制对于大型组织支持数据分析、灾难恢复和地理分布式模型服务至关重要。然而，由于网络出口成本，云中的数据多播可能会很昂贵，并且由于云网络限制而速度缓慢。在本文中，我们研究了用于批量云数据复制的高吞吐量、成本优化的覆盖多播的设计，该设计利用现代提供商定价模型的趋势以及临时路径点等技术来最大限度地降低云网络成本。为此，我们设计了一种优化算法，该算法使用有关云网络吞吐量和定价的信息来识别用户给定的运行时预算下成本最小化的多播复制树。我们的开源实现 Cloudcast 用于云覆盖多播，支持用于确定多播树结构的可插入算法。我们的评估显示，与多区域复制的学术和商业基准（例如 AWS 多区域存储桶）相比，Cloudcast 实现了 61.5% 的成本降低和 2.3 倍的复制加速。

items.title: Can't Be Late: Optimizing Spot Instance Savings under Deadlines.
items.abstract: Cloud providers offer spot instances alongside on-demand instances to optimize resource utilization. While economically appealing, spot instances’ preemptible nature causes them ill-suited for deadline-sensitive jobs. To allow jobs to meet deadlines while leveraging spot instances, we propose a simple idea: use on-demand instances judiciously as a backup resource. However, due to the unpredictable spot instance availability, determining when to switch between spot and on-demand to minimize cost requires careful policy design. In this paper, we first provide an in-depth characterization of spot instances (e.g., availability, pricing, duration), and develop a basic theoretical model to examine the worst and average-case behaviors of baseline policies (e.g., greedy). The model serves as a foundation to motivate our design of a simple and effective policy, Uniform Progress, which is parameter-free and requires no assumptions on spot availability. Our empirical study, based on three-month-long real spot availability traces on AWS, demonstrates that it can (1) outperform the greedy policy by closing the gap to the optimal policy by 2× in both average and bad cases, and (2) further reduce the gap when limited future knowledge is given. These results hold in a variety of conditions ranging from loose to tight deadlines, low to high spot availability, and on single or multiple instances. By implementing this policy on top of SkyPilot, an intercloud broker system, we achieve 27%-84% cost savings across a variety of representative real-world workloads and deadlines. The spot availability traces are open-sourced for future research.
items.abstract_zh: 云提供商提供现货实例和按需实例，以优化资源利用率。虽然在经济上很有吸引力，但现场实例的抢占性质导致它们不适合对截止日期敏感的工作。为了让作业在利用现货实例的同时按时完成任务，我们提出了一个简单的想法：明智地使用按需实例作为备份资源。然而，由于现货实例可用性不可预测，确定何时在现货实例和按需实例之间切换以最大限度地降低成本需要仔细的策略设计。在本文中，我们首先提供了现货实例的深入特征（例如可用性、定价、持续时间），并开发了一个基本理论模型来检查基线策略的最坏和平均情况行为（例如贪婪）。该模型是激励我们设计简单有效的政策“Uniform Progress”的基础，该政策是无参数的，并且不需要对现货可用性进行假设。我们的实证研究基于 AWS 上长达三个月的实际现货可用性跟踪，表明它可以 (1) 在平均情况和不良情况下将与最优策略的差距缩小 2 倍，从而超越贪婪策略；(2) 在给出有限的未来知识时进一步缩小差距。这些结果适用于各种条件，从宽松到严格的截止日期、从低到高的现货可用性以及单个或多个实例。通过在跨云代理系统 SkyPilot 上实施此策略，我们在各种具有代表性的实际工作负载和截止日期内实现了 27%-84% 的成本节省。现货可用性跟踪是开源的，以供未来研究。

items.title: Efficient Exposure of Partial Failure Bugs in Distributed Systems with Inferred Abstract States.
items.abstract: Many distributed system failures, especially the notorious partial service failures, are caused by bugs that are only triggered by subtle faults at rare timing. Existing testing is inefficient in exposing such bugs. This paper presents Legolas, a fault injection testing framework designed to address this gap. To precisely simulate subtle faults, Legolas statically analyzes the system code and instruments hooks within a system. To efficiently explore numerous faults, Legolas introduces a novel notion of abstract states and automatically infers abstract states from code. During testing, Legolas designs an algorithm that leverages the inferred abstract states to make careful fault injection decisions. We applied Legolas on the latest releases of six popular, extensively tested distributed systems. Legolas found 20 new bugs that result in partial service failures.
items.abstract_zh: 许多分布式系统故障，尤其是臭名昭著的部分服务故障，都是由错误引起的，这些错误仅由罕见的细微故障触发。现有的测试在暴露此类错误方面效率低下。本文介绍了 Legolas，这是一个旨在解决这一差距的故障注入测试框架。为了精确模拟细微的故障，Legolas 静态分析系统内的系统代码和工具钩子。为了有效地探索众多故障，Legolas 引入了一种新颖的抽象状态概念，并自动从代码中推断出抽象状态。在测试过程中，Legolas 设计了一种算法，利用推断的抽象状态来做出谨慎的故障注入决策。我们在六种流行的、经过广泛测试的分布式系统的最新版本上应用了 Legolas。 Legolas 发现了 20 个导致部分服务失败的新错误。

items.title: Load is not what you should balance: Introducing Prequal.
items.abstract: We present PReQuaL (Probing to Reduce Queuing and Latency) , a load balancer for distributed multi-tenant systems. PReQuaL is designed to minimize real-time request latency in the presence of heterogeneous server capacities and non-uniform, time-varying antagonist load. To achieve this, PReQuaL actively probes server load and leverages the power of d choices paradigm , extending it with asynchronous and reusable probes. Cutting against received wisdom, PReQuaL does not balance CPU load, but instead selects servers according to estimated latency and active requests-in-flight (RIF). We explore the major design features of PReQuaL on a testbed system and describe our experience using it to balance load within YouTube, where it has been running for more than a year. PReQuaL has dramatically decreased tail latency, error rates, and resource use, enabling YouTube and other production systems at Google to run at much higher utilization.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 PReQuaL（探索减少排队和延迟），这是一种用于分布式多租户系统的负载均衡器。 PReQuaL 旨在最大限度地减少存在异构服务器容量和非均匀、时变对抗负载的情况下的实时请求延迟。为了实现这一目标，PReQuaL 主动探测服务器负载并利用 d 选择范式的强大功能，通过异步和可重用的探测对其进行扩展。与人们普遍认为的相反，PReQuaL 并不平衡 CPU 负载，而是根据估计的延迟和动态请求 (RIF) 选择服务器。我们在测试台系统上探索了 PReQuaL 的主要设计功能，并描述了我们使用它来平衡 YouTube 内负载的经验，它已经在 YouTube 上运行了一年多。 PReQuaL 显着降低了尾部延迟、错误率和资源使用，使 YouTube 和 Google 的其他生产系统能够以更高的利用率运行。

items.title: Brain-on-Switch: Towards Advanced Intelligent Network Data Plane via NN-Driven Traffic Analysis at Line-Speed.
items.abstract: The emerging programmable networks sparked significant research on Intelligent Network Data Plane (INDP), which achieves learning-based traffic analysis at line-speed. Prior art in INDP focus on deploying tree/forest models on the data plane. We observe a fundamental limitation in tree-based INDP approaches: although it is possible to represent even larger tree/forest tables on the data plane, the flow features that are computable on the data plane are fundamentally limited by hardware constraints. In this paper, we present BoS to push the boundaries of INDP by enabling Neural Network (NN) driven traffic analysis at line-speed. Many types of NNs (such as Recurrent Neural Network (RNN), and transformers) that are designed to work with sequential data have advantages over tree-based models, because they can take raw network data as input without complex feature computations on the fly. However, the challenge is significant: the recurrent computation scheme used in RNN inference is fundamentally different from the match-action paradigm used on the network data plane. BoS addresses this challenge by (i) designing a novel data plane friendly RNN architecture that can execute unlimited RNN time steps with limited data plane stages, effectively achieving line-speed RNN inference; and (ii) complementing the on-switch RNN model with an off-switch transformer-based traffic analysis module to further boost the overall performance. We implement a prototype of BoS using a P4 programmable switch as our data plane, and extensively evaluate it over multiple traffic analysis tasks. The results show that BoS outperforms state-of-the-art in both analysis accuracy and scalability.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的可编程网络引发了对智能网络数据平面（INDP）的重要研究，该平面实现了基于学习的线速流量分析。 INDP 中的现有技术侧重于在数据平面上部署树/森林模型。我们观察到基于树的 INDP 方法的基本限制：尽管可以在数据平面上表示更大的树/森林表，但在数据平面上可计算的流特征从根本上受到硬件约束的限制。在本文中，我们提出 BoS 通过启用神经网络 (NN) 驱动的线速流量分析来突破 INDP 的界限。设计用于处理顺序数据的许多类型的神经网络（例如循环神经网络 (RNN) 和转换器）比基于树的模型具有优势，因为它们可以将原始网络数据作为输入，而无需动态进行复杂的特征计算。然而，挑战是巨大的：RNN 推理中使用的循环计算方案与网络数据平面上使用的匹配动作范式有着根本的不同。 BoS 通过 (i) 设计一种新颖的数据平面友好的 RNN 架构来应对这一挑战，该架构可以在有限的数据平面阶段执行无限的 RNN 时间步长，有效实现线速 RNN 推理； (ii) 用基于开关变压器的流量分析模块补充开关 RNN 模型，以进一步提高整体性能。我们使用 P4 可编程交换机作为数据平面实现了 BoS 原型，并通过多个流量分析任务对其进行了广泛评估。结果表明，BoS 在分析准确性和可扩展性方面均优于最先进的技术。

items.title: Horus: Granular In-Network Task Scheduler for Cloud Datacenters.
items.abstract: Short-lived tasks are prevalent in modern interactive datacenter applications. However, designing schedulers to assign these tasks to workers distributed across the whole datacenter is challenging, because such schedulers need to make decisions at a microsecond scale, achieve high throughput, and minimize the tail response time. Current task schedulers in the literature are limited to individual racks. We present Horus, a new in-network task scheduler for short tasks that operates at the datacenter scale. Horus efficiently tracks and distributes the worker state among switches, which enables it to schedule tasks in parallel at line rate while optimizing the scheduling quality. We propose a new distributed task scheduling policy that minimizes the state and communication overheads, handles dynamic loads, and does not buffer tasks in switches. We compare Horus against the state-of-the-art in-network scheduler in a testbed with programmable switches as well as using simulations of datacenters with more than 27K hosts and thousands of switches handling diverse and dynamic workloads. Our results show that Horus efficiently scales to large datacenters, and it substantially outperforms the state-of-the-art across all performance metrics, including tail response time and throughput.
items.abstract_zh: 短期任务在现代交互式数据中心应用程序中普遍存在。然而，设计调度程序将这些任务分配给分布在整个数据中心的工作人员具有挑战性，因为此类调度程序需要在微秒级做出决策，实现高吞吐量，并最大限度地缩短尾部响应时间。当前文献中的任务调度程序仅限于单个机架。我们推出了 Horus，这是一种新的网络内任务调度程序，用于在数据中心规模运行的短任务。 Horus 有效地跟踪和分配交换机之间的工作状态，这使其能够以线速并行调度任务，同时优化调度质量。我们提出了一种新的分布式任务调度策略，可以最大限度地减少状态和通信开销，处理动态负载，并且不在交换机中缓冲任务。我们在具有可编程交换机的测试台上将 Horus 与最先进的网络内调度程序进行比较，并使用具有超过 27K 主机和数千台交换机的数据中心模拟来处理各种动态工作负载。我们的结果表明，Horus 可以有效地扩展到大型数据中心，并且在所有性能指标（包括尾响应时间和吞吐量）上都远远优于最先进的技术。

items.title: BFMSense: WiFi Sensing Using Beamforming Feedback Matrix.
items.abstract: WiFi-based contactless sensing has attracted a tremendous amount of attention due to its pervasiveness, low-cost, and non-intrusiveness to users. Existing systems mainly leverage channel state information (CSI) for sensing. However, CSI can only be extracted from very few commodity WiFi devices through driver hacking, severely limiting the adoption of WiFi sensing in real life. We observe a new opportunity that a large range of new-generation WiFi cards can report another piece of information, i.e., beamforming feedback matrix (BFM). In this paper, we propose to leverage this new BFM information for WiFi sensing. Through establishing the relationship between BFM and CSI, we lay the theoretical foundations for BFM-based WiFi sensing for the first time. We show that through careful signal processing, BFM can be utilized for fine-grained sensing. We showcase the sensing capability of BFM using two representative sensing applications, i.e., respiration sensing and human trajectory tracking. Comprehensive experiments show that BFM-based WiFi sensing can achieve highly accurate sensing performance on a large range of new-generation WiFi devices from various manufacturers, moving WiFi sensing one big step towards real-life adoption.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 WiFi 的非接触式传感因其普遍性、低成本和对用户的非侵入性而引起了极大的关注。现有系统主要利用信道状态信息（CSI）进行感知。然而，CSI 只能通过驱动程序黑客从极少数商用 WiFi 设备中提取，这严重限制了 WiFi 传感在现实生活中的采用。我们观察到一个新的机会，即大量新一代 WiFi 卡可以报告另一条信息，即波束成形反馈矩阵 (BFM)。在本文中，我们建议利用这一新的 BFM 信息进行 WiFi 传感。通过建立BFM和CSI之间的关系，我们首次为基于BFM的WiFi传感奠定了理论基础。我们证明，通过仔细的信号处理，BFM 可用于细粒度传感。我们使用两种代表性的传感应用（即呼吸传感和人体轨迹跟踪）展示 BFM 的传感能力。综合实验表明，基于 BFM 的 WiFi 传感可以在来自不同制造商的大量新一代 WiFi 设备上实现高精度的传感性能，使 WiFi 传感向现实生活中的采用迈出了一大步。

items.title: ADR-X: ANN-Assisted Wireless Link Rate Adaptation for Compute-Constrained Embedded Gaming Devices.
items.abstract: The wireless channel between gaming console and accessories e.g. controllers and headsets, experiences extremely rapid variations due to abrupt head and hand movements amidst an exciting game. In the absence of prior studies on wireless packet losses for console gaming, through extensive evaluations and user studies, we find that state-of-the-art rate adaptation schemes, unable to keep up with these rapid changes, experience packet loss rates of 2-10% while loss rates that are 10× lower (0.1-0.5%) are required to ensure a high quality gaming experience. We present ADR-X, an ANN-based contextual multi-armed bandit rate adaptation technique that continuously predicts and tracks the channel and picks appropriate data rates. A key challenge for ADR-X is that it must run on power and compute constrained embedded devices under realtime constraints. ADR-X addresses this challenge by meticulously crafting an ANN that leverages existing communication theory results to incorporate domain knowledge. This allows ADR-X to achieve 10× lower packet losses than existing schemes while also running 100× faster than state-of-the-art reinforcement learning schemes, making it suitable for deployment on embedded gaming devices.
items.abstract_zh: 游戏机和配件（例如游戏机）之间的无线通道在激动人心的游戏中，由于头部和手部的突然运动，控制器和耳机会经历极其快速的变化。由于之前缺乏对主机游戏无线丢包的研究，通过广泛的评估和用户研究，我们发现最先进的速率适配方案无法跟上这些快速变化，丢包率达到 2-10%，而丢包率需要降低 10 倍（0.1-0.5%）才能确保高质量的游戏体验。我们提出了 ADR-X，这是一种基于 ANN 的上下文多臂老虎机速率自适应技术，可连续预测和跟踪信道并选择适当的数据速率。 ADR-X 的一个关键挑战是它必须在实时限制下在功率和计算受限的嵌入式设备上运行。 ADR-X 通过精心设计一个 ANN 来应对这一挑战，该 ANN 利用现有的通信理论结果来整合领域知识。这使得 ADR-X 的数据包丢失率比现有方案低 10 倍，同时运行速度比最先进的强化学习方案快 100 倍，使其适合部署在嵌入式游戏设备上。

items.title: Sidekick: In-Network Assistance for Secure End-to-End Transport Protocols.
items.abstract: In response to concerns about protocol ossification and privacy, post-TCP transport protocols such as QUIC and Web-RTC include end-to-end encryption and authentication at the transport layer. This makes their packets opaque to middleboxes, freeing the transport protocol to evolve but preventing some in-network innovations and performance improvements. This paper describes sidekick protocols : an approach to in-network assistance for opaque transport protocols where in-network intermediaries help endpoints by sending information adjacent to the underlying connection, which remains opaque and unmodified on the wire. A key technical challenge is how the sidekick connection can efficiently refer to ranges of packets of the underlying connection without the ability to observe cleartext sequence numbers. We present a mathematical tool called a quACK that concisely represents a selective acknowledgment of opaque packets, without access to cleartext sequence numbers. In real-world and emulation-based evaluations, the sidekick improved performance in several scenarios: early retransmission over lossy Wi-Fi paths, proxy acknowledgments to save energy, and a path-aware congestion-control mechanism we call PACUBIC that emulates a "split" connection.
items.abstract_zh: 为了应对协议僵化和隐私问题，QUIC 和 Web-RTC 等后 TCP 传输协议在传输层加入了端到端加密和身份验证。这使得它们的数据包对中间盒不透明，从而使传输协议得以自由发展，但阻碍了一些网络内创新和性能改进。本文描述了 sidekick 协议：一种针对不透明传输协议的网络内协助方法，其中网络中介通过发送与底层连接相邻的信息来帮助端点，该信息在网络上保持不透明且未经修改。一个关键的技术挑战是 sidekick 连接如何能够有效地引用底层连接的数据包范围，而无需观察明文序列号。我们提出了一种称为 quACK 的数学工具，它简明地表示对不透明数据包的选择性确认，而无需访问明文序列号。在现实世界和基于仿真的评估中，Sidekick 在多种场景中提高了性能：有损 Wi-Fi 路径上的早期重传、节省能源的代理确认，以及我们称为 PACUBIC 的路径感知拥塞控制机制，该机制模拟“分离”连接。

items.title: Accelerating Neural Recommendation Training with Embedding Scheduling.
items.abstract: Deep learning recommendation models (DLRM) are extensively adopted to support many online services. Typical DLRM training frameworks adopt the parameter server (PS) in CPU servers to maintain memory-intensive embedding tables, and leverage GPU workers with embedding cache to accelerate compute-intensive neural network computation and enable fast embedding lookups. However, such distributed systems suffer from significant communication overhead caused by the embedding transmissions between workers and PS. Prior work reduces the number of cache embedding transmissions by compromising model accuracy, including oversampling hot embeddings or applying staleness-tolerant updates. This paper reveals that many of such transmissions can be avoided given the predictability and infrequency natures of in-cache embedding accesses in distributed training. Based on this observation, we explore a new direction to accelerate distributed DLRM training without compromising model accuracy, i.e., embedding scheduling—with the core idea of proactively determining "where embeddings should be trained" and "which embeddings should be synchronized" to increase the cache hit rate and decrease unnecessary updates, thus achieving a low communication overhead. To realize this idea, we design Herald, a real-time embedding scheduler consisting of two main components: an adaptive location-aware inputs allocator to determine where embeddings should be trained and an optimal communication plan generator to determine which embeddings should be synchronized. Our experiments with real-world workloads show that Herald reduces 48%-89% embedding transmissions, leading up to 2.11× and up to 1.61× better performance with TCP and RDMA, respectively, over 100 Gbps Ethernet for end-to-end DLRM training.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）被广泛采用来支持许多在线服务。典型的DLRM训练框架采用CPU服务器中的参数服务器（PS）来维护内存密集型嵌入表，并利用具有嵌入缓存的GPU工作器来加速计算密集型神经网络计算并实现快速嵌入查找。然而，这种分布式系统由于工作器和 PS 之间的嵌入传输而导致显着的通信开销。先前的工作通过损害模型准确性来减少缓存嵌入传输的数量，包括过采样热嵌入或应用过时容忍更新。本文揭示，鉴于分布式训练中缓存内嵌入访问的可预测性和不频繁的性质，许多此类传输是可以避免的。基于这一观察，我们探索了一个在不影响模型精度的情况下加速分布式DLRM训练的新方向，即嵌入调度——其核心思想是主动确定“应该在哪里训练嵌入”和“应该同步哪些嵌入”，以提高缓存命中率并减少不必要的更新，从而实现低通信开销。 To realize this idea, we design Herald, a real-time embedding scheduler consisting of two main components: an adaptive location-aware inputs allocator to determine where embeddings should be trained and an optimal communication plan generator to determine which embeddings should be synchronized.我们对实际工作负载的实验表明，Herald 减少了 48%-89% 的嵌入传输，在端到端 DLRM 训练的 100 Gbps 以太网上，TCP 和 RDMA 的性能分别提高了 2.11 倍和 1.61 倍。

items.title: Zombie: Middleboxes that Don't Snoop.
items.abstract: Zero-knowledge middleboxes (ZKMBs) are a recent paradigm in which clients get privacy and middleboxes enforce policy: clients prove in zero knowledge that the plaintext underlying their encrypted traffic complies with network policies, such as DNS filtering. However, prior work had impractically poor performance and was limited in functionality. This work presents Zombie, the first system built using the ZKMB paradigm. Zombie introduces techniques that push ZKMBs to the verge of practicality: preprocessing (to move the bulk of proof generation to idle times between requests), asynchrony (to remove proving and verifying costs from the critical path), and batching (to amortize some of the verification work). Zombie’s choices, together with these techniques, reduce client and middlebox overhead by ≈ 3.5×, lowering the critical path overhead for a DNS filtering application on commodity hardware to less than 300ms or, in the asynchronous configuration, to 0. As an additional contribution that is likely of independent interest, Zombie introduces a portfolio of techniques to encode regular expressions in probabilistic (and zero-knowledge) proofs. These techniques significantly improve performance over a standard baseline, asymptotically and concretely. Zombie builds on this portfolio to support policies based on regular expressions, such as data loss prevention.
items.abstract_zh: 零知识中间盒 (ZKMB) 是一种最新范例，其中客户端获得隐私，中间盒执行策略：客户端以零知识证明其加密流量背后的明文符合网络策略，例如 DNS 过滤。然而，之前的工作性能不佳且功能有限，不切实际。这项工作提出了 Zombie，这是第一个使用 ZKMB 范例构建的系统。 Zombie 引入了将 ZKMB 推向实用边缘的技术：预处理（将大量证明生成转移到请求之间的空闲时间）、异步（从关键路径中消除证明和验证成本）和批处理（分摊部分验证工作）。 Zombie 的选择与这些技术一起，将客户端和中间盒开销减少了约 3.5 倍，将商用硬件上 DNS 过滤应用程序的关键路径开销降低到 300 毫秒以下，或者在异步配置中降低到 0。作为可能具有独立兴趣的额外贡献，Zombie 引入了一系列技术，用于在概率（和零知识）证明中对正则表达式进行编码。这些技术在标准基线上渐进且具体地显着提高了性能。 Zombie 在此产品组合的基础上构建，支持基于正则表达式的策略，例如数据丢失防护。

items.title: Jolteon: Unleashing the Promise of Serverless for Serverless Workflows.
items.abstract: Serverless computing promises automatic resource provisioning to relieve the burden of developers. Yet, developers still have to manually configure resources on current serverless platforms to satisfy application-level requirements. This is because cloud applications are orchestrated as serverless workflows with multiple stages, exhibiting a complex relationship between resource configuration and application requirements. We propose Jolteon, an orchestrator to unleash the promise of automatic resource provisioning for serverless workflows. At the core of Jolteon is a stochastic performance model that combines the benefits of whitebox modeling to capture the execution characteristics of serverless computing and blackbox modeling to accommodate the inherent performance variability. We formulate a chance constrained optimization problem based on the performance model, and exploit sampling and convexity to find optimal resource configurations that satisfy user-defined cost or latency bounds. We implement a system prototype of Jolteon and evaluate it on AWS Lambda with a variety of serverless workflows. The experimental results show that Jolteon outperforms the state-of-the-art solution, Orion, by up to 2.3× on cost and 2.1× on latency.
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算承诺自动资源配置，以减轻开发人员的负担。然而，开发人员仍然需要在当前的无服务器平台上手动配置资源来满足应用程序级别的需求。这是因为云应用程序被编排为具有多个阶段的无服务器工作流程，表现出资源配置和应用程序需求之间的复杂关系。我们提出了 Jolteon，这是一个协调器，可以释放无服务器工作流程自动资源配置的希望。 Jolteon 的核心是随机性能模型，它结合了白盒建模的优点来捕获无服务器计算的执行特征和黑盒建模的优点以适应固有的性能变化。我们根据性能模型制定机会约束优化问题，并利用采样和凸性来找到满足用户定义的成本或延迟界限的最佳资源配置。我们实现了 Jolteon 的系统原型，并在 AWS Lambda 上使用各种无服务器工作流程对其进行评估。实验结果表明，Jolteon 的成本优于最先进的解决方案 Orion，高达 2.3 倍，延迟高达 2.1 倍。

items.title: MuCache: A General Framework for Caching in Microservice Graphs.
items.abstract: This paper introduces MuCache , a framework for extending arbitrary microservice applications with inter-service caches. MuCache significantly improves the performance of microservice graphs (commonly found in large applications like Uber or Twitter) by eliminating the need for one microservice to call another when the relevant state has not changed. MuCache is enabled by a novel non-blocking cache coherence and invalidation protocol for graph topologies that minimizes critical-path overhead. For this protocol, we prove a strong correctness result: any execution observed by the cache-enabled microservice application could have been observed by the original application without caches. Our evaluation on well-known microservice benchmarks shows that MuCache reduces the median request latency by up to 2.5×, and increases throughput by up to 60%.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 MuCache，一个用于通过服务间缓存扩展任意微服务应用程序的框架。 MuCache 通过消除一个微服务在相关状态未更改时调用另一个微服务的需要，显着提高了微服务图（常见于 Uber 或 Twitter 等大型应用程序中）的性能。 MuCache 由一种新颖的非阻塞缓存一致性和图拓扑失效协议实现，可最大限度地减少关键路径开销。对于这个协议，我们证明了一个很强的正确性结果：启用缓存的微服务应用程序观察到的任何执行都可以由没有缓存的原始应用程序观察到。我们对知名微服务基准的评估表明，MuCache 将平均请求延迟降低了 2.5 倍，并将吞吐量提高了 60%。

items.title: Fast Vector Query Processing for Large Datasets Beyond GPU Memory with Reordered Pipelining.
items.abstract: Vector query processing powers a wide range of AI applications. While GPUs are optimized for massive vector operations, today's practice relies on CPUs to process queries for large vector datasets, due to limited GPU memory. We present RUMMY, the first GPU-accelerated vector query processing system that achieves high performance and supports large vector datasets beyond GPU memory. The core of RUMMY is a novel reordered pipelining technique that exploits the characteristics of vector query processing to efficiently pipeline data transmission from host memory to GPU memory and query processing in GPU. Specifically, it leverages three ideas: (i) cluster-based retrofitting to eliminate redundant data transmission across queries in a batch, (ii) dynamic kernel padding with cluster balancing to maximize spatial and temporal GPU utilization for GPU computation, and (iii) query-aware reordering and grouping to optimally overlap transmission and computation. We also tailor GPU memory management for vector queries to reduce GPU memory fragmentation and cache misses. We evaluate RUMMY with a variety of billion-scale benchmarking datasets. The experimental results show that RUMMY outperforms IVF-GPU with CUDA unified memory by up to 135×. Compared to the CPU-based solution (with 64 vCPUs), RUMMY (with one NVIDIA A100 GPU) achieves up to 23.1× better performance and is up to 37.7× more cost-effective.
items.abstract_zh: 矢量查询处理为广泛的人工智能应用提供支持。虽然 GPU 针对大规模矢量运算进行了优化，但由于 GPU 内存有限，当今的实践依赖于 CPU 来处理大型矢量数据集的查询。我们推出 RUMMY，这是第一个 GPU 加速的矢量查询处理系统，它实现了高性能并支持超出 GPU 内存的大型矢量数据集。 RUMMY的核心是一种新颖的重新排序流水线技术，它利用向量查询处理的特点，高效地流水线式地将数据从主机内存传输到GPU内存并在GPU中进行查询处理。具体来说，它利用了三个想法：（i）基于集群的改造，以消除批量查询中的冗余数据传输，（ii）具有集群平衡的动态内核填充，以最大限度地提高 GPU 计算的空间和时间 GPU 利用率，以及（iii）查询感知重新排序和分组，以最佳地重叠传输和计算。我们还为向量查询定制 GPU 内存管理，以减少 GPU 内存碎片和缓存未命中。我们使用各种数十亿规模的基准数据集来评估 RUMMY。实验结果表明，RUMMY 的性能比带有 CUDA 统一内存的 IVF-GPU 提高了 135 倍。与基于 CPU 的解决方案（具有 64 个 vCPU）相比，RUMMY（具有 1 个 NVIDIA A100 GPU）的性能提高了 23.1 倍，成本效益提高了 37.7 倍。

items.title: Revisiting Congestion Control for Lossless Ethernet.
items.abstract: Congestion control is a key enabler for lossless Ethernet at scale. In this paper, we revisit this classic topic from a new perspective, i.e., understanding and exploiting the intrinsic properties of the underlying lossless network. We experimentally and analytically find that the intrinsic properties of lossless networks, such as packet conservation , can indeed provide valuable implications in estimating pipe capacity and the precise number of excessive packets. Besides, we derive principles on how to treat congested flows and victim flows individually to handle HoL blocking efficiently. Then, we propose ACK-driven congestion control (ACC) for lossless Ethernet, which simply resorts to the knowledge of ACK time series to exert a temporary halt to exactly drain out excessive packets of congested flows and then match its rate to pipe capacity. Testbed and large-scale simulations demonstrate that ACC ameliorates fundamental issues in lossless Ethernet (e.g., congestion spreading, HoL blocking, and deadlock) and achieves excellent low latency and high throughput performance. For instance, compared with existing schemes, ACC improves the average and 99th percentile FCT performance of small flows by 1.3~3.3× and 1.4~11.5×, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 拥塞控制是大规模无损以太网的关键推动因素。在本文中，我们从一个新的角度重新审视这个经典主题，即理解和利用底层无损网络的内在属性。我们通过实验和分析发现，无损网络的内在属性（例如数据包守恒）确实可以为估计管道容量和过量数据包的精确数量提供有价值的影响。此外，我们还得出了如何单独处理拥塞流和受害者流以有效处理 HoL 阻塞的原则。然后，我们提出了用于无损以太网的 ACK 驱动的拥塞控制（ACC），它简单地利用 ACK 时间序列的知识来施加暂时停止，以准确排出拥塞流中的过多数据包，然后将其速率与管道容量相匹配。测试台和大规模仿真表明，ACC 改善了无损以太网中的基本问题（例如拥塞扩散、HoL 阻塞和死锁），并实现了出色的低延迟和高吞吐量性能。例如，与现有方案相比，ACC将小流的平均和99% FCT性能分别提高了1.3~3.3倍和1.4~11.5倍。

items.title: Habitus: Boosting Mobile Immersive Content Delivery through Full-body Pose Tracking and Multipath Networking.
items.abstract: Delivering immersive content such as volumetric videos and virtual/mixed reality requires tremendous network bandwidth. Millimeter Wave (mmWave) radios such as 802.11ad/ay and mmWave 5G can provide multi-Gbps peak bandwidth, making them good candidates. However, mmWave is vulnerable to blockage/mobility and its signal attenuates very fast, posing a major challenge to mobile immersive content delivery systems where viewers are in constant motion and the human body may easily block the line-of-sight. To overcome this challenge, in this paper, we investigate two under-explored dimensions. First, we use the combination of a viewer’s full-body pose and the network information to predict mmWave performance as the viewer exercises six-degree-of-freedom (6-DoF) motion. We apply both offline and online transfer learning to enable the prediction models to react to unseen changes during initial training. Second, we jointly use the omnidirectional radio and mmWave radio available on commodity mobile devices, which have complementary network characteristics, to deliver immersive data. We integrate the above two features into a user-space software framework called Habitus, and demonstrate how it can be easily integrated into existing immersive content delivery systems to boost their network performance, which leads to up to 72% of quality-of-experience (QoE) improvement
items.abstract_zh: 提供体积视频和虚拟/混合现实等沉浸式内容需要巨大的网络带宽。 802.11ad/ay 和毫米波 5G 等毫米波 (mmWave) 无线电可以提供数 Gbps 峰值带宽，使其成为良好的候选者。然而，毫米波很容易受到阻塞/移动的影响，而且其信号衰减非常快，这对移动沉浸式内容传输系统构成了重大挑战，因为观看者不断运动，人体很容易遮挡视线。为了克服这一挑战，在本文中，我们研究了两个尚未探索的维度。首先，我们结合观看者的全身姿势和网络信息来预测观看者进行六自由度 (6-DoF) 运动时的毫米波性能。我们应用离线和在线迁移学习，使预测模型能够对初始训练期间未见的变化做出反应。其次，我们联合使用商用移动设备上可用的全向无线电和毫米波无线电（它们具有互补的网络特性）来提供沉浸式数据。我们将上述两个功能集成到名为 Habitus 的用户空间软件框架中，并演示如何将其轻松集成到现有的沉浸式内容交付系统中，以提升其网络性能，从而将体验质量 (QoE) 提高高达 72%

items.title: TECC: Towards Efficient QUIC Tunneling via Collaborative Transmission Control.
items.abstract: In this paper, we present TECC, a system based on collaborative transmission control that mitigates the mismatch of sending behavior between the inner and outer connections to achieve efficient QUIC tunneling. In TECC, a feedback framework is implemented to enable end hosts to collect more precise network information that is sensed on the tunnel server, which assists the inner end-to-end connection to achieve better congestion control and loss recovery. Extensive experiments in emulated networks and real-world large-scale A/B tests demonstrate the efficiency of TECC. Specifically, compared with the state-of-the-art QUIC tunneling solution, TECC significantly reduces flow completion time. In emulated networks, TECC decreases flow completion time by 30% on average and 53% at the 99th percentile. TECC also gains a reduction in RPC (Remote Procedure Call) request completion time of 3.9% on average and 13.3% at the 99th percentile in large-scale A/B tests.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 TECC，这是一种基于协作传输控制的系统，可以减轻内部和外部连接之间发送行为的不匹配，以实现高效的 QUIC 隧道。在TECC中，实现了反馈框架，使终端主机能够收集隧道服务器上感知到的更精确的网络信息，这有助于内部端到端连接实现更好的拥塞控制和丢失恢复。仿真网络和现实世界大规模 A/B 测试中的大量实验证明了 TECC 的效率。具体来说，与最先进的 QUIC 隧道解决方案相比，TECC 显着缩短了流程完成时间。在仿真网络中，TECC 将流量完成时间平均缩短了 30%，在第 99 个百分位数时缩短了 53%。 TECC 还使 RPC（远程过程调用）请求完成时间平均缩短了 3.9%，在大规模 A/B 测试中，第 99 个百分点缩短了 13.3%。

items.title: SIEVE is Simpler than LRU: an Efficient Turn-Key Eviction Algorithm for Web Caches.
items.abstract: Caching is an indispensable technique for low-cost and fast data serving. The eviction algorithm, at the heart of a cache, has been primarily designed to maximize efficiency—reducing the cache miss ratio. Many eviction algorithms have been designed in the past decades. However, they all trade off throughput, simplicity, or both for higher efficiency. Such a compromise often hinders adoption in production systems. This work presents SIEVE, an algorithm that is simpler than LRU and provides better than state-of-the-art efficiency and scalability for web cache workloads. We implemented SIEVE in five production cache libraries, requiring fewer than 20 lines of code changes on average. Our evaluation on 1559 cache traces from 7 sources shows that SIEVE achieves up to 63.2% lower miss ratio than ARC. Moreover, SIEVE has a lower miss ratio than 9 state-of-the-art algorithms on more than 45% of the 1559 traces, while the next best algorithm only has a lower miss ratio on 15%. SIEVE's simplicity comes with superior scalability as cache hits require no locking. Our prototype achieves twice the throughput of an optimized 16-thread LRU implementation. SIEVE is more than an eviction algorithm; it can be used as a cache primitive to build advanced eviction algorithms just like FIFO and LRU.
items.abstract_zh: 缓存是低成本、快速数据服务不可或缺的技术。驱逐算法是缓存的核心，其主要设计目的是最大限度地提高效率，从而降低缓存未命中率。在过去的几十年里，人们设计了许多驱逐算法。然而，它们都以吞吐量、简单性或两者兼而有之来换取更高的效率。这种妥协通常会阻碍生产系统的采用。这项工作提出了 SIEVE，这是一种比 LRU 更简单的算法，可为 Web 缓存工作负载提供优于最先进的效率和可扩展性。我们在五个生产缓存库中实现了 SIEVE，平均需要不到 20 行代码更改。我们对来自 7 个来源的 1559 条缓存跟踪的评估表明，SIEVE 的未命中率比 ARC 降低了 63.2%。此外，SIEVE 在 1559 条轨迹中超过 45% 的缺失率低于 9 个最先进的算法，而次优算法仅在 15% 的缺失率上较低。 SIEVE 的简单性带来了卓越的可扩展性，因为缓存命中不需要锁定。我们的原型实现的吞吐量是优化的 16 线程 LRU 实现的两倍。 SIEVE 不仅仅是一种驱逐算法；它可以用作缓存原语来构建高级驱逐算法，就像 FIFO 和 LRU 一样。

items.title: Vulcan: Automatic Query Planning for Live ML Analytics.
items.abstract: Live ML analytics have gained increasing popularity with large-scale deployments due to recent evolution of ML technologies. To serve live ML queries, experts nowadays still need to perform manual query planning, which involves pipeline construction, query configuration, and pipeline placement across multiple edge tiers in a heterogeneous infrastructure. Finding the best query plan for a live ML query requires navigating a huge search space, calling for an efficient and systematic solution. In this paper, we propose Vulcan, a system that automatically generates query plans for live ML queries to optimize their accuracy, latency, and resource consumption. Based on the user query and performance requirements, Vulcan determines the best pipeline, placement, and query configuration for the query with low profiling cost; it also performs fast online adaptation after query deployment. Vulcan outperforms state-of-the-art ML analytics systems by 4.1×-30.1× in terms of search cost while delivering up to 3.3× better query latency.
items.abstract_zh: 由于机器学习技术的最新发展，实时机器学习分析在大规模部署中越来越受欢迎。为了服务实时机器学习查询，专家现在仍然需要执行手动查询规划，这涉及异构基础设施中跨多个边缘层的管道构建、查询配置和管道放置。为实时 ML 查询找到最佳查询计划需要浏览巨大的搜索空间，需要高效且系统的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了 Vulcan，这是一个自动为实时 ML 查询生成查询计划的系统，以优化其准确性、延迟和资源消耗。根据用户的查询和性能要求，Vulcan以较低的分析成本为查询确定最佳的管道、放置和查询配置；它还在查询部署后执行快速在线适配。就搜索成本而言，Vulcan 的性能比最先进的 ML 分析系统高出 4.1 倍-30.1 倍，同时查询延迟提高了 3.3 倍。

items.title: EPVerifier: Accelerating Update Storms Verification with Edge-Predicate.
items.abstract: Data plane verification is designed to automatically verify network correctness by directly analyzing the data plane. Recent data plane verifiers have achieved sub-millisecond verification for per rule update by partitioning packets into equivalence classes (ECs). A large number of data plane updates can be generated in a short interval, known as update storms , due to network events such as end-to-end establishments, disruption or recovery. When it comes to update storms, however, the verification speed of current EC-based methods is often slowed down by the maintenance of their EC-based network model (EC-model). This paper presents EPVerifier, a fast, partitioned data plane verification for update storms to further accelerate update storms verification. EPVerifier uses a novel edge-predicate-based (EP-based) local modeling approach to avoid drastic oscillations of the EC-model caused by changes in the set of equivalence classes. In addition, with local EPs, EPVerifier can achieve a partition of verification tasks by switches that EC-based methods cannot to get better parallel performance. We implement EPVerifier as an easy-to-use tool, allowing users to quickly get the appropriate verification results at any moment by providing necessary input. Both dataset trace-driven simulations and deployments in the wild show that EPVerifier achieves robustly fast update storm verification and superior parallel performance and these advantages expand with the data plane's complexity and storm size growth. The verification time of EPVerifier for an update storm of size 1M is around 10s on average, a 2-10× improvement over the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 数据平面验证旨在通过直接分析数据平面来自动验证网络的正确性。最近的数据平面验证器通过将数据包划分为等价类 (EC)，实现了每个规则更新的亚毫秒级验证。由于端到端建立、中断或恢复等网络事件，可能会在短时间内产生大量数据平面更新，称为更新风暴。然而，当涉及到更新风暴时，当前基于 EC 的方法的验证速度往往会因为维护其基于 EC 的网络模型（EC-model）而减慢。本文提出了 EPVerifier，一种针对更新风暴的快速分区数据平面验证，以进一步加速更新风暴验证。 EPVerifier 使用一种新颖的基于边缘谓词（基于 EP）的局部建模方法来避免等价类集的变化引起的 EC 模型的剧烈振荡。此外，借助本地EP，EPVerifier可以通过切换来实现基于EC的方法无法实现的验证任务划分，从而获得更好的并行性能。我们将 EPVerifier 实现为一个易于使用的工具，允许用户通过提供必要的输入随时快速获得适当的验证结果。数据集跟踪驱动的模拟和野外部署都表明 EPVerifier 实现了稳健的快速更新风暴验证和卓越的并行性能，并且这些优势随着数据平面的复杂性和风暴规模的增长而扩展。 EPVerifier 对于 1M 大小的更新风暴的验证时间平均约为 10 秒，比现有技术提高了 2-10 倍。

items.title: AUGUR: Practical Mobile Multipath Transport Service for Low Tail Latency in Real-Time Streaming.
items.abstract: Real-time streaming applications like cloud gaming require consistently low latency, even at the tail. Our large-scale measurement based on a major cloud gaming service provider reveals that in Wi-Fi networks, the delay of the wireless hop can inflate due to its fluctuating nature, making it difficult to achieve consistently low tail latency. While cellular paths can be leveraged to alleviate the impact of wireless fluctuation of Wi-Fi paths, our user study reveals that it is crucial to constrain cellular data usage while using multipath transport. In this paper, we present AUGUR, a multipath transport service designed to reduce long tail latency and video frame stall rates in mobile real-time streaming. To address the challenge of reducing long tail latency by utilizing cellular paths while minimizing cellular data usage, AUGUR captures user characteristics by deriving state probability models and formulates the equilibrium into Integer Linear Programming (ILP) problems for each user session to determine the opportunity of frame retransmission and path selection. Our trace-driven emulation and large-scale real-world deployment in a Tencent Start cloud gaming platform demonstrate that AUGUR achieves up to 66.0% reduction in tail latency and 99.5% reduction in frame stall rate with 88.1% decrease in cellular data usage compared to other multipath transport schemes.
items.abstract_zh: 云游戏等实时流应用程序需要始终保持低延迟，即使在尾部也是如此。我们基于一家主要云游戏服务提供商的大规模测量表明，在 Wi-Fi 网络中，无线跳的延迟可能会因其波动性而增大，从而难以实现持续的低尾延迟。虽然可以利用蜂窝路径来减轻 Wi-Fi 路径无线波动的影响，但我们的用户研究表明，在使用多路径传输时限制蜂窝数据使用至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了 AUGUR，一种多路径传输服务，旨在减少移动实时流中的长尾延迟和视频帧停顿率。为了解决利用蜂窝路径减少长尾延迟的挑战，同时最大限度地减少蜂窝数据使用量，AUGUR 通过导出状态概率模型来捕获用户特征，并将平衡公式化为每个用户会话的整数线性规划 (ILP) 问题，以确定帧重传和路径选择的机会。我们在Tencent Start云游戏平台上进行的跟踪驱动仿真和大规模实际部署表明，与其他多路径传输方案相比，AUGUR 可将尾延迟降低高达 66.0%，帧停顿率降低 99.5%，蜂窝数据使用量降低 88.1%。

items.title: Resiliency at Scale: Managing Google's TPUv4 Machine Learning Supercomputer.
items.abstract: TPUv4 (Tensor Processing Unit) is Google’s 3rd generation accelerator for machine learning training, deployed as a 4096-node supercomputer with a custom 3D torus interconnect. In this paper, we describe our experience designing and operating the software infrastructure that allows TPUv4 supercomputers to operate at scale, including features for automatic fault resiliency and hardware recovery. We adopt a software-defined networking (SDN) approach to manage TPUv4’s high-bandwidth inter-chip interconnect (ICI) fabric, using optical circuit switching to dynamically configure routes to work around machine, chip and link failures. Our infrastructure detects failures and automatically triggers reconfiguration to minimize disruption to running workloads, as well as initiating remediation and repair workflows for the affected components. Similar techniques interface with maintenance and upgrade workflows for both hardware and software. Our dynamic reconfiguration approach allows our TPUv4 supercomputers to achieve 99.98% system availability, gracefully handling hardware outages experienced by ~1% of the training jobs.
items.abstract_zh: TPUv4（张量处理单元）是 Google 用于机器学习训练的第三代加速器，部署为具有定制 3D 环面互连的 4096 节点超级计算机。在本文中，我们描述了我们设计和操作允许 TPUv4 超级计算机大规模运行的软件基础设施的经验，包括自动故障恢复和硬件恢复的功能。我们采用软件定义网络 (SDN) 方法来管理 TPUv4 的高带宽芯片间互连 (ICI) 结构，使用光路交换动态配置路由以解决机器、芯片和链路故障。我们的基础设施检测故障并自动触发重新配置，以最大程度地减少对运行工作负载的干扰，并启动受影响组件的补救和修复工作流程。类似的技术与硬件和软件的维护和升级工作流程相结合。我们的动态重新配置方法使我们的 TPUv4 超级计算机能够实现 99.98% 的系统可用性，妥善处理约 1% 的训练作业所经历的硬件中断。
